Hey there Patriot, it's Congressman Morgan Luttrell here, personally reaching out to you today.

I have a small ask to make of you today, but let me first explain how this small contribution will have a major impact.

Our freedoms are under constant threat of the socialist agenda, and so it means we have to put up a fight.

I know what it's like to have to put everything on the line to fight for your future.

While serving in the U.S. military, I nearly died in a fatal helicopter crash.

I'll spare you the gruesome details, but I was left with a broken back and a traumatic brain injury.

_**But I recovered, and I kept fighting.**_

That is exactly what I am asking of you right now.

America is spiraling out of control like a helicopter set for a fiery crash landing, but we have a slim chance of recovery...

_**Only if we keep fighting.**_

This fight is not something that falls to one person to save us from the ashes of the Biden presidency. It will take every single Republican patriot to step up and join the fight.

**[I am asking you today to make a small contribution to that fight.](http://links.gopstateallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3e5fc66e57c240b2bcd1d3c63db4d0bb&_e=VDASCCMdyQ-DS6UAmqoZZmElAuqVGje-btUR8_jQHuWWSfgGj2_uLIsNGbiOaGtLAECLzYq6_mxVM49VwutZSSGvNCh1bVJAt_sFfKX9kwN7p47u7cSraosrWlAx7JP6mFuTtrvNSrkB0M2NrUb0D-b_SNr0ub5fpEryoQgbWHdEhY7rLYcqIRKrLRd66lZFo-3CdsmLmgxnVQ1JM0_Xy4sxEfF5OKrSdXrTd-vaMRS4zeTPj8fLC7a1dhdsB8Zrby7mlf-hWK92C92K24UAUSsQhbPqxhY3EH2ew8KxFwi4Yu50Nd5AwCyWkKLiXzEa-RLt_7_xc25i-QG3XGfGBYHq97zdF0rVwIHvBfXXlcLDWAwEo21zDUJKdj_Jf5dcf7qiB_IspwP_cgQMSEyZRQ%3D%3D)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64915?t=6&akid=13588%2E878179%2EhcoLCv) Team, our Democracy is in PERIL –

**First President Biden** told you about the importance of electing strong Democratic leaders like Sherrod Brown to our vulnerable Senate Majority..

**Then Vice President Kamala Harris** told you how Republican opponents are ITCHING to take control of the Senate..

**And even Nancy Pelosi** told you:
* * *
_“Saving our democracy, the oath of office to protect and defend the Constitution. Our flag is still there with liberty and justice for all, [it’s all] so important.”_ – Nancy Pelosi
* * *
**_Democrats need to STEP UP so we can protect our Senate from MAGA control! — and that starts with protecting Ohio!_** We don’t have much time, folks: **[_Chip in $7 TONIGHT to help us shore enough support for Sherrod Brown to beat out the MAGA opponents »_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64915?t=7&akid=13588%2E878179%2EhcoLCv)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64916?t=8&akid=13588%2E878179%2EhcoLCv)

We can’t do this without you, folks.

_Team VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13588%2E878179%2EhcoLCv). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13588%2E878179%2EhcoLCv).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=13588%2E878179%2EhcoLCv) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=13588%2E878179%2EhcoLCv). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=13588%2E878179%2EhcoLCv)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: We have an official opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| Peter, Ohio's primary is over, and now, it's official: **We're going up against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate Bernie Moreno in the race experts say could decide Senate control.**

And it's not just Moreno we're up against. National Republicans are going ALL IN to flip this seat red – they're already spending record amounts to defeat me. We need to fight back ASAP, or we could risk entering the general election at a disadvantage.

**So I'm personally asking:** [Please, will you split $10 or more now between my campaign and UNITEDemocrats to help me defend Ohio's critical seat and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81539104/462789317/926844391?amount=10&refcode=UD_20240323_EMSPL_E3_T0_GM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MjA4YmQxLTg3ZTktZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9-9-tsI4cAYJXya6IGviV1OHW3PFzZzHEbiEZ4Wmlrg=)

In case you need a reminder, my opponent and I couldn't be more different:

• He wants a national abortion ban, **I want to restore _Roe v. Wade._**
• He protects the wealthiest 1%, **I defend American workers.**
• He'll do Trump's and McConnell's bidding in the Senate, **I'm a champion for democracy.**

Unfortunately, that's not all. Moreno is also writing his campaign million-dollar checks, and now that he's through the primary, the GOP will be funneling even more money into this race. **They're trying to buy this Senate seat because they know they don't have a grassroots movement behind them like we do.**

**But that also means I'm relying on folks like you to power us to victory, one $10 donation at a time.** [So please, will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and UNITEDemocrats to help us defeat our GOP opponent, win in Ohio, and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81539105/462789318/926844391?amount=10&refcode=UD_20240323_EMSPL_E3_T0_GM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MjA4YmQxLTg3ZTktZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9-9-tsI4cAYJXya6IGviV1OHW3PFzZzHEbiEZ4Wmlrg=)

Your support means the world – especially now. Thank you,

Sherrod Brown

clean_body: | Peter, Ohio's primary is over, and now, it's official: We're going up against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate Bernie Moreno in the race experts say could decide Senate control. And it's not just Moreno we're up against. National Republicans are going ALL IN to flip this seat red – they're already spending record amounts to defeat me. We need to fight back ASAP, or we could risk entering the general election at a disadvantage. So I'm personally asking: = In case you need a reminder, my opponent and I couldn't be more different: • He wants a national abortion ban, I want to restore Roe v. Wade. • He protects the wealthiest 1%, I defend American workers. • He'll do Trump's and McConnell's bidding in the Senate, I'm a champion for democracy. Unfortunately, that's not all. Moreno is also writing his campaign million-dollar checks, and now that he's through the primary, the GOP will be funneling even more money into this race. They're trying to buy this Senate seat because they know they don't have a grassroots movement behind them like we do. But that also means I'm relying on folks like you to power us to victory, one $10 donation at a time. = Your support means the world – especially now. Thank you, Sherrod Brown | | Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC (www.unitedemocrats.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 514 Daniels St., #286, Raleigh, NC 27605 Please, consider making a =. A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

body:

**MARSHA BLACKBURN - THE FABULOUS SENATOR FROM TENNESSEE - IS THE REAL DEAL, PEOPLE!**

She's a leader of our MAGA movement. She's a tough-as-nails Conservative. And she's a wall standing in the way of Joe Biden's radical agenda.

She's also up for re-election in November. Normally, she would soar through the finish line since she's a top ally of President Trump... but unfortunately, we have a problem.

Chuck Schumer recruited a power-hungry, showboating socialist in a desperate attempt to destroy any opposition to his agenda and defeat Marsha.

In fact, Marsha's opponent just joined forces with Hollywood elite types to turbocharge her negative campaign to flip Tennessee.

Let me say this in no uncertain terms:

_If this radical socialist manages to flip Tennessee, our path to winning back the Senate Majority will COMPLETELY VANISH. _

_**[So, with all that being said, I respectfully ask you for the FIRST TIME to donate right now to Marsha Blackburn's re-election campaign.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2288qs89ttd53d3bps4qul2al98f9uq2rrnm2f0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c9jm6oj1chh2bs "So, with all that being said, I respectfully ask you for the FIRST TIME to donate right now to Marsha Blackburn’s re-election campaign.")**_

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Urgent Action Needed
body:
highlight-blue {background-color: #648fc6;}
Science and research tells us that life begins at the moment of conception.

|
---
| | From the Desk of Marjorie Dannenfelser Hello, In our fast-paced world, it's easy to lose sight of fundamental principles, especially when it comes to complex issues. Rather than trying to understand or get involved, so often I find it's easier for people to turn a blind eye. Recently, I feel like the culture in our country has forgotten - or ignored - the most basic lessons. I've felt a growing concern about how our society perceives and values life, particularly when it comes to the development of human life. Science and research tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. We know exactly when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, can wiggle their toes, and even hear their mother's voice. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are treated as though they are not alive or even human in our society. **After speaking to the experts and talking to mothers for over 30 years as a pro-life activist, I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z35r62afbev902l3944be1jmjm5abnd42iods69o_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c9jm1o34cdh2bs)
_Marjorie Dannenfelser
President SBA Pro-Life America_ Our Creator has given us life as a precious gift. No person is disposable, and every life has value because we are made in His image. I believe that everyone deserves life, despite what our society, schools, or government say. I believe that together we can make a difference in our culture that has drifted off course. I believe we can bring dignity and a voice to the voiceless. I also strongly believe I'm not alone in my convictions. I believe that you believe this too. SBA Pro-Life America works everyday to bring the truth about abortion to light and shine a ray of hope into our culture. We want to give the next generation of Americans a bright future. But this future will require commitment from people like you. The first step we must all take is clearly stating what we believe and what we're willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. Will you join me and be a voice for the voiceless? Will you stand up for those that cannot do it for themselves? I've created a pro-life pledge and I'd love your support. You can join over 1 million pro-life supporters - people like you - that want to see the unborn protected, valued, and cherished. [https://action.sbaprolife.org/stand-for-life-with-me](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2o2k90a84gt6g8l2glmuveu1ks9j2n0irateeso_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c9jm1o34cdh2bs) For Life,
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to SBA Pro-Life America helps us to focus on our mission of combining politics with policy, investing heavily in voter education to ensure that pro-life Americans know where their lawmakers stand on protecting the unborn, and in issue advocacy, advancing pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns.
---
|
---

Friend,

The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington.
Thank you.
-Russell

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Liberty Report
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Freedom Liberty Report is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkc1ugzAQhJ_G3ED-WSAcOEQCqkpJWrWHHC3H3oAlG5BtVPXtK6Lk3uvOama_netZnpV1dh4vymN7d0GGKGclJ-tcHjBiygPeA8ZJcsohpyLnIFlmWsoaA5Bhy2rGeM0bUWZTewDGG9RC3MoD6LI2wDTUDUIDqmaszmy7-1DBgR6gBFaUqI2mlRZIK6oaQ4AqhyEV94BoFq9m4-wNQ_oNuC4hFXrxmWunlNZIxJHwgfDBrcV-cTTKYYFmI3xIE-ZjQJWeGFqrfVcMURPRUcq4uFAO_ESr7qPr-2_Cqy15GZctaCSiW8MSV9TJzuNT8mjs5ono0CvrnkOt_KrsOBPRpQkfiY_Al7zMCedERHfth_fz8a2Xn8d8OH3lrz9koTXrj3XOxqomQMfd_EGZ_l_IXwAAAP___VKSFw)
---
| | [](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkc1ugzAQhJ_G3ED-WSAcOEQCqkpJWrWHHC3H3oAlG5BtVPXtK6Lk3uvOama_netZnpV1dh4vymN7d0GGKGclJ-tcHjBiygPeA8ZJcsohpyLnIFlmWsoaA5Bhy2rGeM0bUWZTewDGG9RC3MoD6LI2wDTUDUIDqmaszmy7-1DBgR6gBFaUqI2mlRZIK6oaQ4AqhyEV94BoFq9m4-wNQ_oNuC4hFXrxmWunlNZIxJHwgfDBrcV-cTTKYYFmI3xIE-ZjQJWeGFqrfVcMURPRUcq4uFAO_ESr7qPr-2_Cqy15GZctaCSiW8MSV9TJzuNT8mjs5ono0CvrnkOt_KrsOBPRpQkfiY_Al7zMCedERHfth_fz8a2Xn8d8OH3lrz9koTXrj3XOxqomQMfd_EGZ_l_IXwAAAP___VKSFw) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkc1ugzAQhJ_G3ED-WSAcOEQCqkpJWrWHHC3H3oAlG5BtVPXtK6Lk3uvOama_netZnpV1dh4vymN7d0GGKGclJ-tcHjBiygPeA8ZJcsohpyLnIFlmWsoaA5Bhy2rGeM0bUWZTewDGG9RC3MoD6LI2wDTUDUIDqmaszmy7-1DBgR6gBFaUqI2mlRZIK6oaQ4AqhyEV94BoFq9m4-wNQ_oNuC4hFXrxmWunlNZIxJHwgfDBrcV-cTTKYYFmI3xIE-ZjQJWeGFqrfVcMURPRUcq4uFAO_ESr7qPr-2_Cqy15GZctaCSiW8MSV9TJzuNT8mjs5ono0CvrnkOt_KrsOBPRpQkfiY_Al7zMCedERHfth_fz8a2Xn8d8OH3lrz9koTXrj3XOxqomQMfd_EGZ_l_IXwAAAP___VKSFw)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox. Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Freedom Liberty Report PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hudson, Paul
subject: Reminder: Friend, will President Biden's proposed $7.3 trillion federal budget really help our existing $34 trillion debt?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PAUL HUDSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Last week President Biden submitted a proposed federal budget that spends trillions more than the nation can afford, hikes up taxes, and skimps on vital priorities like national security.
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G2PlATE82WVzs37_ZKfbfJQE1lzg3jQnpTnSAx3Ii9upsEgF9-kS3FsXUu7cwE9qkmyu3WZYEwzQYzvTBqI0ZBMh_Bhg9aLR78abDHm4iH-y1XZy_Ip_Wsm4jiy2WYdgt-IznNVbM4RGIyIjSgV-I5WCXoGei7J0&c=qmzl3ESeWhwmKeu79VAzwDMqs9HYde9OZ6wzj6ia33_Q1A8rzqhVMA==&ch=SBwPRH3tpZzFpmFGzD5I4dgXQQHmuAYf9iwZgI3cczCQ-ZxsBSVqxg==)
---
|
Friend
Last week President Biden submitted a proposed federal budget that spends trillions more than the nation can afford, hikes up taxes, and skimps on vital priorities like national security. The President calls this 'investing in the future,' but a debt-ridden, high-tax, insecure future isn't one any of us should be shooting for.
---
| [The Wall Street Journal](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G2PlATE82WVzs37_ZKfbfJQE1lzg3jQnpTnSAx3Ii9upsEgF9-kS3JyU5xkinx55vSu4mN_VfpxRl71GgoJFEPrxXmyJf4aGrzaAQcfbfoujVG6RrNXoUJUHLfbqFjXeiEl-XtV3I9gA4esxQJFfouI9yC4mimRbiPU4NlL-om7HWlBuQBWuB09m5jXxDU0DgLpEvza9l7Cf8rlCFkwUsg==&c=qmzl3ESeWhwmKeu79VAzwDMqs9HYde9OZ6wzj6ia33_Q1A8rzqhVMA==&ch=SBwPRH3tpZzFpmFGzD5I4dgXQQHmuAYf9iwZgI3cczCQ-ZxsBSVqxg==) referred to the President's $7.3 trillion budget as a 'budget fantasy' that 'sets a record for unreality'--'the overall spending numbers fly in the face of fiscal reality.' The reality is that we already have a $34 trillion national debt and this budget heaps another $1.1 trillion spending increase on top of that, for an increase of 18% in government spending.
The proposed budget then tries to cover this crippling increase in spending by jacking up taxes. According to the Administration's own Treasury Department, the proposed budget would raise tax receipts by $4.951 trillion over 10 years, including more than $2.7 trillion in tax hikes on businesses and nearly $2 trillion on individuals.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G2PlATE82WVzs37_ZKfbfJQE1lzg3jQnpTnSAx3Ii9upsEgF9-kS3BbyLpARLKFS8asqRoSx6vbBrl-DBKxswc7I9vPbezQI6jI1-s5RzDt4fap9aH-9h_VcPOsxklOopz-w1zaErhZyhTjnRv3bwlLK_bfxAYBIEYsvKpEJNyNEvh9oWgtKlw==&c=qmzl3ESeWhwmKeu79VAzwDMqs9HYde9OZ6wzj6ia33_Q1A8rzqhVMA==&ch=SBwPRH3tpZzFpmFGzD5I4dgXQQHmuAYf9iwZgI3cczCQ-ZxsBSVqxg==)
---
|
To cap it all off, the proposed budget is awash with billions of spending on progressive pet projects while at the same time skimping on vital spending for our national defense. As the Journal noted, 'President Biden's budget proposal includes record spending for nearly every corner of government, but there's one big exception: national defense.'
The real-world impact of this means that while China is scaling up its navy to more than 350 ships, we will be outgunned and outmanned in the Pacific entering the most dangerous period ever of U.S.-China relations.

---
| | [HELP END THE FISCAL IRRESPONSIBILITY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G2PlATE82WVzs37_ZKfbfJQE1lzg3jQnpTnSAx3Ii9upsEgF9-kS3JQa0knUDAf_dzSZY-B360nRYQmkBb67A9XC7PEQtJ6n43QpvBCl4DvgawvfKAXnOslDcnfb_hkF4uJ5Vz4J4113ad6WB4yaihoAA5gEV2ddu8jbU9_xCqyDaOnT6bZPLZ0KOBbyzSmbnqD11hmaTI6--t9cQBH7Cla-7DPDbXpzCVU-cuAJDe0ioycgnc0t6A2OAhhflxAhZsT71_pOBSWk2eURgbiaT4yqYauNGYZ4cnTZUXMdrrE=&c=qmzl3ESeWhwmKeu79VAzwDMqs9HYde9OZ6wzj6ia33_Q1A8rzqhVMA==&ch=SBwPRH3tpZzFpmFGzD5I4dgXQQHmuAYf9iwZgI3cczCQ-ZxsBSVqxg==)
---
|
This budget has our nation's priorities all wrong, and I call on our current representative in Washington, [Hillary Scholten](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G2PlATE82WVzs37_ZKfbfJQE1lzg3jQnpTnSAx3Ii9upsEgF9-kS3FsXUu7cwE9q2p10Mt1bh-sH92DUqhy_BJ703y7V5hFTMlxYQfUPJa0MsE-RiWAGr3upNKCTGHKXKNN4M9bW1mgbVAbw5F0oeJ53_D0QDUnX&c=qmzl3ESeWhwmKeu79VAzwDMqs9HYde9OZ6wzj6ia33_Q1A8rzqhVMA==&ch=SBwPRH3tpZzFpmFGzD5I4dgXQQHmuAYf9iwZgI3cczCQ-ZxsBSVqxg==), to oppose this reckless plan. In a campaign ad last cycle, she implored: 'Democrats, stop the spending.'
Now is her chance to back up campaign rhetoric with actual action in Congress by opposing President Biden's irresponsible budget.
As always, never hesitate to [reach out](mailto:josh@paulhudsonforcongress.com).
Humbly, Paul
---

name: Steve Garvey #6
subject: Strike out Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vssXEf9iMN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/ossXEf9iMN

Friend,

After the March 5th primary it's all come down to us vs Adam Schiff.

Will you please rush me your GARVEY FOR SENATE Campaign R.S.V.P. in the next 48 hours to help defeat Adam Schiff in November?

…a California Senate seat that is open for the first time since 1992…

…a Senate seat in a blue state that is winnable for the first time in a long time, precisely because the people of this state are every day seeing their quality of life diminish as a direct result of the radical leftwing policies
enacted by the Democrats during the last three decades…

…and a Senate seat that is pivotal to retaking the U.S. Senate and therefore pivotal to America's future.

I won't sugarcoat it.

This is the single most difficult race in America. I can't do it without you.

That's why I am counting on you to rush in your GARVEY FOR SENATE campaign R.S.V.P. of $35 today.

Here's the thing. As it now stands, 100% of Californians are being forced to live with:

Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction.

The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.

Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie… prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.

That's what led me to enter this race.

And that's why I'm urging you to join me by rushing me your GARVEY FOR SENATE Campaign R.S.V.P. without delay.

I get up every day and ask God to give me the strength to make a difference in people's lives.

This really gets to heart of why I'm running…

You see, the same dream and the same opportunity I was given is fading. It's fading all across America. But it's fading at an even faster pace right here in California.

I pray you'll stand with me today.

With deepest appreciation,

Steve Garvey #6

P.S. If you agree we cannot afford to find out whether the American Dream is down to its final inning, its final out, or its final strike and are ready to turn back the clock on the decline please rush your R.S.V.P. of $35 today.

Donate

PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE

PO Box 532389
Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389

Will you please rush me your GARVEY FOR SENATE Campaign R.S.V.P. in the next 48 hours to help defeat Adam Schiff in November? …a California Senate seat that is open for the first time since 1992… …a Senate seat in a blue state that is winnable for the first time in a long time, precisely because the people of this state are every day seeing their quality of life diminish as a direct result of the radical leftwing policies enacted by the Democrats during the last three decades… …and a Senate seat that is pivotal to retaking the U.S. Senate and therefore pivotal to America's future. I won't sugarcoat it. This is the single most difficult race in America. I can't do it without you. That's why I am counting on you to rush in your GARVEY FOR SENATE campaign R.S.V.P. of $35 today. Here's the thing. As it now stands, 100% of Californians are being forced to live with: Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie… prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. That's what led me to enter this race. And that's why I'm urging you to join me by rushing me your GARVEY FOR SENATE Campaign R.S.V.P. without delay. I get up every day and ask God to give me the strength to make a difference in people's lives. This really gets to heart of why I'm running… You see, the same dream and the same opportunity I was given is fading. It's fading all across America. But it's fading at an even faster pace right here in California. I pray you'll stand with me today. With deepest appreciation, Steve Garvey #6 P.S. If you agree we cannot afford to find out whether the American Dream is down to its final inning, its final out, or its final strike and are ready to turn back the clock on the decline please rush your R.S.V.P. of $35 today. Fellow American,Joe Biden is colluding with the Chinese communist run World Health Organization to sell out American Sovereignty.**[**I need your help today to put a stop to it.**](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyM0M2OqyAYxvGrwZ3m5QXxuHBhY-3m2Jw0J5klQYGWBMQgbTN3P-l87Gf7Xzz55Xmb5KScd-v1rILprE8y7XLWUgW1lGrJLq4SAXkJrEQuaaE7oK3mvDAdbSjFRtSAxa2jVuFsuFCIAhoQKHC2DDXULWMNtIXrXjvAkEPLBbSVsYLP9R_BuKYILRIOypuUK5uM0TGoVXs3m5Tfk9liytUSQ-G7W87bTlhPcCQ4vpxfzCqZx6NaIsERbVujsBSFosCoIGy85yD3eE-LIWw4DKfycjwTFK8cjHb3QNhwnL7LosKm3HUlbPgxy8Nwkv3U_5d7jtvzFuXleJb_-nL8eylSp7en897toiEcrkE5_6nNv3j0IwAA__9eBHdP)** Under Biden’s watch, the W.H.O. is rushing to finalize new amendments to their dystopian “International Health Regulations” and the “Pandemic Preparedness Agreement.”These amendments are nothing more than a shady power grab that lets a group of C.C.P affiliated, unelected, globalist bureaucrats control you and your medical decisions!Don’t be fooled, the W.H.O. isn’t about protecting you... ...it’s about dictating the whole world's response to anything and everything the Left deems a “health emergency.” Even the food you eat, “gun violence,” and “climate change.” And AMAC Action will not stand for it! We’re organizing a massive _Call to Action Petition campaign_ to make it clear to Joe Biden and the U.S Senate that America’s seniors will NOT let the W.H.O. control us.But a movement like this is no small undertaking... **[That’s why I’m asking you to stand with AMAC Action today!](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyM0M2OqyAYxvGrwZ3m5QXxuHBhY-3m2Jw0J5klQYGWBMQgbTN3P-l87Gf7Xzz55Xmb5KScd-v1rILprE8y7XLWUgW1lGrJLq4SAXkJrEQuaaE7oK3mvDAdbSjFRtSAxa2jVuFsuFCIAhoQKHC2DDXULWMNtIXrXjvAkEPLBbSVsYLP9R_BuKYILRIOypuUK5uM0TGoVXs3m5Tfk9liytUSQ-G7W87bTlhPcCQ4vpxfzCqZx6NaIsERbVujsBSFosCoIGy85yD3eE-LIWw4DKfycjwTFK8cjHb3QNhwnL7LosKm3HUlbPgxy8Nwkv3U_5d7jtvzFuXleJb_-nL8eylSp7en897toiEcrkE5_6nNv3j0IwAA__9eBHdP)** In case we haven’t met yet, my name is Bob Carlstrom. I’m a fellow Senior, and I’m the President of AMAC Action. If you’ve heard of AMAC Action, you know that “AMAC” stands for the Association of Mature American Citizens. And “Action” is what we’re known for.When it comes to standing up for the rights of Conservative Seniors like you, no other advocacy group in the nation is more influential than AMAC Action. AMAC Action is a force to be reckoned with in Washington. With 82 chapters, 348 delegates, and now more than 2 MILLION AMAC members and rapidly growing -- we’re fighting for YOU.Our “feet on the street” advocates contact Members of Congress and state legislators on your behalf. And over 362,000 AMAC advocates (and counting!) have sent over a million messages to Congress, state legislatures, and regulatory agencies like the FTC, HHS, and CMS to make sure the voice of Conservative Seniors is heard on key issues.Long story short, when we speak, congress listens.And when you speak, WE LISTEN.So, Friend, let me ask you:Do you think that a group of China aligned, unelected, globalist, bureaucrats should be controlling your personal health decisions? Even deciding what you can’t eat and which vaccines you have to take? **[If you say “NO!” then please join with us today and make a generous donation of any amount to help AMAC Action put an end to the globalist madness once and for all!](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyM0M2OqyAYxvGrwZ3m5QXxuHBhY-3m2Jw0J5klQYGWBMQgbTN3P-l87Gf7Xzz55Xmb5KScd-v1rILprE8y7XLWUgW1lGrJLq4SAXkJrEQuaaE7oK3mvDAdbSjFRtSAxa2jVuFsuFCIAhoQKHC2DDXULWMNtIXrXjvAkEPLBbSVsYLP9R_BuKYILRIOypuUK5uM0TGoVXs3m5Tfk9liytUSQ-G7W87bTlhPcCQ4vpxfzCqZx6NaIsERbVujsBSFosCoIGy85yD3eE-LIWw4DKfycjwTFK8cjHb3QNhwnL7LosKm3HUlbPgxy8Nwkv3U_5d7jtvzFuXleJb_-nL8eylSp7en897toiEcrkE5_6nNv3j0IwAA__9eBHdP)** Thank you in advance for your support.For Freedom,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**_A MEMO PREPARED BY RUDY GIULIANI, FORMER ATTORNEY TO PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP_**
---
Friend,
---
There's no other way to say this... **You may truly be my only hope.**
---
**_The Biden Regime is sending a top ally of President Trump to PRISON!_**
---
The Deep State is hellbent on indicting, arresting, bankrupting, and imprisoning President Trump and his top allies for daring to challenge the corrupt forces that have hijacked our once Free Republic.
---
**_And as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from impeachment, I am at the top of their list._**
---
During these dark times in Biden's America, there is nowhere else to turn but __you__ , Friend.
---
We are not just battling for my own freedom and justice. This is about upholding the rights of every citizen who dares to challenge the status quo. If we lose this fight, we lose our Republic.

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

| | | Let me tell you why your support is so important. The race to defeat Ted Cruz doesn't just concern Texans – it concerns the future of our democracy. Our country can't handle six more years of Ted Cruz, his attacks on reproductive freedoms, his dismantling of our fundamental voting rights, and his endless self-centered antics. He's proven time and time again that his only loyalty is to himself, not the people he's supposed to represent. It's time to send him packing. Not only because Texans deserve so much better – but because if Colin wins, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to retain control of the Senate, which is our last line of defense against the far right. Colin can win this – Cruz won by just 2.6% of the vote in 2018. Election experts know it, and recent polling numbers show them TIED. But he'll need a massive movement of grassroots supporters behind him to help him reach voters, pull ahead, and win. [That starts today with you, Peter. Colin needs to raise $65,000 by midnight tonight so that he can stay on track to reach enough voters and win in November. That's why I'm personally asking: Will you donate $10 right now to power Colin and Blue Amp Action's campaign to victory and defeat Ted Cruz? With your help, we can finally give Texans the leadership they deserve and protect the future of our democracy.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28682ed0-e1ef-4fa2-bf19-cb5cc6c2a346/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | | Peter, it's Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and | | | | | | | | Let me tell you why your support is so important. The race to defeat Ted Cruz doesn't just concern Texans – it concerns the future of our democracy. Our country can't handle six more years of Ted Cruz, his attacks on reproductive freedoms, his dismantling of our fundamental voting rights, and his endless self-centered antics. He's proven time and time again that his only loyalty is to himself, not the people he's supposed to represent. It's time to send him packing. Not only because Texans deserve so much better – but because if Colin wins, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to retain control of the Senate, which is our last line of defense against the far right. Colin can win this – Cruz won by just 2.6% of the vote in 2018. Election experts know it, and recent polling numbers show them TIED. But he'll need a massive movement of grassroots supporters behind him to help him reach voters, pull ahead, and win. | | | | | | Thank you, Chuck Schumer | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=691448cc76df4e62a14345bf7397e1a3&_e=oiusGJfb4KL2_Wa1dwpBQxlluCswRYWAKUidtV6AJ6SFr7A9j_Oq5KjIu5Azhb1ZhHgVOc9SzDuMtmPHh9ve1539XK6bTgIcd1hQphaLmgzy5VbYaqDl1lc6uVJ_1znt3r9FAarlQ22PoSctNg-lEUB8fckuN1K7yMJd2VfIz5W4SKdfVRlvFYUopSSvy07Fv1lq8dVRVgr34uyomlrc9w9ctzKkpDsot2smkSLKF7wei2ZM0TM84StdLmfgdDNp1PC7cQzcY6SX9jA40-KXsMzeG3fRGJusfo4XOeagG7U6DAeOdD6UXwU4Sdk79_RQ0SQVL4tDkwYwWOxnZXhxNG6mjJK1kefF4M5-7RD3oED8n0yd0ZQk1FMtBhFaMZGhF-ob9etIxDKRtHtHIA9QUQ%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Do this one thing to stand for life today
body:
Science and research tells us that life begins at the moment of conception.

|
---
| | From the Desk of Marjorie Dannenfelser Hello, In our fast-paced world, it's easy to lose sight of fundamental principles, especially when it comes to complex issues. Rather than trying to understand or get involved, so often I find it's easier for people to turn a blind eye. Recently, I feel like the culture in our country has forgotten - or ignored - the most basic lessons. I've felt a growing concern about how our society perceives and values life, particularly when it comes to the development of human life. Science and research tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. We know exactly when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, can wiggle their toes, and even hear their mother's voice. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are treated as though they are not alive or even human in our society. **After speaking to the experts and talking to mothers for over 30 years as a pro-life activist, I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bbb2df9518314a64b1ae8fa9eb1711e6&_e=kOG5xJ5rpq91xlQcUNpIUl2eQ8-RL4uTQ1kSVJfQDeayL-u30AtZ_k9-EtxDNUoBZ4I5HRK5YjapSawETBfrISghtUYvMZiRhi87mvZiOuDQ7aghC2CYlFJpbOjb6zCr0Q1y-gMenRw8sP_cMKz6BjiLmJjigE3KYpab2dEdxuSdKGfsBlgwJnroHSpgTR8ZvHekQ4diUc48YdYmLLL7oyDOV0HeumAGu5_QkeXBNyvsXhqg-B3s2LEjUqCU_R-_hoQ15noWnKTzdViM8PLrl6ILDMZ-uB5AeiaupwoQJX6L79EtDIifJGa00vVCMnStmWz4zzmcSTaJ0xKDu7Gq2QFRoJJacUBfcTxwBBc6-oVyehBmhynw1jjeja6OLhZrPYNAhKZAcJDBX0nWwZTyFt4k-VOzKsm-zNXiaa1-bXQ%3D)
_Marjorie Dannenfelser
President SBA Pro-Life America_ Our Creator has given us life as a precious gift. No person is disposable, and every life has value because we are made in His image. I believe that everyone deserves life, despite what our society, schools, or government say. I believe that together we can make a difference in our culture that has drifted off course. I believe we can bring dignity and a voice to the voiceless. I also strongly believe I'm not alone in my convictions. I believe that you believe this too. SBA Pro-Life America works everyday to bring the truth about abortion to light and shine a ray of hope into our culture. We want to give the next generation of Americans a bright future. But this future will require commitment from people like you. The first step we must all take is clearly stating what we believe and what we're willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. Will you join me and be a voice for the voiceless? Will you stand up for those that cannot do it for themselves? I've created a pro-life pledge and I'd love your support. You can join over 1 million pro-life supporters - people like you - that want to see the unborn protected, valued, and cherished. [https://action.sbaprolife.org/stand-for-life-with-me](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bbb2df9518314a64b1ae8fa9eb1711e6&_e=kOG5xJ5rpq91xlQcUNpIUl2eQ8-RL4uTQ1kSVJfQDeayL-u30AtZ_k9-EtxDNUoBZ4I5HRK5YjapSawETBfrISghtUYvMZiRhi87mvZiOuDQ7aghC2CYlFJpbOjb6zCr0Q1y-gMenRw8sP_cMKz6BjiLmJjigE3KYpab2dEdxuSdKGfsBlgwJnroHSpgTR8ZvHekQ4diUc48YdYmLLL7oyDOV0HeumAGu5_QkeXBNyvsXhqg-B3s2LEjUqCU_R-_s17BG8O_Bq-tAVscUH3BN9nvr8bFy2rmv50Ce6_oEoJ5lxlbVE7RPxhecf1nqAipPgu52OqVf53XgzrlD2guTXWbxTHsYy-vbthZwUKNe62HGu7VIYjIr7HOpbSNqwJLwO_J_9dGPdv7jHAFGzXQULgHw14CSGgWEeQrnxM7hxQ%3D) For Life,
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America
---

Reclaiming American Freedom

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Do this one thing to stand for life today
body:
Science and research tells us that life begins at the moment of conception.

|
---
| | From the Desk of Marjorie Dannenfelser Hello, In our fast-paced world, it's easy to lose sight of fundamental principles, especially when it comes to complex issues. Rather than trying to understand or get involved, so often I find it's easier for people to turn a blind eye. Recently, I feel like the culture in our country has forgotten - or ignored - the most basic lessons. I've felt a growing concern about how our society perceives and values life, particularly when it comes to the development of human life. Science and research tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. We know exactly when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, can wiggle their toes, and even hear their mother's voice. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are treated as though they are not alive or even human in our society. **After speaking to the experts and talking to mothers for over 30 years as a pro-life activist, I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c627b7c233249f885b80c89ec29bf39&_e=Eqqq4yVh1HtlIvUmtIRfDx0QZHLXzZmtbawI0WXsK9U4-Bk3bEx2sqgsl9kVOwz_UFJIkwZdrFHTnrgpv3IBSynx6f8c5elONQV6SrEcXlFcOmAS6YHuqeNpEGXMHcfi1SkckpToKa9YioDquvyRUiDakbgAF8xoUHJvrzIo5Dn6EsUlSiIpdBt8Kwuzictfd5kLb6Rn8qUxtQIFrTUShvVcxGM_6Lx56rntWwl7U5fFPE4_O8yGqTBrxbGt4MTKAI72C6VwwHQBhprzFDqfzXgGVMX_lmWjx8DrQz_lUTCYTTJf8KcrK5DP_mod9MOluKytd1DvqsxlQNecdDuyZhNkj2YL-w2FfWcR48SasXLWr_Acs4xskOZNHRp4v0auaiSfJ5sqL8_Bd4_t0wE6-DgVz5wURv9PHm7PtpiuE_0%3D)
_Marjorie Dannenfelser
President SBA Pro-Life America_ Our Creator has given us life as a precious gift. No person is disposable, and every life has value because we are made in His image. I believe that everyone deserves life, despite what our society, schools, or government say. I believe that together we can make a difference in our culture that has drifted off course. I believe we can bring dignity and a voice to the voiceless. I also strongly believe I'm not alone in my convictions. I believe that you believe this too. SBA Pro-Life America works everyday to bring the truth about abortion to light and shine a ray of hope into our culture. We want to give the next generation of Americans a bright future. But this future will require commitment from people like you. The first step we must all take is clearly stating what we believe and what we're willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. Will you join me and be a voice for the voiceless? Will you stand up for those that cannot do it for themselves? I've created a pro-life pledge and I'd love your support. You can join over 1 million pro-life supporters - people like you - that want to see the unborn protected, valued, and cherished. [https://action.sbaprolife.org/stand-for-life-with-me](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c627b7c233249f885b80c89ec29bf39&_e=Eqqq4yVh1HtlIvUmtIRfDx0QZHLXzZmtbawI0WXsK9U4-Bk3bEx2sqgsl9kVOwz_UFJIkwZdrFHTnrgpv3IBSynx6f8c5elONQV6SrEcXlFcOmAS6YHuqeNpEGXMHcfi1SkckpToKa9YioDquvyRUiDakbgAF8xoUHJvrzIo5Dn6EsUlSiIpdBt8Kwuzictfd5kLb6Rn8qUxtQIFrTUShvVcxGM_6Lx56rntWwl7U5fFPE4_O8yGqTBrxbGt4MTKAjN3ZvfqSJbI8nIBQvIa2AxRUwoluklFLBGFREM5NxjeKWWLTR_C1ADt9QAFCkh34pB9Wa_xjTKD2M4-BWRqCtydv4RZWOiR-DUSiXT7Qdg9151YhIV73-ANKNgUgYLgOykrzUq-35w7_u5YZ2ZVk5YAKdDv3_s82h7Tmyu3U_Q%3D) For Life,
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America
---
---
| |
---
---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: “...Sentenced to prison”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Our once Free Republic is DEAD...

| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a56edbb791d34886b20d483741481179&_e=gTt3yZKi22TRaNG97DoqPsS7O-8BnpRGFQqTSxouIy_1O_kX_DbWMo6XjxZsZSONTjQspWqRrdzxpllYf80qSRVDNKcwkI-wLp4pB8yOGDKVE7syqsHROwAnQZckH1cfOFll2R0a8ttYWUQuS5WvZJh6vdNQ4uwojDHDGNGYBDfU5FHrmEKESyuco9r0hL8raDaxwdldaG360GdgCKIxSiERKw-35A6OVjFG7h2AcMGZthz7AHGCMhEPxxBRdbj9DNjjCCvu9FvNCc2XQdPi3nuv4L83uQPgEEB-bmH3_GJ27pRV7BXxkFCzQW00L8QVJNHNjrnktBw0hDz6bRyfPkzzhGe3bvcA2Ug4fPDm7Gyp8Kpk-T6F061JGQflMMyP4SoQSnGsVac4QKtws9l3RA%3D%3D)
---
**_A MEMO PREPARED BY RUDY GIULIANI, FORMER ATTORNEY TO PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP_**
---
Friend,
---
There's no other way to say this... **You may truly be my only hope.**
---
**_The Biden Regime is sending a top ally of President Trump to PRISON!_**
---
The Deep State is hellbent on indicting, arresting, bankrupting, and imprisoning President Trump and his top allies for daring to challenge the corrupt forces that have hijacked our once Free Republic.
---
**_And as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from impeachment, I am at the top of their list._**
---
During these dark times in Biden's America, there is nowhere else to turn but __you__ , Friend.
---

name: Team Kennedy
subject: This will be a game-changer!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Already, Team Kennedy's campaign is historic.

|
---
| | | **[Already, Team Kennedy's campaign is historic.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kennedys_pick_3_24_24_rs_nd3&n=1)
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kennedys_pick_3_24_24_rs_nd3&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Team Kennedy is ready to announce Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s Vice Presidential pick on March 26, in Oakland, California. This announcement will be a game-changer.
Already, Team Kennedy's campaign is historic. With the highest favorability polling of any candidate for President, Kennedy is also leading among voters under 35 and independents.
_And remember, those independents now represent 52% of the voting public, because people are fed up with the two-party system!_
Now, Kennedy is ready to announce a candidate who supports American values, medical freedom, government transparency, opposes endless wars, and champions policies that grow the Middle Class, including increasing homeownership among younger people.
Team Kennedy is now on the ballot in 5 states, and with the running mate announcement, we will proceed with collecting more than 1 million signatures nationwide, at a cost of almost $15 million.
Right now, almost all of the campaign budget is devoted to achieving ballot access in all 50 states and the District of Columbia. Other candidates don’t have to do this, but we do, we can, and we will – with your help!
Kennedy needs your help now, during this crucial ballot access window. [Please make an urgent contribution now while there is still time. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kennedys_pick_3_24_24_rs_nd3&n=3)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kennedys_pick_3_24_24_rs_nd3&n=7)
[CONTRIBUTE $240](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kennedys_pick_3_24_24_rs_nd3&n=8)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kennedys_pick_3_24_24_rs_nd3&n=9)
Team Kennedy

body:
Our once Free Republic is DEAD...

| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b10e38c12e24029aaf33d98d71bba13&_e=YokIeGei0rcC3WU0JxiD3EbZxLXSl4XbAYIrJIduwZ9nvU1KflA1tqC9L8-H7KVrYCblXxTb9e_Mxhx0QbBmVLJSRxm9hoXeq34UNl3VwmP6dz9OffMXVddXhj-R47hqyGLdjzKYCHYOddN7E8BxBlqsjADDVDauvpEWnni4B4cjHuymLvguh1PqwjNA06O97WrXsDU-BcMq3pRZLXyElRdYcaZFaQquVt5XlhTTDJqEMFS4K4FELo-Odob2XGXmtgstJVYAWpWb2cgtOCodx9IwW34IgXMZY4Hu9S21tYYwVctZHrMeVBoy5L0hcmhnlXrGH27oPIX18xc1o6uoI9M5zpjlNuxC8wdSmH8Tjn0-ae2-K1KwqVz57FZQqQdYbqdQIaX6VyHEnKNsnsJwPg%3D%3D)
---
**_A MEMO PREPARED BY RUDY GIULIANI, FORMER ATTORNEY TO PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP_**
---
Friend,
---
There's no other way to say this... **You may truly be my only hope.**
---
**_The Biden Regime is sending a top ally of President Trump to PRISON!_**
---
The Deep State is hellbent on indicting, arresting, bankrupting, and imprisoning President Trump and his top allies for daring to challenge the corrupt forces that have hijacked our once Free Republic.
---
**_And as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from impeachment, I am at the top of their list._**
---
During these dark times in Biden's America, there is nowhere else to turn but __you__ , Friend.
---
We are not just battling for my own freedom and justice. This is about upholding the rights of every citizen who dares to challenge the status quo. If we lose this fight, we lose our Republic.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust - the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund - to help me fight for my freedom and justice as the Deep State tries to JAIL me for the rest of my life.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b10e38c12e24029aaf33d98d71bba13&_e=YokIeGei0rcC3WU0JxiD3EbZxLXSl4XbAYIrJIduwZ9nvU1KflA1tqC9L8-H7KVrYCblXxTb9e_Mxhx0QbBmVLJSRxm9hoXeq34UNl3VwmP6dz9OffMXVddXhj-R47hqyGLdjzKYCHYOddN7E8BxBlqsjADDVDauvpEWnni4B4cjHuymLvguh1PqwjNA06O97WrXsDU-BcMq3pRZLXyElRdYcaZFaQquVt5XlhTTDJqEMFS4K4FELo-Odob2XGXmT6tlSi9DCoGePxaLafYCWFwgT2dfDo0JTApYWj1UfDgnU4kxAl7Xvq20SwsCH2FCVplCklwF5lvvSBUgvjSe9qRmyCDJCRixR66zNLR1oIxlC3LLNBmUsuLWHHf45Mo-1IJV8O0kR65UBOvPLKqtaw%3D%3D)

**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment shortly after Joe Biden seized control of the White House, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**
---
But no one had any idea how much worse it was going to get...
---
_The ruling regime is attempting to turn its leading opponent and his allies into political prisoners to remain in power forever._
---
Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what's happened to the greatest and freest nation in history.
---
_But just like President Trump, I 'm not giving up on America._
---
I didn't give up when my home was raided or when I was wrongfully arrested and had my MUGSHOT taken in Fulton County - _and there 's no way I'm backing down now._
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b10e38c12e24029aaf33d98d71bba13&_e=YokIeGei0rcC3WU0JxiD3EbZxLXSl4XbAYIrJIduwZ9nvU1KflA1tqC9L8-H7KVrYCblXxTb9e_Mxhx0QbBmVLJSRxm9hoXeq34UNl3VwmP6dz9OffMXVddXhj-R47hqyGLdjzKYCHYOddN7E8BxBlqsjADDVDauvpEWnni4B4cjHuymLvguh1PqwjNA06O97WrXsDU-BcMq3pRZLXyElRdYcaZFaQquVt5XlhTTDJqEMFS4K4FELo-Odob2XGXm-G6RxvJhZziUM63VkDDixNdcjhc8kiPn_wQDo5b6Q2TqiIdFUx3XUcs8WfEg-P8_F7ux0rjj-gIpsOWuST8ypdriZXyRE0ESBhvSyMUWmfwn3l44KbRqYvfeiaWWqJtwA7d9CAySkWaDR8QPTRUwxw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Our once Free Republic is DEAD... | A MEMO PREPARED BY RUDY GIULIANI, FORMER ATTORNEY TO PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP Friend, There's no other way to say this... You may truly be my only hope. The Biden Regime is sending a top ally of President Trump to PRISON! The Deep State is hellbent on indicting, arresting, bankrupting, and imprisoning President Trump and his top allies for daring to challenge the corrupt forces that have hijacked our once Free Republic. And as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from impeachment, I am at the top of their list. During these dark times in Biden's America, there is nowhere else to turn but you , Friend. We are not just battling for my own freedom and justice. This is about upholding the rights of every citizen who dares to challenge the status quo. If we lose this fight, we lose our Republic. When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment shortly after Joe Biden seized control of the White House, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy. But no one had any idea how much worse it was going to get... The ruling regime is attempting to turn its leading opponent and his allies into political prisoners to remain in power forever. Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what's happened to the greatest and freest nation in history. But just like President Trump, I 'm not giving up on America. I didn't give up when my home was raided or when I was wrongfully arrested and had my MUGSHOT taken in Fulton County - and there 's no way I'm backing down now. But I humbly admit I cannot win this fight all on my own. I'm counting on generous patriots like YOU to defend me at this pivotal moment. Thank you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

I'll tell you what I said on my show:

**MARSHA BLACKBURN - THE FABULOUS SENATOR FROM TENNESSEE - IS THE REAL DEAL, PEOPLE!**

She's a leader of our MAGA movement. She's a tough-as-nails Conservative. And she's a wall standing in the way of Joe Biden's radical agenda.

She's also up for re-election in November. Normally, she would soar through the finish line since she's a top ally of President Trump... but unfortunately, we have a problem.

Chuck Schumer recruited a power-hungry, showboating socialist in a desperate attempt to destroy any opposition to his agenda and defeat Marsha.

In fact, Marsha's opponent just joined forces with Hollywood elite types to turbocharge her negative campaign to flip Tennessee.

Let me say this in no uncertain terms:

_If this radical socialist manages to flip Tennessee, our path to winning back the Senate Majority will COMPLETELY VANISH. _

_**[So, with all that being said, I respectfully ask you for the FIRST TIME to donate right now to Marsha Blackburn's re-election campaign.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8984bc435f14428e9aebf3a273002ccc&_e=Ao4v446j1KdbkzA1kip_EG1Bkp7kJxtbpIgG0fWwWVmcmkA21gffD_WG9xKS0bw38K01FYDy2kQ6gZGwImB56SNdFkkwh6qHCbX-2vVIlMcWk82qe9HACossTSzqxqjSyttmNij8saEp4yyKsjookPkenrojpKIBf3sI-52mwtr2t0hAlQeC0CdJBszyLeCMxA2qfwrEH0DBEchw6EeU8gRtxRQDVA0OHpCA_3VWhSOWhpfEZqu-urZa4xnvEEnHTDp_CZj9E0uFxXQH004kiqzIfaSe6xXxys4eesLnfZakmJJ9cpBfQ5nL4ATfDmWt5Db_ly34j5Nj7cE8ekjQe7LO-s80J3ODnE2hvf13b1OmWxULM2UKvnLTBUk9ffSRexdEbroA_pYFM5TsnlZRdQreH_YOleXzo9pbRC7a6IM26AGfF1Noyv8TIPri7u2y_CalMJpnV87PQ6g_CB9-5w%3D%3D "So, with all that being said, I respectfully ask you for the FIRST TIME to donate right now to Marsha Blackburn’s re-election campaign.")**_

| | | [PLEASE JOIN ME: DONATE NOW](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8984bc435f14428e9aebf3a273002ccc&_e=Ao4v446j1KdbkzA1kip_EG1Bkp7kJxtbpIgG0fWwWVmcmkA21gffD_WG9xKS0bw38K01FYDy2kQ6gZGwImB56SNdFkkwh6qHCbX-2vVIlMcWk82qe9HACossTSzqxqjSyttmNij8saEp4yyKsjookPkenrojpKIBf3sI-52mwtr2t0hAlQeC0CdJBszyLeCMxA2qfwrEH0DBEchw6EeU8gRtxRQDVA0OHpCA_3VWhSOWhpfEZqu-urZa4xnvEEnHTDp_CZj9E0uFxXQH004kiqzIfaSe6xXxys4eesLnfZaHsbfqFnbv-LlkDsdAD_yg8Woop4PFqSffgh7CtowQVe4amaC9OxhBmh5Q1V9WYBr82gISJEmCB54olOgWuPTuaUu3e5cvfCeRIxSVkvH9VpJwgjQiornaAVn3lE9I0FArM-Kz7dQxpL7SXX5l6hQzEhfbLKWCvIzTg45FSLz4Tw%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN ME: DONATE NOW")

I don't send these types of emails very often.

If you're like me, these types of political emails kind of drive you crazy. But this is no ordinary request.

**Marsha Blackburn is exactly the kind of strong, patriotic conservative President Trump needs in the U.S. Senate. **

No surprise here, but Marsha's socialist opponent turned to big liberal names to help bankroll her campaign. Luckily, we have you on our side. If just 30% respond to my email, Marsha's socialist opponent will have no shot at EVER flipping this key Senate seat.

But first, I need your help right now. Please. I'm personally asking for your help.

_**[So, I hope that's enough to convince you. If it's not, I fear we could lose Tennessee - and the ENTIRE U.S. Senate along with it.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8984bc435f14428e9aebf3a273002ccc&_e=Ao4v446j1KdbkzA1kip_EG1Bkp7kJxtbpIgG0fWwWVmcmkA21gffD_WG9xKS0bw38K01FYDy2kQ6gZGwImB56SNdFkkwh6qHCbX-2vVIlMcWk82qe9HACossTSzqxqjSyttmNij8saEp4yyKsjookPkenrojpKIBf3sI-52mwtr2t0hAlQeC0CdJBszyLeCMxA2qfwrEH0DBEchw6EeU8gRtxRQDVA0OHpCA_3VWhSOWhpfEZqu-urZa4xnvEEnHTDp_CZj9E0uFxXQH004kiqzIfaSe6xXxys4eesLnfZa8tZBs4_bG8QsY_PgxUcx7KB9z4UlxhsN4vlVOH9ydYobi7l1l45e6cd4imJDu3SnH6EnU1ZEROuWl23-onYN4e0xymyJZ25loo2Zbv_iIquGvYJl18f-OCnGz2f__cHOmxG_c3BTN06ixt7VuVurY7Fo4Pbvd4PfRLRVVRAMmpw%3D%3D "So, I hope that’s enough to convince you. If it’s not, I fear we could lose Tennessee – and the ENTIRE U.S. Senate along with it.")**_

For America,
Kimberly Guilfoyle

# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1253%2E135344%2EzImwsU)

Friend --
When you decide to run statewide for the first time, introducing yourself to new voters who you have never met or represented is essential.
We use donations to fund campaign ads, digital ads, office space and staff in every corner of the state and in critical "Get Out the Vote" efforts to make sure our supporters cast their ballots.
No campaign -- no matter how big or small -- can win in a vacuum. And that takes resources.
According to the American National Election Studies survey conducted after the 2020 election, only 16% of Americans made a donation to an individual candidate running for office.
That's a small percentage of Americans who are contributing to big outcomes that impact everyone else.
Some give to support a candidate. Others give because they oppose a candidate. Some have particular issues they’re passionate about -- like abortion rights, voting rights, and combating corporate money in politics. And others say they give to "make their voice heard in our political system."
Today, I am asking you do the thing only a small number of Americans do, but will have a huge impact on our race, and by extension control of the Senate and even the White House:
[**Can you please use this link to contribute $3 to my campaign for United States Senate in Michigan before our FEC deadline ends? It may feel like a small and simple act, but it will go a long way toward making sure we win.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar24.YRUw2h&refcode=em240324-1-700&t=2&akid=1253%2E135344%2EzImwsU)**

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: Deadly Negligence at the County Prison | "Trump Haters Aren't Serious" + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | | Good morning, and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=362de3025e&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
### **1.[Former prison guard says inmates in alleged cellmate murder were never supposed to be housed together](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=90b93fd94d&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Todd Shepherd_
“According to the Delaware County District Attorney’s office, Shad Boccella strangled and killed Eliott Funkhouser in a shared prison cell at Delaware County’s George W. Hill Correctional Facility on April 22, 2022. Media [reports](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6423258b9f&e=b7b3eddce2) said Boccella was wearing Funkhouser’s shoes as he was escorted out of the cell after Funkhouser’s dead body was discovered.

“But a correctional officer who was working that cell block the day the two men were put together says Funkhouser’s death should never have happened, that both of the men were too dangerous to be in a cell with another inmate, yet those concerns were ignored — with deadly consequences.”
**Why It Matters.** “Funkhouser’s death in April was closely followed by two suicides at the GWHCF that June. The families of both suicide victims say they have lingering questions and resentments about how events unfolded — including both families saying they weren’t contacted until one or two days after the incident.

“In all, the GWHCF would see five deaths in 2022, and would repeat that tally in 2023.”

**Quotable.** “On first shift I got a phone call from the Classification [Officer] Mike Moore stating that he was sending the guy [Funkhouser] from Unit 8 to be a ‘House alone/Rec alone’ on [Unit] 10. My exact words to him were, ‘I have no room on 10A because I’m full,’” former Correctional Officer Norman Passarella told _Broad + Liberty_ in an exclusive interview.

[C](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=434a4e092c&e=b7b3eddce2)[ontinue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6652d50cbe&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Trump-haters are not serious](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3d6a6c339f&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Andy Bloom_

“Those of you who think that Donald Trump is going to end American democracy, worse than Hitler and everything else you’ve thrown at him, I can’t take you seriously anymore.

For all the hysteria, handwringing, caterwauling, catastrophizing, and doomsaying, you will be responsible for handing the keys to the White House back to Trump.

Trump-haters are doing everything but the one thing that could keep him from winning the election.”

**Why It Matters**. “Because of his infirmity, Biden has done fewer press conferences than any president since the beginning of the television era. Passing on a pre-Super Bowl interview sent a message. Biden’s handlers realize that putting him in front of people is a gamble, as he proved in his press conference disputing Hur’s assertion.

“Telling voters that Biden is a dynamo behind closed doors doesn’t match the reality of the shuffling, frequently confused president they see who often utters unintelligible passages.

“Go ahead, continue to live in denial. You can hope Biden will become more lucid on the campaign trail between now and Election Day.

“But it’s not what voters see, it’s what they experience.”

**Quotable**. “Trump has impossibly high negative approval ratings. Yet Biden’s are even higher. Go ahead and spend hundreds of millions of dollars on negative advertising. Maybe it raises Trump’s negative scores by a few points, but not many because everybody knows who and what Donald Trump is.”

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=854e13e295&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|

* **[Introducing the Kitchen Table Politics Podcast](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=adfc6aff35&e=b7b3eddce2)**

|

* **[Liv DeMarco: Suburban women are being displaced from the pro-life movement](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b7043db9ef&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: South Philly’s drug addicts, aggressive homeless and assorted shady characters](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4dfb1b28d9&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
| Sometimes, numbers are so big that its hard to wrap our heads around them. But we’re going to be hearing a lot about the $7.3 trillion in spending that Joe Biden is proposing during this election year. As [Daniel Henninger wrote for the _Wall Street Journal_ this week](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=98eedd84bb&e=b7b3eddce2), that massive spending — more than $22,000 per American — is wildly out of step with the times and the country’s needs.************

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week. | | | | | | | Good morning, and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. and get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | 1. By Todd Shepherd “According to the Delaware County District Attorney’s office, Shad Boccella strangled and killed Eliott Funkhouser in a shared prison cell at Delaware County’s George W. Hill Correctional Facility on April 22, 2022. Media said Boccella was wearing Funkhouser’s shoes as he was escorted out of the cell after Funkhouser’s dead body was discovered. “But a correctional officer who was working that cell block the day the two men were put together says Funkhouser’s death should never have happened, that both of the men were too dangerous to be in a cell with another inmate, yet those concerns were ignored — with deadly consequences.” Why It Matters. “Funkhouser’s death in April was closely followed by two suicides at the GWHCF that June. The families of both suicide victims say they have lingering questions and resentments about how events unfolded — including both families saying they weren’t contacted until one or two days after the incident. “In all, the GWHCF would see five deaths in 2022, and would repeat that tally in 2023.” Quotable. “On first shift I got a phone call from the Classification [Officer] Mike Moore stating that he was sending the guy [Funkhouser] from Unit 8 to be a ‘House alone/Rec alone’ on [Unit] 10. My exact words to him were, ‘I have no room on 10A because I’m full,’” former Correctional Officer Norman Passarella told Broad + Liberty in an exclusive interview. | | 2. By Andy Bloom “Those of you who think that Donald Trump is going to end American democracy, worse than Hitler and everything else you’ve thrown at him, I can’t take you seriously anymore. For all the hysteria, handwringing, caterwauling, catastrophizing, and doomsaying, you will be responsible for handing the keys to the White House back to Trump. Trump-haters are doing everything but the one thing that could keep him from winning the election.” Why It Matters. “Because of his infirmity, Biden has done fewer press conferences than any president since the beginning of the television era. Passing on a pre-Super Bowl interview sent a message. Biden’s handlers realize that putting him in front of people is a gamble, as he proved in his press conference disputing Hur’s assertion. “Telling voters that Biden is a dynamo behind closed doors doesn’t match the reality of the shuffling, frequently confused president they see who often utters unintelligible passages. “Go ahead, continue to live in denial. You can hope Biden will become more lucid on the campaign trail between now and Election Day. “But it’s not what voters see, it’s what they experience.” Quotable. “Trump has impossibly high negative approval ratings. Yet Biden’s are even higher. Go ahead and spend hundreds of millions of dollars on negative advertising. Maybe it raises Trump’s negative scores by a few points, but not many because everybody knows who and what Donald Trump is.” | | 3\. Podcasts! | | 4\. Lightning Round | | What We’re Reading... | Sometimes, numbers are so big that its hard to wrap our heads around them. But we’re going to be hearing a lot about the $7.3 trillion in spending that Joe Biden is proposing during this election year. As , that massive spending — more than $22,000 per American — is wildly out of step with the times and the country’s needs.******** | | Broad + Liberty is funded exclusively by readers like you. Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com. As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you. With gratitude, — The Editors at Broad + Liberty | | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved. You're getting Broad + Liberty updates due to your interest in our site -- and stories for free thinkers in the Philly region and beyond. Friend,

**There is no enemy of the U.S.A. Ilhan Omar won’t support.**

For several years, Americans have been made aware of the national security threat that TikTok poses to our country.

**China owns the social media app, and they are using and selling off personal data collected from over 150 million Americans.**

The current bill being put forth in Congress would ban TikTok from app stores and internet browsers in the United States unless the Chinese company ByteDance sells it altogether.

This is a no-brainer. In the digital age, we need to eliminate all threats to America’s security.

**Ilhan Omar knows this, but she doesn’t care.

She hates this country and everything it stands for.**

****Minnesota deserves a representative in Congress who loves America, protects their constituents, and creates a better future for everyone.**

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Humbly asking you to contribute $5 or $10 today. PLEASE give me a chance to explain.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We’re 7 days from our FIRST official FEC fundraising deadline of the Election Year and we are taking some big steps toward our goals every day.
#

In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make your first online contribution to my campaign for Senate. Now, I don't expect you to donate to every email or text we send, but I do hope you'll contribute in response to this one.
Please give me a chance to explain:
One week from today, we close the books on our March fundraising deadline, and that also happens to be an official FEC deadline. Right now, we're short of our goals.
Now, don’t panic. The sky isn’t falling yet. But we do need to catch up. So here are a few important reasons to chip in $5 or $10 and help us hit those goals.
1\. With Kyrsten Sinema out of this race, it’s a head-to-head between me and Kari Lake. It’s this team up against Lake and Trump, their lies, election denial, conspiracy theories, and threats.
2\. Kari Lake’s been attacking me directly online and in the media just about every single day since she entered the race. She has Trump’s endorsement, the party elites fundraising for her, and millions of dollars of support committed from the NRSC.
3\. By this point in previous Arizona races, outside groups had opened up with multi-million dollar broadsides of attack ads. It’s been quiet here so far, but that could change any day now. We have to be ready — and we need to be able to fight back.
So please. These goals are not arbitrary made up numbers. They are what we need to raise to win. That's why I am asking:
[**Can I count on you to use this link to contribute $5 or $10 or whatever you can afford to my campaign for Senate in Arizona? It will all add up fast if everyone chips in what they can today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar24.sAuZhx&refcode=em240324-1-160&t=1&akid=2112%2E734936%2Eml2rr_)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

---

---

| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-mar24.nfHLlp&refcode=em240324-1-160&t=22&akid=2112%2E734936%2Eml2rr_)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-mar24.FrGn6k&refcode=em240324-1-160&t=23&akid=2112%2E734936%2Eml2rr_)**

body:
we need to hear from you
| | **Republicans Attack DC Sovereignty as Democrats Push for Statehood**
---
The MAGA GOP knows that DC Statehood would almost certainly mean TWO more Democratic Senators, so they’re doing everything in their power to stop it!

If we’re going to have any chance of fighting back, we need to demonstrate MASSIVE grassroots support for DC Statehood! **Please, respond now:**

[**Do you support DC Statehood?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v2/?source=VPP_20240324_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=13579%2E878179%2EqOTWnt)

*** PLEASE RESPOND BEFORE 11:59 PM TONIGHT OR YOUR ANSWER WILL AUTOMATICALLY BE MARKED “ NO.” ***
* * *
Listen, not only would DC Statehood give hundreds of thousands of people much-needed representation in Congress, _it could SAVE our slim Senate majority!_

Republicans are TERRIFIED — so they’re launching vicious attacks to shut down any chance we have of making DC Statehood a reality.

**We need 5,000 loyal Democrats to respond by MIDNIGHT:**
[**Do you support DC Statehood?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v2/?source=VPP_20240324_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=13579%2E878179%2EqOTWnt)
[YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v2/?source=VPP_20240324_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=13579%2E878179%2EqOTWnt)
---

[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v2/?source=VPP_20240324_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=13&akid=13579%2E878179%2EqOTWnt)
*** PLEASE RESPOND BEFORE 11:59 PM TONIGHT OR YOUR ANSWER WILL AUTOMATICALLY BE MARKED “ NO.” ***
Thank you,

_VPP_
