name: Justice Democrats
subject: AIPAC explained →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This month, we launched a coalition of 20+ progressive groups united to
demand the Democratic Party reject AIPAC, but you might be wondering, who
is AIPAC anyway?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240324.ww8fNp&refcode=em20240324-33950&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=33950%2E1203867%2EF3Fty9 ]If you already know the deal about AIPAC and want to fuel our work to
stop their dangerous influence in Washington, chip in here.

Otherwise, here’s an explainer on AIPAC and why we’re taking them on:

AIPAC stands for the American Israel Public Affairs Committee, a lobby
group founded in the 1950s to build bipartisan support for Israel in
Congress.

For most of AIPAC’s existence, it didn’t get involved in elections. They
didn’t need to. But following the groundbreaking elections of AOC, Rashida
Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, and Ayanna Pressley, Congress for the first time had
members willing to speak out for Palestinian human rights. The Democratic
base began to shift on the issue, recognizing Israel’s apartheid rule over
Palestinians.

As a result, in 2021 AIPAC formed its own PAC and Super PAC known as
United Democracy Project (UDP) that waded into Democratic primaries,
spending millions against progressive, pro-peace candidates like Summer
Lee and Ilhan Omar.

Let’s be clear: AIPAC’s campaign spending is a sign of weakness.
Unconditional support for Israel’s far-right government has been
significantly weakened, particularly among Democratic voters. AIPAC’s
tactic of last resort is to threaten to spend millions of dollars to
silence anyone who may speak out for Palestinian human rights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240324.ww8fNp&refcode=em20240324-33950&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=33950%2E1203867%2EF3Fty9 ]That’s why it’s so important that we have the Squad’s back. We can’t
let AIPAC’s fear tactics work. Chip in now to help us reject AIPAC and
re-elect the Squad in 2024.

So where does AIPAC’s funding come from? While they claim to be
bipartisan, AIPAC is fueled by massive donations from millionaires and
billionaires, including right-wing megadonors who’ve donated to Donald
Trump, Ron DeSantis, and Nikki Haley. The same people trying to re-elect
Trump are bankrolling AIPAC’s primaries against the Squad.

AIPAC’s dark money influence is widespread: last cycle, only 33 out of 535
members of Congress did not receive money from the group's network. Who
AIPAC targets, however, is a narrow group of candidates and elected
officials. AIPAC’s Super PAC exclusively spends against Democrats in
primaries — particularly young, Black and brown progressive champions like
the Squad. In fact, more than 85% of the money UDP (AIPAC’s Super PAC) has
spent has been against candidates of color.

Not only that, but AIPAC has ardently endorsed and contributed to 109
Republican insurrectionists who denied the 2020 election results, as well
as more than 200 anti-abortion Republican extremists. They recently
congratulated retiring Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell on a job
well done for his decades of work stonewalling progress, stacking the
SCOTUS with Republicans, and pushing a far-right agenda.

All in all, AIPAC is a right-wing organization, and it’s our job to build
a movement to expose their right-wing agenda to all voters so that they
are rejected by the Democratic Party, following the same path as other
lobby groups like the NRA.

That fight starts now. AIPAC and its affiliates are going all-out to try
and take down the Squad and any other Democrat who expresses support for a
ceasefire and peace in Gaza. Last year, they announced plans to spend an
unprecedented $100 million in this year’s elections. They’ve already run
attack ads against Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee, and Cori Bush while
hand-picking their primary opponents.

Enough is enough. It is time for the Democratic Party as a whole to do
what’s right and stand up against AIPAC’s threat to our democracy.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240324.ww8fNp&refcode=em20240324-33950&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=33950%2E1203867%2EF3Fty9 ]We’re fighting back against AIPAC’s attacks on the Squad while pushing
for ALL Democratic candidates to reject their dark money once and for all:
will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can to support our
Reject AIPAC campaign?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240324.ww8fNp&refcode=em20240324-33950&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=33950%2E1203867%2EF3Fty9 ]Contribute $5

We’ve defeated AIPAC and its millions of dollars of right-wing megadonor
money before — now more than ever, we need to do it again, and we need to
put an end to their interference in our Democratic elections.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240324-33950-footer&t=1023&refcode2=33950_1203867_F3Fty9&akid=33950%2E1203867%2EF3Fty9

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=33950%2E1203867%2EF3Fty9

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Bob Casey
subject: Just $5
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2397%2E552475%2EvBGDFM)
$5, Peter.
That’s all I’m asking you to chip in to our campaign to defend Pennsylvania and stop the GOP from taking the Senate.
$5 may not seem like much, but with enough people stepping up today, we can fight back against my opponent’s war chest and the dark money GOP PAC that’s already running ads to defeat me.
[**Please, Peter, will you donate $5 right now? Your contribution will have a real impact on this battleground Senate campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240324-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240324-1&refcode2=2397_552475_vBGDFM&akid=2397%2E552475%2EvBGDFM)
We know that Republicans are ready to put everything they’ve got into flipping PA red to win the Senate and the White House. That’s why I’m hoping you will chip in to this email today.
We couldn’t do this without you. With your $5, we’ll be able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority. The $5 that you donate today will determine what happens in Pennsylvania — and to our Nation — come November.
[**Can you chip in $5 today? We’ll put your donation to work right away in the fight to keep our Commonwealth blue.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240324-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240324-1&refcode2=2397_552475_vBGDFM&akid=2397%2E552475%2EvBGDFM)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._

clean_body: $5, Peter. That’s all I’m asking you to chip in to our campaign to defend Pennsylvania and stop the GOP from taking the Senate. $5 may not seem like much, but with enough people stepping up today, we can fight back against my opponent’s war chest and the dark money GOP PAC that’s already running ads to defeat me. We know that Republicans are ready to put everything they’ve got into flipping PA red to win the Senate and the White House. That’s why I’m hoping you will chip in to this email today. We couldn’t do this without you. With your $5, we’ll be able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority. The $5 that you donate today will determine what happens in Pennsylvania — and to our Nation — come November. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. I'm proud to have you by my side in this fight. With gratitude, Bob

I know our 2024 race will be another close one - but grassroots power has come through time and time again. That is why it is so important to strengthen the foundation of this campaign by meeting the first major milestone of the year, [**my end-of-quarter fundraising goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81547526/462806253/-389090483?refcode=E7634-20240325-EOQ8-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTI0MTExNS1lMWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7FDviT4ReYfOm-Mik5oFPTd_7CKbQ_V_hrzZYfeWpCI=) Running a winning campaign includes hiring staff, connecting with voters in all 41 towns in CT-05, and building up our infrastructure for November so that my team is prepared for whatever comes our way. [**With your support, I know that together, we will be able to win in November in this tight race. Will you help me get there?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81547527/462806254/-389090483?refcode=E7634-20240325-EOQ8-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTI0MTExNS1lMWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7FDviT4ReYfOm-Mik5oFPTd_7CKbQ_V_hrzZYfeWpCI=) Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, I have been a fierce advocate for Connecticut – committing myself to fighting for vital assistance programs, access to quality education, affordable health care, and veterans issues. **There is so much more I hope to accomplish – from protecting reproductive rights to supporting our agriculture sector to strengthening our public schools.

[So, my ask is this: will you support my reelection campaign by helping me reach this milestone?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81547528/462806256/-389090483?refcode=E7634-20240325-EOQ8-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTI0MTExNS1lMWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7FDviT4ReYfOm-Mik5oFPTd_7CKbQ_V_hrzZYfeWpCI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81547529/462806257/-389090483?express_lane=true&refcode=E7634-20240325-EOQ8-EG-DeadlineEOQ&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTI0MTExNS1lMWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7FDviT4ReYfOm-Mik5oFPTd_7CKbQ_V_hrzZYfeWpCI=)

clean_body: Without meeting this goal I will be off to a rocky start. | | Friend, I am incredibly proud of everything we have accomplished so far in this race, but we cannot stop now. I know our 2024 race will be another close one - but grassroots power has come through time and time again. That is why it is so important to strengthen the foundation of this campaign by meeting the first major milestone of the year, = Running a winning campaign includes hiring staff, connecting with voters in all 41 towns in CT-05, and building up our infrastructure for November so that my team is prepared for whatever comes our way. = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, I have been a fierce advocate for Connecticut – committing myself to fighting for vital assistance programs, access to quality education, affordable health care, and veterans issues. There is so much more I hope to accomplish – from protecting reproductive rights to supporting our agriculture sector to strengthening our public schools. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Do this one thing to stand for life today
body:
highlight-blue {background-color: #648fc6;}
Science and research tells us that life begins at the moment of conception.

|
---
| | From the Desk of Marjorie Dannenfelser Hello, In our fast-paced world, it's easy to lose sight of fundamental principles, especially when it comes to complex issues. Rather than trying to understand or get involved, so often I find it's easier for people to turn a blind eye. Recently, I feel like the culture in our country has forgotten - or ignored - the most basic lessons. I've felt a growing concern about how our society perceives and values life, particularly when it comes to the development of human life. Science and research tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. We know exactly when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, can wiggle their toes, and even hear their mother's voice. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are treated as though they are not alive or even human in our society. **After speaking to the experts and talking to mothers for over 30 years as a pro-life activist, I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/S_K9VMtsLlA2GBB2Ob3JuQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4ry8P0S1aHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Rpb24uc2JhcHJvbGlmZS5vcmcvc3RhbmQtZm9yLWxpZmUtd2l0aC1tZT91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c3RhbmRfd2l0aF9tZSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmYXBwZWFsX2lkPTEwNzYmcGFja2FnZV9pZD0yNzE0NyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DX1BBLUFGUi0yMDI0MDMyNFcDc3BjQgpl_IEuAGZSmIoBUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
_Marjorie Dannenfelser
President SBA Pro-Life America_ Our Creator has given us life as a precious gift. No person is disposable, and every life has value because we are made in His image. I believe that everyone deserves life, despite what our society, schools, or government say. I believe that together we can make a difference in our culture that has drifted off course. I believe we can bring dignity and a voice to the voiceless. I also strongly believe I'm not alone in my convictions. I believe that you believe this too. SBA Pro-Life America works everyday to bring the truth about abortion to light and shine a ray of hope into our culture. We want to give the next generation of Americans a bright future. But this future will require commitment from people like you. The first step we must all take is clearly stating what we believe and what we're willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. Will you join me and be a voice for the voiceless? Will you stand up for those that cannot do it for themselves? I've created a pro-life pledge and I'd love your support. You can join over 1 million pro-life supporters - people like you - that want to see the unborn protected, valued, and cherished. [https://action.sbaprolife.org/stand-for-life-with-me](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/S_K9VMtsLlA2GBB2Ob3JuQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4ry8P0S1aHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Rpb24uc2JhcHJvbGlmZS5vcmcvc3RhbmQtZm9yLWxpZmUtd2l0aC1tZT91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c3RhbmRfd2l0aF9tZSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmYXBwZWFsX2lkPTEwNzYmcGFja2FnZV9pZD0yNzE0NyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DX1BBLUFGUi0yMDI0MDMyNFcDc3BjQgpl_IEuAGZSmIoBUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) For Life,
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to SBA Pro-Life America helps us to focus on our mission of combining politics with policy, investing heavily in voter education to ensure that pro-life Americans know where their lawmakers stand on protecting the unborn, and in issue advocacy, advancing pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns.
---
|
---

_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c93d4121bd7a46f99ab24c8d5a2f7f20&_e=qPTanHM6K1s5Not5diALrc1xUUcTSL9lECO6YuMNRxdmJv1p-Ts-QWHyf37wCCeMz8fHVfpbRxqO0nqXpOlfPz95JNJ4lUR0i4iX7CiCgVUs9REcf1qylfX6BAO_8MvpNLI7QsbH-PiRtPNz63Cd02A1M9mthJ0YgHT1IB94vKDyxLaxK7WsHff9U-Tp3cAcnyNL2r1aYQF6y-N257ckPByoePlkRZsFgpL9-CsE66x5We_EELSBJMsrFZbwbf-3MOSAufBtPnlHLl_6ZrziOj8IPJ1x9czIpkihAt0LJOb5Qnc-1wX1kEnAU5xScUnl6q1jG7u-YKTnYHxOjDtdPSTTT260SuPZ9XVHKCalLdiI2DDnqVm_X0O4Ws0aG-cbkjpFfqbjqLhVnUYEboqUDkJLuGKAnRCrpqpiZ0je684%3D) [NO](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c93d4121bd7a46f99ab24c8d5a2f7f20&_e=qPTanHM6K1s5Not5diALrc1xUUcTSL9lECO6YuMNRxdmJv1p-Ts-QWHyf37wCCeMz8fHVfpbRxqO0nqXpOlfPz95JNJ4lUR0i4iX7CiCgVUs9REcf1qylfX6BAO_8MvpNLI7QsbH-PiRtPNz63Cd02A1M9mthJ0YgHT1IB94vKDyxLaxK7WsHff9U-Tp3cAcnyNL2r1aYQF6y-N257ckPByoePlkRZsFgpL9-CsE66x5We_EELSBJMsrFZbwbf-32lxL8W4M8XukTmyudefLeib594JiBLd5ewb1aOcJ16ZO7KvxyTz64o3KeS-vkMjxzTh4WnKQ9HAM0mL8JRapaKLwMuNwogHlmldwuPryO7Fbx8c46MqZeVB61MwaSeMJkTMoYYH0tOe7LrEPDMqQhfKZ1Em1ejYqGtcuC1HiIhY%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c93d4121bd7a46f99ab24c8d5a2f7f20&_e=qPTanHM6K1s5Not5diALrc1xUUcTSL9lECO6YuMNRxdmJv1p-Ts-QWHyf37wCCeMz8fHVfpbRxqO0nqXpOlfPz95JNJ4lUR0i4iX7CiCgVUs9REcf1qylfX6BAO_8MvpNLI7QsbH-PiRtPNz63Cd02A1M9mthJ0YgHT1IB94vKDyxLaxK7WsHff9U-Tp3cAcnyNL2r1aYQF6y-N257ckPByoePlkRZsFgpL9-CsE66x5We_EELSBJMsrFZbwbf-3WZW6bXhAoBWVXSPlDDRhOJyAtDsEnVDDkGZzI3ahViOvw0r9abvD3svsEhre0y7HWyz45HJzcyPx9qSbBWNYT5lWkwL6e77nOPtaDwoJ-39z2CcEiBDYDMJoz0klfB3F5GvKh8bAxIM1f6kg6IzshLvxnHWPJajqlBpRHb1HOPU%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: the aftermath of January 6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress
body:
| |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81552801/462820788/-742709655?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.03.24_B1_Aftermath_T1_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmNiZGMwY2UtZTZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NEPgrFvDPota_H7JU3PjOKDuNBdKTftINHVsB4M_Vy4=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81552805/462820793/-407916182?amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.03.24_B1_Aftermath_T1_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmNiZGMwY2UtZTZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NEPgrFvDPota_H7JU3PjOKDuNBdKTftINHVsB4M_Vy4=) Hey there,

I'll be straight with you, I've done a lot of tough things in my life. I played college football, tried to make it in the NFL and CFL. That was tough, mentally, physically, emotionally.

I served as a Capitol police officer for over 15 years, those were tough some days.

But the aftermath of the January 6 insurrection was one of the toughest things I've been through. My pain, my trauma, it didn't end on January 7.

Even after the violence of that day, I dealt with death threats. I dealt with people harassing me for speaking out. And when I decided to testify in front of Congress? It was one of the toughest things I've ever faced. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81552809/462820797/-407916182?amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.03.24_B1_Aftermath_T1_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmNiZGMwY2UtZTZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NEPgrFvDPota_H7JU3PjOKDuNBdKTftINHVsB4M_Vy4=) But I did testify, because it was my duty not just as an officer, but as an American. I made a big step the day I testified for the January 6 committee. I stepped in the direction of protecting our democracy.

And honestly, I've never looked back.

[**_I'm ready to protect our democracy as a Congressman, and I need you to join me. I wouldn’t ask if this fight wasn’t absolutely critical – will you rush a donation to my campaign so I can fight for Democrats and every Marylander in District 3? It's going to be tough, but like I said, I'm no stranger to tough._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81552814/462820801/-407916182?amount=&25amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.03.24_B1_Aftermath_T1_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmNiZGMwY2UtZTZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NEPgrFvDPota_H7JU3PjOKDuNBdKTftINHVsB4M_Vy4=) | [RUSH $10 NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81552819/462820806/-407916182?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.03.24_B1_Aftermath_T1_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmNiZGMwY2UtZTZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NEPgrFvDPota_H7JU3PjOKDuNBdKTftINHVsB4M_Vy4=) | [RUSH $25 NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81552823/462820812/-407916182?amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.03.24_B1_Aftermath_T1_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmNiZGMwY2UtZTZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NEPgrFvDPota_H7JU3PjOKDuNBdKTftINHVsB4M_Vy4=)

clean_body: | | = = Hey there, I'll be straight with you, I've done a lot of tough things in my life. I played college football, tried to make it in the NFL and CFL. That was tough, mentally, physically, emotionally. I served as a Capitol police officer for over 15 years, those were tough some days. But the aftermath of the January 6 insurrection was one of the toughest things I've been through. My pain, my trauma, it didn't end on January 7. Even after the violence of that day, I dealt with death threats. I dealt with people harassing me for speaking out. And when I decided to testify in front of Congress? It was one of the toughest things I've ever faced. = But I did testify, because it was my duty not just as an officer, but as an American. I made a big step the day I testified for the January 6 committee. I stepped in the direction of protecting our democracy. And honestly, I've never looked back. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With love, Harry 🖤 = = | = = Harry Dunn for Congress PO Box 1449 Columbia, MD 21044 United States | mailto:info@harrydunnforcongress.com Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress

#

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81553027/462821120/2069777176?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240324_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNThiZGMwY2UtZTZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9J7WZtsp9xz89tF6u3chAti3yyBAAfPzCvknhm-RALM=) Hi team, it’s Representative Lauren Underwood. I want to thank Governor Gretchen Whitmer and this amazing grassroots team for your endorsement and all the support you’ve shown. **I want to take a few moments and explain why this endorsement means so much to me —[but before I do, will you please split a contribution between Fight Like Hell PAC and my campaign so your team can continue to support Democrats nationwide who share our values?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81553028/462821121/2069777176?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240324_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNThiZGMwY2UtZTZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9J7WZtsp9xz89tF6u3chAti3yyBAAfPzCvknhm-RALM=)** Receiving an endorsement from Governor Whitmer is a tremendous honor. Her work in Michigan to protect fundamental rights, attack the climate crisis head-on, and deliver meaningful results for hardworking families has set an example for Democrats everywhere. One of the things I admire most about Governor Whitmer is that she understands the enormous challenges that lie in front of us and she’s fighting like hell to do something about it. **I know what it’s like to run in tough races.** I flipped Illinois’ 14th Congressional District in 2018 after defeating a four-term Republican incumbent and I won one of the closest races in the country in 2020. **And I can tell you from experience that your support for President Joe Biden, Vice President Kamala Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot who are running in close races will be the deciding factor between Democratic wins and losses in November.** In fact, your support for Democrats and progressive causes in other states has already made a difference! Your work has allowed women in Ohio to access reproductive care, Democrats in Virginia to win control of the state legislature, and Democratic governors to win reelection in traditionally Republican states like Kentucky and Kansas. And now, you’re playing a significant role in ensuring that we win up and down the ballot in 2024 so we can continue to provide the American people with the opportunity to create a better future for themselves and their families. **This grassroots team has done a lot of good work — and we can’t let up now.** **Fight Like Hell PAC’s commitment to electing Democrats who share our values beyond Michigan will be a game changer in the 2024 election.[Will you please split a contribution between Fight Like Hell PAC and my campaign now to provide us with the resources we’ll need to turn out voters for Democrats up and down the ballot in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81553029/462821122/2069777176?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240324_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNThiZGMwY2UtZTZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9J7WZtsp9xz89tF6u3chAti3yyBAAfPzCvknhm-RALM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lauren Underwood and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81553030/462821123/2069777176?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240324_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNThiZGMwY2UtZTZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9J7WZtsp9xz89tF6u3chAti3yyBAAfPzCvknhm-RALM=)

And now, you’re playing a significant role in ensuring that we win up and down the ballot in 2024 so we can continue to provide the American people with the opportunity to create a better future for themselves and their families. This grassroots team has done a lot of good work — and we can’t let up now. Fight Like Hell PAC’s commitment to electing Democrats who share our values beyond Michigan will be a game changer in the 2024 election.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lauren Underwood and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Let’s keep fighting like hell to make our country a better place. As long as we continue to work together, the sky is the limit. Thanks for taking the time to read this message, Lauren Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

I need your urgent help to close the gap
| | |
---
Friend – with only hours left before my critical midnight deadline, I'm falling _just_ short of my goal to win in Nevada and defend the Senate. **I need your urgent help to close the gap.**
Missing this important goal isn't an option, because the GOP is zeroing in on defeating me: Mitch McConnell personally recruited a far-right Republican to run against me, and a shady billionaire has poured _$2 million_ into his effort to help flip this seat.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Veeeery short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We promise we’ll keep this veeeery short.
#
Derek, we promise we’ll keep this _veeeery_ short:
Our EOQ fundraising deadline is coming up quick, and we need a big grassroots push — starting today. [**Will you donate your first $5 to support John now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240324-1?refcode=em20240324-1-8855&refcode2=8855_434096_ifFOBO&akid=8855%2E434096%2EifFOBO)
**[Contribute $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240324-1?amount=5&refcode=emem20240324-1-8855&refcode2=8855_434096_ifFOBO&akid=8855%2E434096%2EifFOBO)**
Here are 3 reasons that might convince you to chip in today:
1️⃣ Extremist Republicans are causing non-stop chaos in Congress, and it’s critical that we have enough resources to fight back.
2️⃣ Small donations really add up, and it’s what makes our movement so strong (strong enough to fight back + WIN).
3️⃣ It’s so important that we have a strong base of resources as we prepare for the tough fights ahead. With a Democratic majority so slim, we have to fight for every single Senate seat nationwide in the months ahead.
[**Derek, ahead of our important quarterly deadline, we have to ask one more time:****Will you chip in $5 or more today to help us head into the rest of Election Year at top strength?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240324-1?refcode=em20240324-1-8855&refcode2=8855_434096_ifFOBO&akid=8855%2E434096%2EifFOBO)
**[Contribute $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240324-1?refcode=em20240324-1-8855&refcode2=8855_434096_ifFOBO&akid=8855%2E434096%2EifFOBO)**
Eternally grateful,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240324-8855-footer&t=1&refcode2=8855_434096_ifFOBO&akid=8855%2E434096%2EifFOBO)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Socialism vs. Free-Market Capitalism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsQDn99iN0

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osQDn99iN0

The
debate about socialism and free-market capitalism is growing
louder across the globe.

While
proponents of capitalism celebrate the economic growth that is
created by private enterprise and individual freedom, advocates
of socialism claim they have a more compassionate system because
of its egalitarian nature.

But which
one has a more positive effect on human flourishing?

To answer
this question, the Hoover Institution gathered a
multi-disciplinary group of its world-renowned scholars to
investigate the historical record and assess the outcomes of both
systems.

And the
results are eye-opening.

From what
I'm told, you are someone who would be interested in hearing
these results, and that's why I'm emailing you today.

We
recently launched a new two-part online course called Socialism
and Free-Market Capitalism: History and Outcomes to outline the
findings of the project. And I want to invite you to take it for
FREE as my guest.

Inside
these 7 lessons you'll discover:

Why
communism failed and liberal democracy prosperedWhy political
freedom and prosperity go hand in handHow nations in the
Indo-Pacific region view China and why many are seeking their own
paths between socialism and capitalism.
You can
activate your free online course right now by using this secure
link: https://resources.hoover.org/hp-history-and-outcomes-signup

When you
do, you'll receive Lesson 1 by email within minutes. Subsequent
lessons will be emailed to you every 5 days until the course is
completed.

Please
use this link to get instant access to your free online course
today!

Thank
you,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover
Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA
94305

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Our work on college campuses
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Over the past week, we’ve been ramping up our student voter engagement
work. We spent each day posted up at college campuses registering students
to vote.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240324.i8zk5I&refcode=ema20240324-239530&t=1001&akid=239530%2E444211%2E9gUPC7 ]This investment in engaging young people is key to winning elections in
2024. I hope you’ll support this work with a donation of $3
or whatever you can today.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240324.i8zk5I&refcode=ema20240324-239530&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=239530%2E444211%2E9gUPC7 ]DONATE $3

Texas has the second-largest population of young people in the nation —
both in number and as a percentage of the electorate. Their participation
in the upcoming elections is key to securing Democratic victories across
the state.

This is also the first presidential election since the fall of Roe v.
Wade. If we ensure this key voting bloc knows we have a chance to restore
nationwide abortion rights, take further action on climate, and advance
other issues of outsized importance to young people, we’ll have a much
better shot at electing leaders who will make this all possible.

After a surge in youth voter turnout in recent years, Texas Republicans
know that if more young people were able to vote, their days in power
would be over. That’s why they’ve removed polling sites from college
campuses and prevented students from using their student IDs to vote.

In addition to bringing students onto the voter rolls, our volunteers are
exchanging personal contact information with every person they register.
That way, they can follow up with them to ensure students know where their
closest polling place is, the type of ID they’ll need to vote, and
everything else they’ll need to cast their ballot.

The work we’re doing — registering and staying in touch with young people
to ensure they turn out in November — gives me much more confidence that
we’ll come through in this election.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240324.i8zk5I&refcode=ema20240324-239530&t=1021&akid=239530%2E444211%2E9gUPC7 ]Thank you for helping us keep this going with a contribution today.
Your support makes this work possible.

clean_body: [1]Powered By People Over the past week, we’ve been ramping up our student voter engagement work. We spent each day posted up at college campuses registering students to vote. [ ]This investment in engaging young people is key to winning elections in 2024. I hope you’ll support this work with a donation of $3 or whatever you can today. [ ]DONATE $3 Texas has the second-largest population of young people in the nation — both in number and as a percentage of the electorate. Their participation in the upcoming elections is key to securing Democratic victories across the state. This is also the first presidential election since the fall of Roe v. Wade. If we ensure this key voting bloc knows we have a chance to restore nationwide abortion rights, take further action on climate, and advance other issues of outsized importance to young people, we’ll have a much better shot at electing leaders who will make this all possible. After a surge in youth voter turnout in recent years, Texas Republicans know that if more young people were able to vote, their days in power would be over. That’s why they’ve removed polling sites from college campuses and prevented students from using their student IDs to vote. In addition to bringing students onto the voter rolls, our volunteers are exchanging personal contact information with every person they register. That way, they can follow up with them to ensure students know where their closest polling place is, the type of ID they’ll need to vote, and everything else they’ll need to cast their ballot. The work we’re doing — registering and staying in touch with young people to ensure they turn out in November — gives me much more confidence that we’ll come through in this election. [ ]Thank you for helping us keep this going with a contribution today. Your support makes this work possible. [ ]DONATE $3 Let’s keep it up! Beto

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley’s Social Security Charade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
He’s terrified of voters learning the truth.
#
Peter — now that he’s up for re-election, Josh Hawley is going around DC trying to convince everyone that he’ll stand up for Social Security.
**He’s terrified of voters learning the truth:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44728?refcode=em20240324-5112&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5112%2E614464%2E5gw8rS)
**[PROTECT SOCIAL SECURITY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44728?refcode=em20240324-5112&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5112%2E614464%2E5gw8rS)**
1. Hawley endorsed Blake Masters, who threatened to “privatize” Social Security.
2. Hawley wants Rick Scott to be his leader in the senate — the same Rick Scott who put forward a bill to “sunset” Social Security and Medicare altogether!
3. Hawley’s voting record in the U.S. Senate earned a score of 0% from the National Committee To Preserve Social Security And Medicare.

**[FIGHT BACK NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44728?refcode=em20240324-5112&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5112%2E614464%2E5gw8rS)**
Let’s be clear: Josh Hawley has never actually done anything to ensure America’s seniors are given what they’re owed.
**When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight like hell to protect the promise of Social Security for every worker who earned it.** That’s why my campaign has been endorsed by Social Security Works and tens of thousands of working people across Missouri.
**[If you’re with us, will you please add your first $10 donation to my grassroots campaign today? Our movement is on a mission to take back power from politicians like Hawley and finally put real, everyday people in charge of our country — and we can’t do it without your help.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44728?refcode=em20240324-5112&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=5112%2E614464%2E5gw8rS)**

[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44729?refcode=em20240324-5112&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=5112%2E614464%2E5gw8rS) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44729?refcode=em20240324-5112&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=5112%2E614464%2E5gw8rS) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44729?refcode=em20240324-5112&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=5112%2E614464%2E5gw8rS) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44729?refcode=em20240324-5112&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=5112%2E614464%2E5gw8rS) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44729?refcode=em20240324-5112&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=5112%2E614464%2E5gw8rS) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44729?refcode=em20240324-5112&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=5112%2E614464%2E5gw8rS) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44728?refcode=em20240324-5112&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=5112%2E614464%2E5gw8rS)

Any politician who says we can’t afford to deliver workers what they’re owed is a liar.
When I’m elected, you’ll never have to wonder if I’m fighting for everyday Americans over the massive corporations tearing our country up — and the corrupt politicians standing in my way won’t have to wonder either.
Let’s defeat Hawley and take back power for working people across the country.
Thanks for everything,
Lucas

clean_body: He’s terrified of voters learning the truth. Peter — now that he’s up for re-election, Josh Hawley is going around DC trying to convince everyone that he’ll stand up for Social Security. He’s terrified of voters learning the truth: 1. Hawley endorsed Blake Masters, who threatened to “privatize” Social Security. 2. Hawley wants Rick Scott to be his leader in the senate — the same Rick Scott who put forward a bill to “sunset” Social Security and Medicare altogether! 3. Hawley’s voting record in the U.S. Senate earned a score of 0% from the National Committee To Preserve Social Security And Medicare. Let’s be clear: Josh Hawley has never actually done anything to ensure America’s seniors are given what they’re owed. When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight like hell to protect the promise of Social Security for every worker who earned it. That’s why my campaign has been endorsed by Social Security Works and tens of thousands of working people across Missouri. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Any politician who says we can’t afford to deliver workers what they’re owed is a liar. When I’m elected, you’ll never have to wonder if I’m fighting for everyday Americans over the massive corporations tearing our country up — and the corrupt politicians standing in my way won’t have to wonder either. Let’s defeat Hawley and take back power for working people across the country. Thanks for everything, Lucas | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Biden HQ
subject: We need you, especially today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Here is the truth: | | |
---
🔵 Peter -- 🔵 We’re about to ask you to make your first online contribution to President Biden's reelection campaign. But first, give us a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
**Here is the truth:** In less than ten days, we close the books on the first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election year. After this deadline, we're legally required to report how much money we've raised, including from emails like this.
Everyone will be watching: The press, the Trump campaign, and critical outside spending organizations ready with potential attack ads against the President.
We need to send a message about the strength of our grassroots campaign -- _the kind of message that can alter the media coverage of this race and give us some more momentum._
**But more important than that, reaching our goals is what we need to do in order to win.** We already have ads running and our opponent does as well. So we need to consistently hit our goals or we risk falling behind. And in a race as close as ours, that would be _devastating._
We don't need you to give to every email we send, but a well-timed donation from you today would mean a lot.
[Can President Biden count on you to contribute your first $5 before this end-of-quarter fundraising deadline to help defeat Donald Trump? clean_body: Here is the truth: | | | 🔵 Peter -- 🔵 We’re about to ask you to make your first online contribution to President Biden's reelection campaign. But first, give us a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important. Here is the truth: In less than ten days, we close the books on the first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election year. After this deadline, we're legally required to report how much money we've raised, including from emails like this. Everyone will be watching: The press, the Trump campaign, and critical outside spending organizations ready with potential attack ads against the President. We need to send a message about the strength of our grassroots campaign -- the kind of message that can alter the media coverage of this race and give us some more momentum. But more important than that, reaching our goals is what we need to do in order to win. We already have ads running and our opponent does as well. So we need to consistently hit our goals or we risk falling behind. And in a race as close as ours, that would be devastating. We don't need you to give to every email we send, but a well-timed donation from you today would mean a lot. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | 🙏 Thank you in advance, Peter. Biden HQ

But the Left hates them, and they now hate me – so they’re dumping EVERYTHING they have into the effort to stop us from flipping this seat and taking back the Senate. But here’s what Sherrod got wrong: I am NOT self-funding this campaign. - You’re our secret weapon and the key to victory, so now that we’ve won the primary and secured the GOP nomination, We can’t rest – I need your help to burst out of the gate as strong as possible and take this fight directly to Sherrod Brown, Joe Biden, and the failed Democrats right away. Friend, Anti-Palestinian group AIPAC and its network of Super PACs are spending millions from right-wing donors to undermine our democracy. They’re spreading Islamophobic lies about me, interfering in our Democratic primary elections, and bankrolling right-wing challengers to run against progressive candidates of color who dare to challenge Israel’s human rights abuses—like Summer Lee. **Progressive champion** **Rep. Summer Lee overcame millions of dollars in attacks from AIPAC when she first ran for Congress in 2022.** This year, AIPAC recruited an anti-ceasefire challenger to run against Summer, who encouraged Republicans to register as Democrats in order to vote against Summer next month. And right now, an AIPAC-backed Super PAC is running attack ads in her district with lies about Summer—nearly entirely funded by one of the country’s top Republican donors. **With her first re-election in less than a month, Summer needs grassroots fundraising support to once again overcome AIPAC’s attacks.** [**Please split a donation TODAY between my and Summer Lee’s re-election campaigns, so we can overcome AIPAC’s $100 million in attacks and stay in Congress fighting for you.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJA3BHgOo_X6hGJL4izAkUbRBtsqbY0Cfs_hl0MclUqHF2bTohS-3H2Lr6c01qJXlkeeginfx9OBPTRJ6Q_fha4x-WEma5ZduRluNJxQbzXBJ5xAurwWCrV9mWsG0n8R1n8RQfMQS8W1V1jLyITQ2MRfZYSzl2oG0DPff4M93y8cu0etQJTqtfC1u4WqRdKP5BMcR7AhWKpAKBDN7Lnuy8JQevyCp4KLN8pRw_SqscVmAjBQoY0yMh7F6zM0_C8GJae7O4j4HB0FJKFeXlmSJp2BVthr8q_RmFWxsChpb4IScqJA9ufCv_9F2FIKH-Z9C7o1t_tK-Uh__46uDjZNaZzK9jJmLYUz433hu2o2cXjltcHaFyX8ll-tngGv5TolQ1/44x/vjXVEazAR32UJBCy-2Zw3Q/h1/h001.Wyd5H7K54GXGPMVpZJCY3sPm66N4bgSL8s-MAKdlAQg) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Summer Lee_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJA3BHgOo_X6hGJL4izAkUbY2R7gI7KTNDJUzid-A8b6GSfHbeSOcpfTLnuCegNqb1h7pgd3RHVghnx5xO41xO7EYEbrWYhIxbZo7ZrDCVB9OpraBSJKbSniigk9xHMPkuCH6cF4_swZuOlaXhcG5M4Z3SRGGaLNORnUaMFej9qczrtGZeJTez9PXmzrmr57QlpRQQXxTnIwTcaEwrSBzIjv1on8marUdkXgo3elWZAurOH-kduiAyLmCuCAAsvyaFz5JifZJIeDr2dfIwD5BpAYcsW7kUYrl_FVJkEjC4aG-Mtka_9pFA6VyTTqI7AMinMDIGh4erdkAJ7eQzgl7w7SYsvAcfkHkEYi8_D0PB5OBBFJboTF5cw0YDmY0IJQNT5s-r6scpQv4adEBMT5uj8XEwaMiQo-6WR1NNbx1pqDA/44x/vjXVEazAR32UJBCy-2Zw3Q/h2/h001.TKu58VMjb2XpixtLMS-oXnoXUPXp9TGq543LdeDzcCg)

Like me, Summer doesn’t take money from corporate PACs. Instead, our campaigns are people-powered, funded by grassroots donors like you. That’s one of the reasons why we continue to take bold stands to defend and expand human rights for all people.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJA3BHgOo_X6hGJL4izAkUbRBtsqbY0Cfs_hl0MclUqHGdkknUlpAUPOLBTxdnw9xTa6-YsP3wq8KLtBaTk_7uIZ4a04-oWoBibw3pxysYgFbhPdxvyYviIoRTMcPlNhomp9_pSLvaUezV12FL_3JET5sPgTn-enBgS23oOpSmU5BZnwcg0n8Yvp35x7TvevxKrVyPQnPnKC7L-XIADRtgItVDjCVEOG-OyKEpLHAlez7GUNihfMtBG-G7X3LkVvzb_PfTK9pBw7-DVZSWawHacnHfvDdrnADwFG7tuzLAznzVP7VERsrrRCm2a2xLkyQZvf98N8HNUHFTfMle6m3CjX5PMHHrHKEd-9NkjxKK3B0d2F3jAYxQ5oHuKD6tJypP/44x/vjXVEazAR32UJBCy-2Zw3Q/h8/h001.DaG5awn2iQAEebaH7JFGg9g4PSwe3t-KcGAUW46Z3Jo)
Like me, Summer is a community organizer who’s deeply rooted in her community. We recognize how urgently our neighbors need transformative change, and we’re not afraid to demand what our communities deserve.
At President Biden’s recent State of the Union address, Summer joined me in holding signs expressing the will of the people, saying “lasting ceasefire now” and “stop sending bombs.”
While prioritizing the needs of her constituents, Summer continues to champion human rights and equity for all people. We need her in Congress.

They’re spreading Islamophobic lies about me, interfering in our Democratic primary elections, and bankrolling right-wing challengers to run against progressive candidates of color who dare to challenge Israel’s human rights abuses—like Summer Lee. Progressive champion Rep. Summer Lee overcame millions of dollars in attacks from AIPAC when she first ran for Congress in 2022. This year, AIPAC recruited an anti-ceasefire challenger to run against Summer, who encouraged Republicans to register as Democrats in order to vote against Summer next month. And right now, an AIPAC-backed Super PAC is running attack ads in her district with lies about Summer—nearly entirely funded by one of the country’s top Republican donors. With her first re-election in less than a month, Summer needs grassroots fundraising support to once again overcome AIPAC’s attacks. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Summer Lee | | | | | | | | | | Like me, Summer doesn’t take money from corporate PACs. Instead, our campaigns are people-powered, funded by grassroots donors like you. That’s one of the reasons why we continue to take bold stands to defend and expand human rights for all people. Like me, Summer is a community organizer who’s deeply rooted in her community. We recognize how urgently our neighbors need transformative change, and we’re not afraid to demand what our communities deserve. At President Biden’s recent State of the Union address, Summer joined me in holding signs expressing the will of the people, saying “lasting ceasefire now” and “stop sending bombs.” While prioritizing the needs of her constituents, Summer continues to champion human rights and equity for all people. We need her in Congress. Thank you for your support. Together, we’re saving lives and building a world where no one is considered disposable. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Mar 23, 2024 Subject: AIPAC is spreading Islamophobic, racist lies about me. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Yesterday, the House of Representatives passed legislation to stop funding UNRWA, the agency providing urgently needed food and humanitarian assistance to starving Palestinians. The bill also includes $3.8 billion American taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military, which gets sent each year. This isn’t what the American people want. A vast majority of voters across demographic backgrounds support an immediate and permanent ceasefire. Despite this widespread support, too many members of Congress are silent in the face of the Israeli government’s atrocities. Why? As Jewish Voice for Peace Action wrote:“For too long, AIPAC and its Republican megadonors have demanded our elected leaders unconditionally support the Israeli military and government.” Leaders of AIPAC’s Super PAC bragged that it was “dollar for dollar, the largest contributor to candidates in the 2022 midterm elections.” That year, AIPAC’s network spent more than $5 million trying to defeat me and pro-peace champion Summer Lee. They’re planning to spend a lot more in this critical election year, but Summer Lee and I won’t be intimidated or silenced. Now we have just one month left until Summer Lee’s first re-election to Congress. In Summer’s congressional district, an AIPAC-backed group (which is bankrolled by one of the country’s top Republican donors) is running ads attacking Summer and supporting her AIPAC-recruited opponent. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Summer Lee | | | | | | | | | Jewish Voice for Peace Action, IfNotNow, Justice Democrats, and other groups just launched a campaign calling on the Democratic Party to reject AIPAC. AIPAC has endorsed far-right insurrectionists who tried to overthrow our government, and the group is also undermining our democracy by spending millions from Republican megadonors to interfere in Democratic primary elections. Because our Squad dares to vote and speak for human rights for everyone, AIPAC is recruiting and funding right-wing challengers to try to defeat us. Summer Lee’s opponent has even encouraged Republicans to register as Democrats in order to vote against Summer next month. Summer Lee’s re-election is coming up the soonest among our Squad: Her state of Pennsylvania will vote on April 23. This is her first re-election to Congress, and we need to keep her here holding our government accountable and demanding the transformative changes our communities need. Thank you for your ongoing solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Emma Brown, Giffords.org
subject: I won’t sugarcoat this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is a make-or-break election year, and we need your help to build our resources
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240324-1-30&refcode2=7813.3935704.X0Cjhg&t=1&akid=7813%2E3935704%2EX0Cjhg)

Hi there, it’s Emma Brown, GIFFORDS’ Executive Director.
I won’t sugarcoat this:
**This is a make-or-break election year.**
The resources we build together will determine whether or not we maintain our slim gun safety US Senate majority.
It will determine whether or not we can take back the US House of Representatives from extremists who put the gun lobby over our safety.
And it will determine whether or not we have four more years of President Biden—the strongest gun safety president we’ve ever had—or if Donald Trump will return to the Oval Office.
If we wake up to bad news on November 6th, it would have devastating impacts on our gun safety movement.
That’s why I’m asking for your help today. In just one week, GIFFORDS PAC is facing our first quarterly FEC fundraising deadline of the election year. The team and I have set some really high goals because we need to make sure we’re building the resources that we need to win in races all over the country.
If everyone stepped up and pitched in, I know we’d be able to reach our goals.
[**So, are you in? If you’re ready to join us in the fight to hold the Senate, take back the House, and reelect President Biden, chip in $3 or more to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240324-1-30&t=2&akid=7813%2E3935704%2EX0Cjhg)

| | Fellow American, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I'm humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7a9d2c4b771c46f59d084b73a9e05d75&_e=EAKTu-cNSSD7EIMy8KlQY_fKq4UjAeGvWOtzs6zaMcpN2Vzov8YZbqh4dM_zsS-37evIIRHDp3N7SjZbnzeT8HMUqX5e_4B8FiIvVxQvJANSBs218bh6F5ccznSeht5eS64Wnftls4q6G5wH9ba2MlWQu-m7okBxirCcY9y7bYLAnCEdZz9Ac9IIm54x7WYvQPUS9lzsqevZjHNXSJGYMlBmtv2osgyr7n6VMHWlOEGdCWddRkmfhHHFr6KIpc6bw910rmkevor5xtzrcTpBSnlvqYK24LoIdePByMYiPP28qdIPYeylEomgLj8t846U8gtTvx-FRoCSMDN0ZnzITmxkUXCkfhWuMXu1iOrMSczQIrHBrzmMxdbclyhbT-Rf2sccfj53qbMQxGC7P3MPZQ%3D%3D)** There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That's why I'm humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7a9d2c4b771c46f59d084b73a9e05d75&_e=EAKTu-cNSSD7EIMy8KlQY_fKq4UjAeGvWOtzs6zaMcpN2Vzov8YZbqh4dM_zsS-37evIIRHDp3N7SjZbnzeT8HMUqX5e_4B8FiIvVxQvJANSBs218bh6F5ccznSeht5eS64Wnftls4q6G5wH9ba2MlWQu-m7okBxirCcY9y7bYLAnCEdZz9Ac9IIm54x7WYvQPUS9lzsqevZjHNXSJGYMlBmtv2osgyr7n6VMHWlOEGlZ9PJyo6HOXqkMvmsN8caEYOqg2Xm76Gw0q7yoPudr0Q_H66m_fMypn0PVzjOQIKct5ineXGLzkTCScrrCW3-6cEi43uY5QsCBJDJtGVedmnxzZnjisPJKvqIFzwolIrApsF6zvuOEbShkfBM-YoBiwytQJpB4IxBG_zDMWMQ9Q%3D%3D)**

**Can you spare $5 to send Republicans like Ted Cruz packing?**

I know $5 probably doesn't sound like a lot. And now that we're closer than ever to defeating Ted Cruz, his special-interest buddies are pouring MILLIONS into his campaign coffers to buy him this seat. **But I'm willing to bet that if everyone who's fired up to send Ted packing chips in just $5, we can leave him and his allies in the dust.

So please: [Will you rush $5 right now to me and the DSCC so we can continue to reach voters across Texas, climb in the polls in key states, and defeat Ted Cruz on Election Day? Peter, **Solitary confinement is a form of psychological torture that can cause lasting harm.** Unfortunately, that hasn’t stopped Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) from using the inhumane practice on an estimated 3,000 immigrant detainees each year.**** In fact,**** thousands of immigrant detainees are being isolated in small cells for 22 hours a day without any meaningful human interaction for days, weeks, and even months on end.
[**That’s why, today, Cori is calling on President Biden to end the practice of solitary confinement in ICE detention centers.****Please join her by adding your name to our petition >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-M1O3jGWfDIFCDOnDxcsfmxGJ_6nnoc_eFMuN1TuR6HWmHt4e4nlryvlCtUk858cFuP4l8_ir6o4YLMm43zXLHBcofIGaColE4I1sXzEvyOy3F3-lYBVD93aqLms2OffYK7wUOQzG2vs9KlWZ9EdiOR3qj0RwZ49wPbzdJpTwHy_Qdmkzjk1w7G6IHU2VOTZTPOh1GMM8JtTAAvd0ioN34ywBlxj3sa_YpbTWgVqEF2TtxcIXBrcNp2xM2r9ICyPTm3-y1p3TpFidioduIVFCZUNxY9Psg2UBZIQUSorDdcR1RVESdSbnj573TKZvTpUWnq6g_JHmj_Th2ltKOUr2RBMIa7DbBuOsqVwB75vLhpfobMtqwwnbUJ1X5WijH2ituOwHfOv5ovipjuvUPqjKAiOyXmYdOrl2kMbUXAJr4m3E7nYJVURBQAIZElnrVa2X2VDZizb7bDQcm4oKYudqgLR5z93yW3fGiTuYmEnZZp6Fh9K6kzLBwFE0C7tOh7xs/44x/f-NTYxLmS_umO2an6y8QJw/h1/h001.esXDeOyZi5QVr7CvZfQe4XRtf_7d7rC95Aav12iI0r4)

Last year, Cori proudly introduced the _End Solitary Confinement Act_ in an effort to stop this outdated and unjust practice. However, we need a wave of grassroots pressure to sway decision-makers like President Biden, who has allowed solitary confinement to continue despite campaign promises. In fact, under President Biden, ICE’s use of solitary confinement hasn’t just continued – it's intensified... It’s shameful. Our ask is pretty simple: The U.S. government should uphold human rights and lead with compassion. Here at Team Cori, we are proudly pro-peace, we are proudly pro-humanity, and that is why we are proudly demanding an end to solitary confinement today. [**Let’s build on this momentum. Add your name to demand President Biden puts an immediate end to solitary confinement in ICE detention.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-M1O3jGWfDIFCDOnDxcsfmxGJ_6nnoc_eFMuN1TuR6HWmHt4e4nlryvlCtUk858cFuP4l8_ir6o4YLMm43zXLHBcofIGaColE4I1sXzEvyOy3F3-lYBVD93aqLms2OffYK7wUOQzG2vs9KlWZ9EdiOR3qj0RwZ49wPbzdJpTwHy_Qdmkzjk1w7G6IHU2VOTZTPOh1GMM8JtTAAvd0ioN34ywBlxj3sa_YpbTWgVqEF2TtxcIXBrcNp2xM2r9ICyPTm3-y1p3TpFidioduIVFCZUNxY9Psg2UBZIQUSorDdcU7ArqNVAsWCOYMP5vO3lh_Sy4VWDPRI7igUj49Yt20Tdg_PKRG2dGMGvf7xLQIlG6NOmO128ntHLxw5xCk5Spmst-k3sXjiYKIB6xKd1KTSnsUC-ksXnqby6Drc6nYoyZhULQ7latp2Vj_F0fNU_Qq4XwBMO_LfGL485bDZIulbp0pFocvvlAeMAu12aTq60euxwtbNTIKbcdCZt6wDquw/44x/f-NTYxLmS_umO2an6y8QJw/h3/h001.EYYobJmyDTmJYrMPs8pQifSMzeUECxjbl3KBItI9b-U) Thank you, _Team Cori_

name: American Update
subject: With RNC Shakeup, MAGA Brings Accountability To The Republican Party
body:
And The Legislative Sausage Is Crammed With Wasteful Pork

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c697336%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ifZ%2fzGRPfbkRP3qv3v0DLQ&sysid=1 With RNC Shakeup, MAGA Brings Accountability To The Republican Party

An insidious institutional rot has long afflicted the Republican Party and the broader conservative movement. Historically, this has presented a vexing problem for grassroots activists desperate to change the status quo.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c697336%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ifZ%2fzGRPfbkRP3qv3v0DLQ&sysid=1

name: Debbie
subject: there's nothing like a good doughnut
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Even the smallest acts, like kneading dough early in the morning for minimum wage, can make a huge difference.
| | |
---
Good morning, friend —
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81561037/462844530/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk964-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjFkNzIyZTQtZWZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y_dMiYnyXY7xD_H0GpuM10eiW7HHeNLHnqZf5lVYi3s=)
While enjoying my Sunday breakfast of doughnuts and coffee, I realized that tonight is the deadline for our weekly $200,000 goal — and as of 11:00 a.m., we're still 17% short of hitting it.
**So I'm reaching out to ask for your help in closing that gap:[ If that's all you need to hear, you can click this link to help me make my goal on time and stay on track to retire Rick Scott.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81561038/462844531/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk964-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjFkNzIyZTQtZWZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y_dMiYnyXY7xD_H0GpuM10eiW7HHeNLHnqZf5lVYi3s=)**
**But before that, I want to share a story about doughnuts — and how they can help save our slim Senate majority. **
My family arrived in America with big dreams for the future. But those early days were hard. I remember my mom working back-to-back double shifts and still struggling to afford rent for our small, one room apartment — and her constant reassurance, work ethic, and firm belief in the American dream inspired me to fight for a better life.
**So once I turned 15, I got a job working the early morning shift at a local doughnut shop. **Those small checks I brought home gave my family room to breathe and made it so that, every Sunday, my mom and I could set aside time in the afternoon to play dominoes (another treasured Sunday tradition)_._
And after a lot of hard work, the life we only dreamed of before became reality. We moved out of that one room apartment. I got a scholarship to an incredible college. I eventually found a career path where I could give back to the communities and country that gave me so much — **and I became the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress.**
**In short, making doughnuts in the morning before homeroom brought me all the way to Congress. With your help, it'll be the start of my story as Florida's next senator, too.**
My life has taught me that even the smallest acts, like kneading dough for minimum wage, have the power to create huge, transformative changes.**And with your small donation of just $10 dollars —** _about the price of a dozen doughnuts_**— or anything you can spare, you can have a big impact on my chances of competing with my ultrawealthy opponent and winning. **
**[So, friend, will you chip in $10 or anything you can before my midnight deadline to help me retire Rick Scott? This campaign is powered by small-dollar donations, so your support makes all the difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81561039/462844532/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk964-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjFkNzIyZTQtZWZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y_dMiYnyXY7xD_H0GpuM10eiW7HHeNLHnqZf5lVYi3s=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81561040/462844533/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=jtk964-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjFkNzIyZTQtZWZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y_dMiYnyXY7xD_H0GpuM10eiW7HHeNLHnqZf5lVYi3s=)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81561041/462844534/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk964-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjFkNzIyZTQtZWZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y_dMiYnyXY7xD_H0GpuM10eiW7HHeNLHnqZf5lVYi3s=)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81561042/462844535/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk964-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjFkNzIyZTQtZWZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y_dMiYnyXY7xD_H0GpuM10eiW7HHeNLHnqZf5lVYi3s=)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81561043/462844536/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk964-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjFkNzIyZTQtZWZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y_dMiYnyXY7xD_H0GpuM10eiW7HHeNLHnqZf5lVYi3s=)
---
I hope you enjoy the rest of your weekend.

Thank you,

Debbie
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81561044/462844537/-31196584?refcode=jtk964-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjFkNzIyZTQtZWZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y_dMiYnyXY7xD_H0GpuM10eiW7HHeNLHnqZf5lVYi3s=)
---
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7CGTHFDMeUWW_Wz2yFDujA2?unsubscribedata=PQmu5%2BSPm31jq%2FE4LXqZTR0qQDjBzoPjjZRC1n5Aaml2fiajbdy4nydG%2B%2FlT%2B9Mp0%2FbnErfYoFE%2FFHXi%2BlFLgxVws1DnBzNI6lCBM%2FO6iOdOO3XzGTKg%2FM%2Bsiw%2BmznS7lpaEjbV%2FcnoP%2B8ZkepnGs%2FN40SSESzwmK05iUYrqUaW8LN%2Bpm9M46jMNwkAznl%2BWH%2FhopVECVBQgy5%2BElHN09p0IlDelhKP6nlh3szJYUcSRkF%2FJ5r6g2h%2BMNZgSK3kFeuKY7n7eZyME6VN4mPdpxXgcl5n34hPgTVtuJO4PewRX0XjlviYTaoYU2fYN8aMpgqyBpXfw8IZoPiBSR1%2FTA2DiD2Gylzv0wlwFThU4vhZFckwvyuhI4SsWMqdWX%2Fo7mI4wdWFF%2FebOkWzBTSuIRiZsQuH7XtjIkL9u5pQKc4u9IKBDPwrodLmCOXsBXMZX) from Debbie's email list.

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. * * *
**_Begin Forwarded Message:_** March 31st is a really important deadline for our campaign. It’s the first Federal Election Commission (FEC) public filing deadline of the election year.

name: Scott Spector
subject: I just took a big risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Hi team — It’s Scott, Tammy Baldwin’s campaign manager.
I made a difficult decision, and I thought you should know about it.
As you may know, Republican megamillionaire Eric Hovde recently announced his Senate campaign to flip Tammy’s seat red. And just a week later, **our opponent flooded $2.5 million into Wisconsin to go up with self-funded TV and digital ads — several weeks before our campaign planned to launch ads of our own.**
Look, whoever has more resources to spend on TV will likely win this election. That means we can't let Hovde and his right-wing allies control the narrative. We need to make sure voters know the truth now.
After talking it through with Tammy and the team, we decided to increase our March advertising budget to go up with our own ads as soon as possible. The money wasn’t in the budget, but I gave the green light anyway.
I took a big risk here. There’s no doubt about it. But I was willing to bet that if I reached out and told the truth, our grassroots supporters would come through to help fill this unexpected hole in our budget. That’s the only way we can keep pace with the $20 million Hovde plans to spend.
[**So, can I count on you to split a donation between Tammy’s reelection campaign and The Long Run today? Every dollar we raise will help us close this budget gap so we can keep our new ads on the air and get Tammy’s message out to voters across the state.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.kt1qkh&refcode=em240424-1-tt&t=1&akid=5250%2E196590%2Ep3gIic)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Tammy Baldwin and The Long Run immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.xXZsil&amount=5&refcode=em240424-1-tt&t=20&akid=5250%2E196590%2Ep3gIic)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.ynuvNe&refcode=em240424-1-tt&t=21&akid=5250%2E196590%2Ep3gIic)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.qJsKrg&refcode=em240424-1-tt&t=22&akid=5250%2E196590%2Ep3gIic)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.EG5DJA&refcode=em240424-1-tt&t=23&akid=5250%2E196590%2Ep3gIic)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.ZhwC4S&refcode=em240424-1-tt&t=24&akid=5250%2E196590%2Ep3gIic)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.kt1qkh&refcode=em240424-1-tt&t=25&akid=5250%2E196590%2Ep3gIic)
Make no mistake: This was a tough call that carries a real risk, but Tammy knows we need to be doing everything we possibly can to defeat our opponent and win this election.
Thanks for chipping in today, if you can. We’re so grateful to have you on this team.
— Scott
Scott Spector
Campaign Manager
Tammy Baldwin for Senate

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=5250%2E196590%2Ep3gIic). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=27&akid=5250%2E196590%2Ep3gIic)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=28&refcode2=5250_196590_p3gIic&akid=5250%2E196590%2Ep3gIic)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=5250%2E196590%2Ep3gIic)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597 Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

clean_body: Can you help? | Donald Trump endorsed him. National GOP money groups are lining up to support him. And now, he’s the OFFICIAL Republican nominee for Governor. Peter, Mark Robinson is one of the most extreme statewide elected Republicans in the country, and he’s polling in a DEAD HEAT with Democratic nominee Josh Stein. There’s a real chance Robinson could win this toss-up race if we don’t create a surge of grassroots momentum for Josh. = | = Peter, we know that you cannot contribute every single time we ask. But when you give today, your contribution will go further than it could at any point from here on out. We’re not exaggerating when we say that the outcome of this race will determine whether North Carolina is set on a path for progress or whether rights and freedoms are denied to future generations. Mark Robinson is pushing for a total ban on abortion — with no exceptions for rape, incest, or the life of the mother. He wants to defund our public schools. And he’s touted dangerous conspiracies, claiming the moon landing might be fake and calling a victim of the Parkland shooting a “paid actor.” He even casts doubt on the Holocaust. He is determined to undo all the progress we’ve made under Governor Cooper’s leadership and drag us backward. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Let’s do this, Team Stein = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
