* * *
**_Begin Forwarded Message:_** I’m sure you get plenty of emails from campaigns this time of the month, lecturing you about fundraising deadlines and donations. Believe me when I say – asking for donations is my least favorite part of running a campaign. **But the fact of the matter is that these fundraising deadlines couldn’t be more important.**

At the end of this month, we are up against an FEC filing deadline, meaning that ALL of our numbers will be made public. This is our first major deadline of the election year, and the NRCC will be watching our numbers carefully to see where our campaign stands.

[We’ve set a goal of raising $20,000 by midnight on the 31st so we can show the NRCC exactly how strong our grassroots campaign is. Now here’s where you come in – can you chip in $10 or anything you can to help us reach this goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81563685/462851889/1809543647?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20240324_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_EOQ1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2E4OWFlZS1mM2U5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yRBC-H8WLYbJy_07zipv9rSDkVvenmjllUhtA3jfSbY=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

body:
I’m running to fire Scott Perry and to show my neighbors in PA-10 that: “I’ve got your back.”

Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/57CdP-wFgkuQm58EpOgxvQ2?unsubscribedata=BAULcJR%2BwOukHab4ZL%2BwPPAZLJD5bPZyjEoKnqj%2BaN6n3BdTFwo74rcSWK8fqyfL%2F7tykq9gHDmVhNfL5v11E0HO4C8a9Uvu%2F%2Fttla6ZpWmH4haXrezzmGombCq%2BULOwq%2FcC6jeMiSItFaPD%2B9zjHn6KjWEKNSihqruazqOmN%2FdffUPJv0KhKeXL3X9PhO5o1P0Q4q%2BQUgORL%2F43ymlbMekJQUR2oYOp1ZqgDqIwbw5sbfHtVrwQrlCeVBPCZka9%2BvLZDuuZyiTpfjkcrQLcEfguQOnAhKEQs24wMhVCi9VenhRc5oWHWb9OZyGcC6Gc%2FO0gpb%2BU2RwzT34sezLFZ8NZW5doVRceAobDTw1K6RyDTnE%2FXNrX%2Bxv3anP6H5DTjI3YqL0vvJvuI0mkNqs%2B7nI%2BbtLg2%2FNr%2FSazQFVHwrsVyOPHGZcCqpAQlvuqPTtm)

I am the oldest of four sisters. If you have younger siblings or are a caretaker of any kind, you know what it means to fight for the people you care about.

Growing up, I was (and still am!) my sisters’ biggest cheerleader. If anyone messed with them, I had their backs. Through my role as a big sister, I learned that I loved being a leader and an advocate. That knowledge motivated me to become a journalist.

But for the past 12 years, instead of working for us, Congressman Scott Perry has been taking care of... himself, only being accountable to the Republican dark money and special interest groups. He even voted to throw out our votes and plotted to overturn our democracy. I’m running to fire Scott Perry and to show my neighbors in PA-10 that: “I’ve got your back.”

[But I’m facing the biggest challenge of the year so far. At midnight on Sunday is the FEC’s end-of-quarter deadline. I will fight for women, whose right to bodily autonomy has been rolled back fifty years.

I’ll fight for you.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = I am the oldest of four sisters. If you have younger siblings or are a caretaker of any kind, you know what it means to fight for the people you care about. Growing up, I was (and still am!) my sisters’ biggest cheerleader. If anyone messed with them, I had their backs. Through my role as a big sister, I learned that I loved being a leader and an advocate. That knowledge motivated me to become a journalist. But for the past 12 years, instead of working for us, Congressman Scott Perry has been taking care of... himself, only being accountable to the Republican dark money and special interest groups. He even voted to throw out our votes and plotted to overturn our democracy. subject: I have a simple request.

body:
Will you pledge to vote to defend reproductive rights??

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81565705/462857980/-849459103?refcode=ea.1100ba93-f7e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.1100ba93-f7e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTAwYmE5My1mN2U5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mq2oIdu_YdDJqjdWq3l4GLXFNcrb2ZYwZbBzwrv7WbM=&emci=4d465d70-c4e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=1100ba93-f7e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=46764483)
---
**I have had an abortion.** Years ago, I was diagnosed with an aortic aneurysm while I was pregnant. The doctor said I needed an operation, and if we waited to take action, I could die. With my doctor, I was able to make the choice to end the pregnancy and have a life-saving operation to address the aneurysm. And that’s how it’s supposed to work. But we’ve all heard the stories since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned: Tennessee doctors are afraid of being prosecuted, so they’re telling their patients to travel away from home for life-saving abortion care and even refusing to treat pregnant patients who are facing medical emergencies. When their health was on the line, these women were denied a choice. MAGA Republicans think that they’ve won. After _Roe_ fell, they banned abortion access in Tennessee and so many other states. _But our fight isn’t over._ **We can restore and defend our freedom to access private, reproductive health care by electing leaders who will enshrine reproductive rights in federal law.** So, I’m asking if you’re ready to stand with me. **_[Will you join me in this important fight and pledge to vote for candidates who will protect our fundamental freedoms in the critical 2024 elections?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81565706/462857981/-219289305?refcode=ea.1100ba93-f7e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.1100ba93-f7e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTAwYmE5My1mN2U5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mq2oIdu_YdDJqjdWq3l4GLXFNcrb2ZYwZbBzwrv7WbM=&emci=4d465d70-c4e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=1100ba93-f7e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=46764483)_** | [**TAKE THE PLEDGE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81565707/462857982/-219289305?refcode=ea.1100ba93-f7e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.1100ba93-f7e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTAwYmE5My1mN2U5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mq2oIdu_YdDJqjdWq3l4GLXFNcrb2ZYwZbBzwrv7WbM=&emci=4d465d70-c4e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=1100ba93-f7e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=46764483)
---
Thank you,
Gloria
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81565708/462857983/-219289305?refcode=ea.1100ba93-f7e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.1100ba93-f7e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTAwYmE5My1mN2U5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mq2oIdu_YdDJqjdWq3l4GLXFNcrb2ZYwZbBzwrv7WbM=&emci=4d465d70-c4e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=1100ba93-f7e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=46764483)
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81565709/462857984/209297649?refcode=ea.1100ba93-f7e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.1100ba93-f7e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTAwYmE5My1mN2U5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mq2oIdu_YdDJqjdWq3l4GLXFNcrb2ZYwZbBzwrv7WbM=) Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

clean_body: Will you pledge to vote to defend reproductive rights?? | I have had an abortion. Years ago, I was diagnosed with an aortic aneurysm while I was pregnant. The doctor said I needed an operation, and if we waited to take action, I could die. With my doctor, I was able to make the choice to end the pregnancy and have a life-saving operation to address the aneurysm. And that’s how it’s supposed to work. But we’ve all heard the stories since Roe v. Wade was overturned: Tennessee doctors are afraid of being prosecuted, so they’re telling their patients to travel away from home for life-saving abortion care and even refusing to treat pregnant patients who are facing medical emergencies. When their health was on the line, these women were denied a choice. MAGA Republicans think that they’ve won. After Roe fell, they banned abortion access in Tennessee and so many other states. But our fight isn’t over. We can restore and defend our freedom to access private, reproductive health care by electing leaders who will enshrine reproductive rights in federal law. So, I’m asking if you’re ready to stand with me. | Thank you, Gloria | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. name: Tony Evers
subject: Saving democracy starts in Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Wisconsin Senate Republicans fired eight more hard working public servants | Derek,

The stakes are higher than ever: Wisconsin is expected to be the closest state in the country in 2024. And with the Republicans right here in our own Senate looking to sabotage us, we have to fight back harder than ever to save American democracy.

[**Before I tell you why this is important, can I count on you to chip in here to help us close our $4,441 fundraising goal before the deadline tonight at midnight?**](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2236?amount=&%3Brefcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.4&t=5&akid=6664%2E1827488%2EyHVOeg)

Just recently, Wisconsin Senate Republicans fired eight more hard working public servants appointed by my administration without any valid reason — simply because these appointees did not support their political agendas. These actions are petty and unprecedented.

**[Stand with me against Republican attacks on our democracy by chipping in here.](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2236?amount=&%3Brefcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.4&t=6&akid=6664%2E1827488%2EyHVOeg)**

Onward,

Tony

With working class Montanans starting to be priced out of their communities, MAGA Republicans have responded by making life harder for these same underserved communities. **Anja is ready to fight back, protect reproductive rights and take on those who stand in the way of more affordable housing.**
As a lifelong Montanan born and raised in Bozeman, Anja is now seeing just how difficult it is for locals to put down roots and stay in the community. She has the firsthand experience we need in our leaders if we’re ever going to make progress on priorities shared by millions of young people across the country.
And as someone with years of organizing experience, we know Anja has what it takes to run a winning campaign. That’s why we’re going all out to support her — but we need your help to do it.
[**Peter, the investments we make in our endorsed candidates can’t happen without you. So please, pitch in $5 or whatever you can today to help us elect leaders like Anja Wookey-Huffman this November:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em20240324-1?refcode=em20240324-1&amount=5&refcode2=490_587540_IddbQA&akid=490%2E587540%2EIddbQA)

name: Stop Funding Netanyahu's War via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Bernie fighting for humanitarian aid in Gaza and an end to funding Netanyahu's war
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Bernie continues to hit the airwaves to say unequivocally: the U.S.
government must stop supporting Netanyahu’s horrific war in Gaza that has
killed over 30,000 people and is blocking the food, water, and medical aid
that Palestinians desperately need. This time, Bernie was on All in with
Chris Hayes on MSNBC:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16366?t=1011&akid=5619%2E5885482%2Ez61KGW ][IMG]

OxFam just reported that Israel is still blocking food and water into Gaza
and that the situation is dire for millions of people. All while Israel
threatens even more aggressive and deadly military action. President Biden
and Congress must stop sending military aid to Netanyahu now and assure
humanitarian aid reaches the people of Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16268?source=email-20240324&t=1012&akid=5619%2E5885482%2Ez61KGW ]Support Bernie’s efforts to end U.S. support for the atrocities of the
Netanyahu government.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16268?source=email-20240324&t=1013&akid=5619%2E5885482%2Ez61KGW ]ADD YOUR NAME

Recently, Bernie wrote a letter to President Biden stating firmly and
decisively that Israel is breaking U.S. law and that continued U.S. aid to
Israel would violate the Foreign Assistance Act. That law bars military
support from going to any nation that restricts the delivery of
humanitarian aid.

Bernie said on MSNBC that no matter what propaganda is coming from
Netanyahu’s government, it is crystal clear that Israel is blocking aid to
Gaza.

Children are starving and people are dying because of American made
weapons. And because the U.S. government is not doing everything in its
power to make sure food and water get to the Palestinian people.

President Biden and Congress must listen to Bernie. No more American
weapons and taxpayer dollars for the war on Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16268?source=email-20240324&t=1014&akid=5619%2E5885482%2Ez61KGW ]Stand with Bernie: End U.S. complicity in the brutal war on Gaza.
President Biden and Congress must end all support for Netanyahu’s war and
Israel’s severe restrictions on humanitarian aid to Gaza.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Lila Rose, Live Action
subject: These diaper brands are pro-choice
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Friend of
Life,

Did you
know that America's most popular diaper brands, including
Huggies, Pampers, Hello Bello, and Honest Co., all support
abortion?

This is
peak irony. Brands that provide a necessity for babies also
financially and/or publicly support an act that intentionally
kills innocent children in the womb.

As
pro-life people, we can do something to put a stop to this.

Live
Action is hosting a diaper drive with EveryLife - the first
pro-life diaper company - to help mothers and their babies in
need.

If you're
tired of supporting brands that don't align with your pro-life
values, you can do something now to help women AND support a
pro-life business.

Your gift
of just $50 will provide six packs of EveryLife diapers to a mom
who is considering abortion or is facing a crisis and help her
embrace life. We are searching for 100 people who can give before
midnight so we can get diapers to local pro-life pregnancy
centers nationwide.

Is this
something you can do? Here's your secure link to give:
https://give.liveaction.org/send-a-box-of-diapers-to-a-mom-in-need/

EveryLife
prides itself in being a pro-life company that uses premium
materials for their diapers- and better yet, EveryLife promotes
the message that every baby is a miracle from God who deserves to
be loved, protected, and supported.

Your gift
will send a box of diapers to a local pro-life pregnancy clinic
so that moms days away from a potentially life-ending decision
can receive the practical support they need to choose life.

There's
only a few hours to go and we haven't been able to reach our goal
of 100 partners before midnight. Please consider donating right
now before this opportunity expires.

Thank you
in advance for standing with us against big abortion and
equipping moms to choose life.

For Life,

Lila Rose
President
and Founder

2200
Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

| Peter,
Don't miss out--reserve your ticket today [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KxjDhRHSbNiZs7hb6GXSoqsfF_i9D2qeM4lKXmKiAd2PXcgyaeu-ZkVre7p8hajoZ0_b-DLfgKJ67KwAOjU1ybA6nyzYxkkkmolMMtiSYfCoTVfYxGDrF4La-c7EDESt9gvL2NKsyIy7MC_IvwChcZaEdPWTabWmsRL4LB2H_UFDt12rE3hoNt-kR__bjL8fHPGnS0VnCfw=&c=DuDI84mLxJhpt1c1DYzDBvV8c4om5-m-cIj3Vi9-S3Y3Dc02ytbXtQ==&ch=JwvhO2tPHEZjt9wbmiAq7Ars1MpfdrCJOb470mvI8LXk2QpoIQyYgA==)!
Please join Chuck Rolecek and Seacoast Republicans at a reception benefitting former Executive Councilor Russell Prescott in his bid for U.S. Congress. This is a special opportunity to hear directly from Russell about his campaign strategy and what he'll do for the people of NH-01 when he wins this race.
Russell is running for Congress because leaders in Washington are failing the Granite State. Given his extensive experience, Russell is the only candidate poised to really make a difference--and he needs our help to get there.
[CLICK HERE to RSVP for our March 28 event. Space is limited.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KxjDhRHSbNiZs7hb6GXSoqsfF_i9D2qeM4lKXmKiAd2PXcgyaeu-ZkVre7p8hajoZ0_b-DLfgKJ67KwAOjU1ybA6nyzYxkkkmolMMtiSYfCoTVfYxGDrF4La-c7EDESt9gvL2NKsyIy7MC_IvwChcZaEdPWTabWmsRL4LB2H_UFDt12rE3hoNt-kR__bjL8fHPGnS0VnCfw=&c=DuDI84mLxJhpt1c1DYzDBvV8c4om5-m-cIj3Vi9-S3Y3Dc02ytbXtQ==&ch=JwvhO2tPHEZjt9wbmiAq7Ars1MpfdrCJOb470mvI8LXk2QpoIQyYgA==)
This event will take place on Thursday, March 28 at 5:00 PM at CR's Restaurant in Hampton, New Hampshire. See below for further details and RSVP information.
Thank you, friend, for all your doing to advance our common cause. Your support means the world to Russell and we look forward to seeing you on March 28!

---

| A note from Russell...
The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington.
Thank you.
-Russell

clean_body: Thursday, March 28 | | | | == | Peter, Don't miss out--reserve your ticket today ==! Please join Chuck Rolecek and Seacoast Republicans at a reception benefitting former Executive Councilor Russell Prescott in his bid for U.S. Congress. This is a special opportunity to hear directly from Russell about his campaign strategy and what he'll do for the people of NH-01 when he wins this race. Russell is running for Congress because leaders in Washington are failing the Granite State. Given his extensive experience, Russell is the only candidate poised to really make a difference--and he needs our help to get there. == This event will take place on Thursday, March 28 at 5:00 PM at CR's Restaurant in Hampton, New Hampshire. See below for further details and RSVP information. Thank you, friend, for all your doing to advance our common cause. Your support means the world to Russell and we look forward to seeing you on March 28! | | == | == | | == | == | Follow Russell on Social Media: | == == == | == | A note from Russell... The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington. Thank you. -Russell Peter \- Forward this message to 5 FRIENDS AND FAMILY MEMBERS and help us raise awareness for our mission to achieve a better future for New Hampshire. subject: Exclusive: South Side GOP Hosts Packed House During Grand Opening
body:
With SiriusXM Host Sonnie Johnson broadcasting live, the South Side GOP's grand opening was met by a standing-room only crowd.

South Side GOP Hosts a Packed House as SiriusXM Host Sonnie Johnson Broadcasts Lives During Grand Opening (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/03/south-side-gop-hosts-a-packed-house-as-siriusxm-host-sonnie-johnson-broadcasts-live-during-grand-opening.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e109969acb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

SiriusXM radio host Sonnie Johnson broadcasts live during the South Side GOP's grand opening on March 23, 2024. (Illinois Review)

By Illinois Review

The South Side Republican Organization welcomed SiriusXM conservative radio host Sonnie Johnson, who hosted her show live in front of a packed house, as the group celebrated the grand opening of their new headquarters in Chicago named the Booker T. Washington and Ida B. Wells Renaissance Center on Saturday.

Earlier in the day, the South Side Republican group hosted a ribbon cutting ceremony, followed by a live broadcast with Johnson, a panel discussion and then a party hosted at a local restaurant to cap off the historic day.

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Hilary needs your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz
body:
I'm reaching out to you to join this powerful team and give Hilary the support she needs to bring the same urgency she did as our groundbreaking public lands commissioner to the other Washington.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81571277/462868863/-1058819047?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-03-24_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNiNDA4ZjQtZmZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DByTnJQqD2cFYdzs6fmVgRpt5gEsD6YW80GEdVHdgww=)
---
| Peter,

It’s been an honor to represent the region where I grew up, and I care a lot about who the next representative for this region will be. That’s why I'm supporting Hilary Franz in her run for Washington’s 6th Congressional District.

My upbringing on the Olympic Peninsula shaped me as a person and as a leader. It’s why my office’s core mission has been “creating more economic opportunity for more people in more places.”

This district is diverse in all senses of the word. Our team has helped folks get broadband access, secured funding for ports to keep our small businesses competitive in a global economy, fought for rural hospitals so they can continue delivering care, stood up for Shipyard workers, helped build affordable housing in Tacoma, worked to address traffic in Gorst, secured funding to protect the Puget Sound, and so much more.

I’m proud to support Hilary because I know she has the experience and passion to serve this district in all its diverse needs. In a time when catastrophic climate events are happening with more frequency and our housing crisis is keeping too many folks from economic security, our nation needs Hilary’s experience in Congress, and Washington needs her leadership.

Now, I'm reaching out to you to join this powerful team and give Hilary the support she needs to bring the same urgency she did as our groundbreaking public lands commissioner to the other Washington.

[_**As Hilary takes on the pressing challenges that extend beyond our state's borders, can she count on your support by contributing $25 today? With her first FEC fundraising deadline of the election year on March 31, she needs your help showing her grassroots strength.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81571281/462868867/-1503679382?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-03-24_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNiNDA4ZjQtZmZlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DByTnJQqD2cFYdzs6fmVgRpt5gEsD6YW80GEdVHdgww=)

subject: Will you help us defeat Josh Hawley this year?

body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81572856/462872197/106945853?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3639-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzM5MjY1Yi0wMWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LxPgOBQ8x7kJra-44Y0_eW-6KRh2qyzc5Ft8ND36A4=)
Hi there, it’s Jon Hamm.

I’m a born-and-raised Missourian who watched with horror when Josh Hawley raised his fist at insurrectionists outside the U.S. Capitol on January 6th, then ran out the back door when they stormed the building later that day.

I’ve seen communities across my home state torn apart because of cowardly politicians like him — and I’m not willing to sit on the sidelines in this election.
**[So before I ask you to split a donation of $5 or whatever you can today between my friend Lucas Kunce’s campaign and Jacky Rosen to replace Josh Hawley, please let me tell you why:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81572857/462872198/106945853?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3639-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzM5MjY1Yi0wMWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LxPgOBQ8x7kJra-44Y0_eW-6KRh2qyzc5Ft8ND36A4=)**
| | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81572858/462872199/106945853?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3639-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzM5MjY1Yi0wMWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LxPgOBQ8x7kJra-44Y0_eW-6KRh2qyzc5Ft8ND36A4=)
---
Most of my family is from a town in Missouri called Ste. Genevieve, about 60 miles south of St. Louis. I’ve watched their community go downhill for years.

While corrupt politicians shipped jobs overseas and voted to give handouts to Wall Street and their corporate allies, everyday people just trying to survive in the place they call home ran out of money and opportunities.
**Our leaders abandoned them — and Josh Hawley is the perfect example.**

Instead of fighting for what would make the communities in my home state stronger, Josh Hawley has been busy engaging in the out-of-touch culture wars that only divide us — all so he can get more and more power for himself.
That’s what we saw on January 6th, 2021. Hawley raised his fist at rioters outside the Capitol because he thought it would make himself look strong. But when sh*t got real, he ran out the back door like a coward — away from the same people he was claiming to support just hours earlier.

What’s even more ridiculous? Since that day, Hawley has desperately tried to convince all of us that he’s the authority on what it means to be a man in this country. He even published a whole book about it earlier this year:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81572859/462872200/106945853?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3639-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzM5MjY1Yi0wMWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LxPgOBQ8x7kJra-44Y0_eW-6KRh2qyzc5Ft8ND36A4=)
Well... when I think about manhood, I think about courage. And that’s not something you can write a book about.

Missouri is the Show Me State. Courage is something you have to show us.
**That’s why I’m supporting Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.** As a born-and-raised Missourian who joined the Marines to serve the community that took care of him growing up, Lucas has already shown us that he knows the true meaning of courage.

Lucas knows courage is about standing up to the powerful and working to rebuild our state. And he knows real leaders fight to empower everyday people and secure our future for generations to come — not for their own power or profit.
So friend, if you want to be told about manhood, some guy wrote a book about it. **[But if you want someone to show you real courage, please join me in supporting Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate by splitting a donation of $5 between his campaign and Jacky Rosen today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81572860/462872201/106945853?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk3639-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzM5MjY1Yi0wMWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LxPgOBQ8x7kJra-44Y0_eW-6KRh2qyzc5Ft8ND36A4=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation split between Lucas Kunce and Jacky Rosen will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81572861/462872202/106945853?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk3639-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzM5MjY1Yi0wMWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LxPgOBQ8x7kJra-44Y0_eW-6KRh2qyzc5Ft8ND36A4=)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81572862/462872203/106945853?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk3639-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzM5MjY1Yi0wMWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LxPgOBQ8x7kJra-44Y0_eW-6KRh2qyzc5Ft8ND36A4=)
---
| | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81572863/462872204/106945853?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk3639-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzM5MjY1Yi0wMWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LxPgOBQ8x7kJra-44Y0_eW-6KRh2qyzc5Ft8ND36A4=)
---
| | [Donate another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81572864/462872205/106945853?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3639-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzM5MjY1Yi0wMWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LxPgOBQ8x7kJra-44Y0_eW-6KRh2qyzc5Ft8ND36A4=)
---
**Lucas worked hard over the last year to put Missouri’s Senate race on the map.** From calling out Josh Hawley’s blatant corruption to building a coalition of working people, pro-democracy organizations like End Citizens United, and local leaders across Missouri — he is Democrats’ best chance to defeat a GOP incumbent and flip a U.S. Senate seat this election cycle.

He’s building a truly grassroots campaign to defeat Hawley and take back power for everyday working Missourians — just like my friends and family in Ste. Genevieve.
It has never been more important to elect a warrior for working people like Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate. **[So friend, will you join me in supporting Lucas Kunce by splitting a donation of $5 between his grassroots campaign and Jacky Rosen today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81572865/462872206/106945853?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk3639-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzM5MjY1Yi0wMWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LxPgOBQ8x7kJra-44Y0_eW-6KRh2qyzc5Ft8ND36A4=)**
| | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81572866/462872207/106945853?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3639-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzM5MjY1Yi0wMWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LxPgOBQ8x7kJra-44Y0_eW-6KRh2qyzc5Ft8ND36A4=)
---
Thanks for standing with me,

Jon Hamm

| | Fellow American, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=93550161a58d4c7e95c277e3f2bbdec0&_e=frTdk-HSlKq0m7kDQCfo4t6lk4PyBFp85d5faWQ5ZPrcABqMDsUQLFS5Rb47axugpkdG7pKqTR_SbkKA9jnkUYWiVYRG3L-d8UYQCvZ-SMYMEZyi-2U0_CLmOseOfm3dAvfC7mLchsworfZf1-ytW6RNnq9PdSPNxV4RAqY3mXcvyA1dIyuMm7qkvX-M_4QrtUpDF1qeqWMfN0AcWKSVKKEesi91morcLCz4jfaL40hpT-2oREmmBq9zkw3Pzev56rTA9pRU0EsJ1qQZ8vYixF42237goa7zb-HtixXkV0sJ0CsRBF2RCqHfRAXlrM6ku85nZxue88hw5IRG9F5gDcMW-qn51Qk7WXomY59sghAyX0bMFjpBywd1KuwudHiJL3OMJLX8NDvpAV4feJgl4A%3D%3D)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they'd rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=93550161a58d4c7e95c277e3f2bbdec0&_e=frTdk-HSlKq0m7kDQCfo4t6lk4PyBFp85d5faWQ5ZPrcABqMDsUQLFS5Rb47axugpkdG7pKqTR_SbkKA9jnkUYWiVYRG3L-d8UYQCvZ-SMYMEZyi-2U0_CLmOseOfm3dAvfC7mLchsworfZf1-ytW6RNnq9PdSPNxV4RAqY3mXcvyA1dIyuMm7qkvX-M_4QrtUpDF1qeqWMfN0AcWKSVKKEesi91morcLCz4jfaL40hLPjNr6lPprsBagUEHy9OuB03wJO3O5gV8c_vOtD3dhzgLPX1Kr7Y8uzXJUoo-7C0uh9O9LfbBu5yRwc1BaICvegMzHcE3z--i9s8hw3aRzAlQmIavIyJC_56W7vdsHFI_5oVi2vrGSWR6t0oq0FNw-0tYhUme5QD7rEkwbymhKQ%3D%3D) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There's no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: This is personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
I’m running for Governor, because I know we can do better – and I’m ready to bring my unwavering dedication to hard work and my commitment to uniting individuals to address the genuine issues affecting our Commonwealth.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81574251/462874454/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-03-24_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzNiYjA4MmMtMDNlYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=H_aSY_zHkRM4iVoQ4QkuwC2T-V-9G0mzFpuEkBGWSqA=)
---
| Peter, I'm running for Governor of Virginia, because this race is personal to me. Let me explain why.

Growing up, we moved around multiple times for my father’s job, but ultimately, we settled in Virginia. My parents — my father, a veteran and law enforcement officer, and my mother, a nurse — instilled in me a deep devotion to our country and an abiding commitment to service. I attended Henrico County Public Schools and went on to attend the University of Virginia. After graduation, I began my career as a federal law enforcement officer — working on money laundering cases and tracking narcotics traffickers with the U.S. Postal Inspection Service. I then joined the CIA as a case officer, where I worked undercover, collecting intelligence, managing assets, and overseeing high-profile programs to combat terrorism and keep Americans safe.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81574254/462874464/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-03-24_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzNiYjA4MmMtMDNlYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=H_aSY_zHkRM4iVoQ4QkuwC2T-V-9G0mzFpuEkBGWSqA=)
In 2014, Adam and I moved back to Henrico County, just miles from where we grew up, to raise our own children. I never thought I would one day run for elected office, but when I saw the division and dysfunction threatening our country after the 2016 election, I knew our country and Virginia’s 7th District deserved better.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81574257/462874470/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-03-24_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzNiYjA4MmMtMDNlYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=H_aSY_zHkRM4iVoQ4QkuwC2T-V-9G0mzFpuEkBGWSqA=)
In Congress, I’ve worked every day to lower prescription drug costs, protect our democracy, support our veterans, defend our rights, and more. But now, Virginia is seeing dangerous and divisive rhetoric take over Richmond and drive extreme policies.

clean_body: I’m running for Governor, because I know we can do better – and I’m ready to bring my unwavering dedication to hard work and my commitment to uniting individuals to address the genuine issues affecting our Commonwealth. | = | Peter, I'm running for Governor of Virginia, because this race is personal to me. Let me explain why. Growing up, we moved around multiple times for my father’s job, but ultimately, we settled in Virginia. My parents — my father, a veteran and law enforcement officer, and my mother, a nurse — instilled in me a deep devotion to our country and an abiding commitment to service. I attended Henrico County Public Schools and went on to attend the University of Virginia. After graduation, I began my career as a federal law enforcement officer — working on money laundering cases and tracking narcotics traffickers with the U.S. Postal Inspection Service. I then joined the CIA as a case officer, where I worked undercover, collecting intelligence, managing assets, and overseeing high-profile programs to combat terrorism and keep Americans safe. = In 2014, Adam and I moved back to Henrico County, just miles from where we grew up, to raise our own children. I never thought I would one day run for elected office, but when I saw the division and dysfunction threatening our country after the 2016 election, I knew our country and Virginia’s 7th District deserved better. = In Congress, I’ve worked every day to lower prescription drug costs, protect our democracy, support our veterans, defend our rights, and more. But now, Virginia is seeing dangerous and divisive rhetoric take over Richmond and drive extreme policies. I’m running for Governor, because I know we can do better – and I’m ready to bring my unwavering dedication to hard work and my commitment to uniting individuals to address the genuine issues affecting our Commonwealth. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. What's the big deal about an "end-of-quarter deadline" anyway? Well, let us break it down for you.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81574416/462874798/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGVhOTM3My0wM2VhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m3Vu5Uw7drA1j9ugOpP4bCkZKtCjQQClUFLPJE1Ye9k=&emci=97e66fde-89e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=74ea9373-03ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

As we gear up for our very first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of 2024, we've set an ambitious goal: **raising $20,000 by the end of the month.**

But you might be wondering, what's the big deal about an "end-of-quarter deadline" anyway? Well, let us break it down for you (or, if you’re already on board, you can [**donate here!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81574417/462874799/-235138156?refcode=em24_240324_eoq1_fnd_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240324_eoq1_fnd_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode2=74ea9373-03ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGVhOTM3My0wM2VhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m3Vu5Uw7drA1j9ugOpP4bCkZKtCjQQClUFLPJE1Ye9k=)).

At the end of every financial quarter, the Federal Elections Commission (FEC) requires all campaigns to publicly release their financial records. The money we raise through the end of March will determine _exactly_ what our campaign can afford to pay for as we get closer to Election Day. **This means that the media and political pundits will know just what this team is capable of in our fight to keep PA-08 blue.**

It’s not just numbers on a spreadsheet – it’s about showing our strength and resilience as a campaign. **With our opponent already pouring hundreds of thousands of his own money into this race, it’s crucial that we demonstrate our grassroots support and prove that Matt is ready to fight tooth and nail to keep PA-08 blue.**

In this “toss-up” race, every last dollar matters. clean_body: What's the big deal about an "end-of-quarter deadline" anyway? Well, let us break it down for you. | Peter, As we gear up for our very first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of 2024, we've set an ambitious goal: raising $20,000 by the end of the month. But you might be wondering, what's the big deal about an "end-of-quarter deadline" anyway? Well, let us break it down for you (or, if you’re already on board, you can =). At the end of every financial quarter, the Federal Elections Commission (FEC) requires all campaigns to publicly release their financial records. The money we raise through the end of March will determine exactly what our campaign can afford to pay for as we get closer to Election Day. This means that the media and political pundits will know just what this team is capable of in our fight to keep PA-08 blue. It’s not just numbers on a spreadsheet – it’s about showing our strength and resilience as a campaign. With our opponent already pouring hundreds of thousands of his own money into this race, it’s crucial that we demonstrate our grassroots support and prove that Matt is ready to fight tooth and nail to keep PA-08 blue. In this “toss-up” race, every last dollar matters. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Cartwright In 2022, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. He's gearing up for another tough re-election, and he needs your support to keep PA-08 blue. Rush a donation right away to help Matt protect his seat. | = = | "Facebook" "Twitter" "Twitter" | Paid for by Cartwright for Congress | Cartwright For Congress PO Box 414 Scranton, PA 18501 United States Click here to from the Cartwright for Congress.

subject: 34 years ago today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81574786/462875312/-401216107?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTM1MTI4MTYtMDRlYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WrYiTgRivr1d5ToerLk4I1BVHNvmQnIX-ObmLV0FA74=)
Hi there,

34 years ago today I walked down the aisle to say “I do” to a man I would share much of my life with. I had no idea the adventures, the ups and downs that would lie ahead loving and being loved by Grant.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81574787/462875313/-401216107?refcode=em-3.24.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTM1MTI4MTYtMDRlYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WrYiTgRivr1d5ToerLk4I1BVHNvmQnIX-ObmLV0FA74=)
We merged my two cats and his two kids under one messy roof. We had two boys and then adopted our sweet girl. Grant got to see how loud, bossy, and loving a Cuban family can be, and I got to experience the deep love he had for Arizona.

I saw from his parents that service was their guiding light. I learned from Grant that the courage to speak up and fight for justice, regardless of consequences, was the only way to live.

So here I am, in a place I never thought I would be. It’s been almost 2 and a half years since Grant’s passing. Every day I miss his energy, his irreverent jokes, and unfailing loyalty. But I can unequivocally tell you I am who I am because of his love for me.

Life is unpredictable – but I will continue the legacy of both of our families: hard work, service and fearless leadership on behalf of our community and our country.

It’s hard to run this race without Grant by my side, but his love for Arizona, and our country, serves as my guiding light.

**[If you’re able, it would mean a lot to me if you could chip in $3 or any amount today to boost our Arizona focused campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81574788/462875314/-401216107?refcode=em-3.24.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTM1MTI4MTYtMDRlYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WrYiTgRivr1d5ToerLk4I1BVHNvmQnIX-ObmLV0FA74=)**

Thank you,

Marlene

name: Juanjo at United We Dream Action
subject: The status of SB4
body:
It’s been a busy week. | | | Peter: **First** : Texas legislators passed SB4, a law that would give Texas police the authority to arrest people who they simply **_suspect_** of crossing the border while undocumented, subjecting them to jail time or even deportation. This has major implications for Texans across the state and is expected to open up Black and brown people, including immigrants,to racial profiling, harassment, and violence. **Then** : Facing community pressure, the Biden administration sued Texas, leading federal courts to temporarily block the unconstitutional law from going into effect. Since then, it has made its way up to the Supreme Court — where it was paused, then allowed to go into effect, and then **paused again** by a lower court. **Now** : We’re still waiting to find out the fate of SB4. The most recent pause has bought us more time to continue fighting against this racist, dangerous, unconstitutional law before it’s put into action. This is a critical moment for the future of immigration policy and justice in the United States. Together, we must unapologetically reject these hate-filled policies from becoming law in our communities and make it clear that we are making strides to build a future where we welcome immigrants with dignity, humanity, and care. **Immigrant youth and our allies have the power to create the future we want to see, through advocacy, organizing, and applying political pressure. But mobilizing takes resources — and that’s where we need you, Peter.** **[Pitch in $10 now to help us fight back against SB4 and similar laws emerging around the country:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrUddQRDIDaucNvllUc-ZGCMKU4hkqphtlqht-n3UJdhMy5vVsNN8gD3nWO7df9PXYoJhoO4rYmv7riZDCSZNGgCCFdnoK3h_-7vbTrPgTLKzP_lGOAlQOX_3JUqaohko4YRNyVy4YfFgskxAasaMw2kAkkZbI_an3lJxKDvjIDHNYhP79_IYYE9Df9AgFsw6Wgw0-6GB9I-BslZtH-6euorbgVBYllMszaR1FIeRGv7R27LMcy3mSVb3TJmPTuB7Y5B9a8OgHYSBvZv_P7GJ1IKh6EvkMPq0bRro4kWjSVztRH2KuulSe5CI6fQPuP27H5XfmhZBF_XT1wd9Bs_KyR5a5jQsVjtTr4IkZzQXf0Z1ao2Y9zdMcmaua0GygqvjUA6b6z11vOlnaAFKSDA31Bg/44x/jLJVaIUrRB6aRph1iIWQBQ/h0/h001.JLzrWxvtNlKNhkeImgE2lHO_U7ZQjPIOKjysMyoI-aI)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrUddQRDIDaucNvllUc-ZGCMKU4hkqphtlqht-n3UJdhMy5vVsNN8gD3nWO7df9PXYFWpozrR3UPsDf5QPJlg1pPAbPf7mDHv_njschVY7ofm2Fmn90tS2ZG9jRyxXzuAEQCMZhperGXMOIOqnWuAFO5mgjRbii4RBBBJNO62Gw1BqNDAAtGypAZOPB-jc7eWYaKvlHmCAXG-YPLmk510HcggpPzvn9FNd54jVxlQFnO_Gkv3NF6xDXu_uTMdr5f96EWs3s6pkXGqQVUV7VQxdHwqqIj0gkKe9z8m3pMCPNLCdFyN1JphBBVTMgIbXCS8n-JSVafo1_K3-FQrzXEA0r5QTJ8c4oki-OErzf6Ww7wwcRbQNS5uKfEOU8OXlW-Za8T8_BS6YIyqoadwrQ29G61ealgbJdwyVa6cnUji_Ux4/44x/jLJVaIUrRB6aRph1iIWQBQ/h1/h001._ru0dJwBuNVGiXFPLu2vB_5dwTwmPfaA3N2Sq3Nvdjk)

clean_body: It’s been a busy week. | | | Peter: First : Texas legislators passed SB4, a law that would give Texas police the authority to arrest people who they simply suspect of crossing the border while undocumented, subjecting them to jail time or even deportation. This has major implications for Texans across the state and is expected to open up Black and brown people, including immigrants,to racial profiling, harassment, and violence. Then : Facing community pressure, the Biden administration sued Texas, leading federal courts to temporarily block the unconstitutional law from going into effect. Since then, it has made its way up to the Supreme Court — where it was paused, then allowed to go into effect, and then paused again by a lower court. Now : We’re still waiting to find out the fate of SB4. The most recent pause has bought us more time to continue fighting against this racist, dangerous, unconstitutional law before it’s put into action. This is a critical moment for the future of immigration policy and justice in the United States. Together, we must unapologetically reject these hate-filled policies from becoming law in our communities and make it clear that we are making strides to build a future where we welcome immigrants with dignity, humanity, and care. Immigrant youth and our allies have the power to create the future we want to see, through advocacy, organizing, and applying political pressure. But mobilizing takes resources — and that’s where we need you, Peter. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for standing with us in this important moment, Juanjo, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight for immigrant justice. Join them by starting a recurring donation today: | |

Believe me when I say that writing fundraising emails is not why I decided to run for Congress | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81575144/462876619/-1077420326?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20240324_fr_eoq2_cand_sm_act_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGZhYmU0ZGUtMDRlYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KRWaK8WfinB_hNj588wKn6HNcnw8n2DtFzIMasquS_0=)
---
Hi Peter, There are only _seven days_ between now and the end of the quarter – which means we need all the help we can get to meet our fundraising goal. | [Chip in $7](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81575145/462876620/-1077420326?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20240324_fr_eoq2_cand_sm_act_xx_sbt&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGZhYmU0ZGUtMDRlYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KRWaK8WfinB_hNj588wKn6HNcnw8n2DtFzIMasquS_0=)
---
Believe me when I say that writing fundraising emails is _not_ why I decided to run for Congress – but sadly, the need to raise money is an ever-present, time-consuming challenge for every candidate. **The simple truth is that without money, campaigns cannot reach voters, organize communities, or run ads.**
Rather than send you a big all-caps "DEADLINE" email, I want to share how your money will be used, and why it's so important to our campaign.
1. **Campaigns are required to publicly report their finances once a quarter.** These numbers are used by pundits, politicos, and journalists to assess the viability and strength of a campaign. To put it simply: what we raise impacts our ability to grow our team and message to voters. If we don't raise enough money, people won't take us seriously. And, we need all the support we can get.

2. **Donations help us travel the district and meet voters.** Since joining this race nearly a year ago, I've attended dozens of events across the district. As you can imagine, traveling back and forth between our two peninsulas isn't cheap — our campaign manager estimates it costs our team roughly $700 every time we head up north. Add in the advertising that we'll need to buy in advance of the August primary, and those expenses start to pile up.

3. **This campaign is funded by the people, not the powers that be.** Rep. Jack Bergman has the luxury of cashing more than $30,000 worth of checks from lobbyists to fund his campaign. I do not. I'm proud to be from _this_ community, not Washington, D.C., but that does mean I'm playing a man down when it comes to keeping up with Rep. Bergman's fundraising.

**The bottom line here is that this race is winnable — but _only_ if we have the resources necessary to talk to voters.**
So please, if you've been considering making a donation, now is the time to do so. Every moment between now and the end of the month will shape the success of this campaign for months to come. _**[Chip in today and help flip MI-01 Blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81575146/462876621/-1077420326?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20240324_fr_eoq2_cand_sm_act_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGZhYmU0ZGUtMDRlYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KRWaK8WfinB_hNj588wKn6HNcnw8n2DtFzIMasquS_0=)**_

name: COURIER
subject: Can you help us meet our goal?
body:
Closing in on our March deadline

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81575966/462878252/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTdiZTgxMTItMDZlYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X8huBRUDuy4DD9m9r-6z8024y_DwIHCYHVrRNqpIRP0=&emci=93be8112-06ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=97be8112-06ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=14016711)
Hey Peter,
In just a few days, March and the first quarter of 2024 will end. We know your inbox will be flooded with requests like this, so we’re getting ahead of the curve because our work to protect democracy from right-wing election lies and conspiracy theories is more important than ever.
We’ll make this quick:
[**We set a lofty goal for March—$25,000 raised—and right now, we’re behind by $9,000. So, if you support our mission to provide factual local news in the communities that need it most, can you give $10 to help us meet our goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81575967/462878253/-593472309?refcode=20240324-EM-GoalUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTdiZTgxMTItMDZlYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X8huBRUDuy4DD9m9r-6z8024y_DwIHCYHVrRNqpIRP0=)
**In 2024, it’s more important than ever that we have good information to combat the right-wing lies and conspiracy theories voters are seeing on their social media feeds and in their email inboxes. **
Already, we’re seeing the legacy media barely mention Donald Trump’s age while obsessively covering Joe Biden’s (even though Biden is only four years older). We’ve seen Trump’s use of authoritarian, violent rhetoric reduced to the kind of “both sides” coverage more suited to covering March Madness than an election where the Republican candidate is promising a revenge tour if he’s elected.
**And we’re watching right-wing bad actors like Fox News and Tucker Carlson plant the seeds to make another bogus stolen election claim like they did in the aftermath of 2020.**
Peter, the legacy and right-wing media are failing our democracy at the absolute worst moment. Worst of all, local newsrooms are closing, and we’re losing access to trustworthy journalism about the issues that most directly impact our communities.
The good news? **We built COURIER for just this moment.**
Our ten battleground newsrooms cover essential local issues without sensationalism or bias. While local news outlets across the country are being bought up by right-wing media empires, firing employees, or shutting down altogether, COURIER is expanding. We’re hiring more reporters and opening a brand new Texas newsroom before the year ends.
[**But we can’t do that without your help. So, if you can, please chip in $10 to help us meet our goal and continue providing local news to the communities that need it most.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81575968/462878254/-593472309?refcode=20240324-EM-GoalUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTdiZTgxMTItMDZlYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X8huBRUDuy4DD9m9r-6z8024y_DwIHCYHVrRNqpIRP0=)
Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81575969/462878255/-593472309?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20240324-EM-GoalUpdate&refcode2=97be8112-06ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTdiZTgxMTItMDZlYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X8huBRUDuy4DD9m9r-6z8024y_DwIHCYHVrRNqpIRP0=) clean_body: Closing in on our March deadline Hey Peter, In just a few days, March and the first quarter of 2024 will end. We know your inbox will be flooded with requests like this, so we’re getting ahead of the curve because our work to protect democracy from right-wing election lies and conspiracy theories is more important than ever. We’ll make this quick: = In 2024, it’s more important than ever that we have good information to combat the right-wing lies and conspiracy theories voters are seeing on their social media feeds and in their email inboxes. Already, we’re seeing the legacy media barely mention Donald Trump’s age while obsessively covering Joe Biden’s (even though Biden is only four years older). We’ve seen Trump’s use of authoritarian, violent rhetoric reduced to the kind of “both sides” coverage more suited to covering March Madness than an election where the Republican candidate is promising a revenge tour if he’s elected. And we’re watching right-wing bad actors like Fox News and Tucker Carlson plant the seeds to make another bogus stolen election claim like they did in the aftermath of 2020. Peter, the legacy and right-wing media are failing our democracy at the absolute worst moment. Worst of all, local newsrooms are closing, and we’re losing access to trustworthy journalism about the issues that most directly impact our communities. The good news? We built COURIER for just this moment. Our ten battleground newsrooms cover essential local issues without sensationalism or bias. While local news outlets across the country are being bought up by right-wing media empires, firing employees, or shutting down altogether, COURIER is expanding. We’re hiring more reporters and opening a brand new Texas newsroom before the year ends. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thanks, COURIER Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: Kimberly Guilfoyle
subject: She’s the REAL DEAL, people!
body:
Let me say this in no uncertain terms:

| |
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/CW0PFYEFZ1QEF8cJv2Lgag~~/AARclAA~_LhmAGZxFMHRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "Kimberly Guilfoyle")
---

I'll tell you what I said on my show:

**MARSHA BLACKBURN - THE FABULOUS SENATOR FROM TENNESSEE - IS THE REAL DEAL, PEOPLE!**

She's a leader of our MAGA movement. She's a tough-as-nails Conservative. And she's a wall standing in the way of Joe Biden's radical agenda.

She's also up for re-election in November. Normally, she would soar through the finish line since she's a top ally of President Trump... but unfortunately, we have a problem.

Chuck Schumer recruited a power-hungry, showboating socialist in a desperate attempt to destroy any opposition to his agenda and defeat Marsha.

In fact, Marsha's opponent just joined forces with Hollywood elite types to turbocharge her negative campaign to flip Tennessee.

Let me say this in no uncertain terms:

_If this radical socialist manages to flip Tennessee, our path to winning back the Senate Majority will COMPLETELY VANISH. _

_**[So, with all that being said, I respectfully ask you for the FIRST TIME to donate right now to Marsha Blackburn's re-election campaign.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/CW0PFYEFZ1QEF8cJv2Lgag~~/AARclAA~_LhmAGZxFMHRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "So, with all that being said, I respectfully ask you for the FIRST TIME to donate right now to Marsha Blackburn’s re-election campaign.")**_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN ME: DONATE NOW](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/CW0PFYEFZ1QEF8cJv2Lgag~~/AARclAA~_LhmAGZxFMHRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "PLEASE JOIN ME: DONATE NOW")
---
I don't send these types of emails very often.

If you're like me, these types of political emails kind of drive you crazy. But this is no ordinary request.

**Marsha Blackburn is exactly the kind of strong, patriotic conservative President Trump needs in the U.S. Senate. **

No surprise here, but Marsha's socialist opponent turned to big liberal names to help bankroll her campaign. Luckily, we have you on our side. If just 30% respond to my email, Marsha's socialist opponent will have no shot at EVER flipping this key Senate seat.

But first, I need your help right now. Please. I'm personally asking for your help.

_**[So, I hope that's enough to convince you. If it's not, I fear we could lose Tennessee - and the ENTIRE U.S. Senate along with it.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/CW0PFYEFZ1QEF8cJv2Lgag~~/AARclAA~_LhmAGZxFMHRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "So, I hope that’s enough to convince you. If it’s not, I fear we could lose Tennessee – and the ENTIRE U.S. Senate along with it.")**_

For America,
Kimberly Guilfoyle

body:
Here at Jayapal HQ, we’re gearing up to make some MAJOR moves in the next few months.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240324-3669-footer&t=1&akid=3669%2E420207%2EVRHcfA)
Peter,
[**Did you know the average donation to our campaign for the month of March is $28.71?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240324.7w3lTX&refcode=em20240324-3669&t=2&akid=3669%2E420207%2EVRHcfA)
On its own, that number might not seem deeply impactful, **but we’re immensely proud of what donations of $28.71 has helped us accomplish.**
Supporters who have chipped in $28.71 have provided us the financial strength to continue protecting our hard-earned progress by amplifying Pramila’s work in Congress while seizing every opportunity to continue growing our movement.
And because Pramila doesn’t take a single dime from corporate PACs — _that makes $28.71 all the more influential to this campaign._
Here at Jayapal HQ, we’re gearing up to make some MAJOR moves in the next few months. **And we need your help to secure the funds and tools necessary to energize and mobilize our people-power before we kick off our plans.**
**[Can we count on you to chip in $28.71 (our average donation) or any amount you’re able to give to continue growing our progressive people power?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240324.7w3lTX&refcode=em20240324-3669&t=3&akid=3669%2E420207%2EVRHcfA)**

We can’t wait to see what more we can accomplish with you on our side. Thank you, Peter.
Together,
Jayapal HQ

name: Sharice Davids
subject: NEWS: My opponent ‘took thousands from election deniers and anti-abortion zealots’
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81576334/462878916/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjJkNGUwOS0wN2VhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QoXG7yeearO3LoBaEl_nEK0TaNMFn6dmd8qB4uyrj7k=) Hey there — it’s Sharice. I’m reaching out because an alarming new report just came out on how our extremist opponent’s campaign is being funded. An analysis of FEC data showed that _**99%**_ (!) of our opponent’s donations came from “PACs and big donors.” It also found that “[m]any of these contributors have ties to far-right extremists.” [_**Unlike my opponent, I’m not relying on deep-pocketed election deniers or anti-abortion PACs to win this race. My campaign is powered by hard-working folks who care about our democracy chipping in a few dollars whenever they can. Will you donate today to make sure our message isn’t drowned out by big-money extremists?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81576335/462878917/1393271644?refcode=email_032324_Opponent&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjJkNGUwOS0wN2VhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QoXG7yeearO3LoBaEl_nEK0TaNMFn6dmd8qB4uyrj7k=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81576336/462878918/1393271644?refcode=email_032324_Opponent&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjJkNGUwOS0wN2VhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QoXG7yeearO3LoBaEl_nEK0TaNMFn6dmd8qB4uyrj7k=)
---
Every detail of our opponent’s campaign finances is striking. He raised **$115,000** from groups affiliated with election deniers, and **over $120,000** from anti-abortion groups and individuals.
**Meanwhile, just $2,071.56 came from small-dollar, grassroots donations. Frankly, I told my team I bet we can beat that sum TODAY just from folks reading this email and chipping in what they can.**
That’s not just a symbolic goal. I want to make a powerful statement that the anti-abortion special interests propping up our opposition are no match for the incredible grassroots team that’s powered us to three consecutive, hard-fought victories — and counting.
[_**I hope you’ll consider chipping in just $5 to help us showcase how strong this grassroots coalition to defend KS-03 really is.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81576337/462878919/1393271644?refcode=email_032324_Opponent&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjJkNGUwOS0wN2VhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QoXG7yeearO3LoBaEl_nEK0TaNMFn6dmd8qB4uyrj7k=)
Thanks for standing with me,
Sharice

clean_body: = Hey there — it’s Sharice. I’m reaching out because an alarming new report just came out on how our extremist opponent’s campaign is being funded. An analysis of FEC data showed that 99% (!) of our opponent’s donations came from “PACs and big donors.” It also found that “[m]any of these contributors have ties to far-right extremists.” = | | = Every detail of our opponent’s campaign finances is striking. He raised $115,000 from groups affiliated with election deniers, and over $120,000 from anti-abortion groups and individuals. Meanwhile, just $2,071.56 came from small-dollar, grassroots donations. Frankly, I told my team I bet we can beat that sum TODAY just from folks reading this email and chipping in what they can. That’s not just a symbolic goal. I want to make a powerful statement that the anti-abortion special interests propping up our opposition are no match for the incredible grassroots team that’s powered us to three consecutive, hard-fought victories — and counting. = Thanks for standing with me, Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . | | = | PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS Sharice for Congress 13851 W. 63rd St. #303 Shawnee, KS 66216 United States

body:

## Tim Tebow Will Be At Sheridan.Church
---
I am excited to announce that **Tim Tebow** is coming to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2978.1.7120882e336bc5d498ec2b2b8b1fb2f4)! **Date** : Friday, June 28
**Time** : 6:30pm
**Location** : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK **Tickets** : [https://www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2979.1.9d2a0f3f9bd5dab9bc9524fc230b3387) **Ticket Types:** **-General Admission**
**-VIP** (Includes Picture w/Tim Tebow & VIP Seating)
**-Business Sponsor** (Includes Autographed Football, Picture w/Tebow, Business Booth in Lobby, Business Promotion from Stage & 4 VIP Tickets) Also, view upcoming events at Sheridan w/General **Michael Flynn** , Mayor **Rudy Giuliani** , **Darryl Strawberry** , **Perry Stone** and others: [https://www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2980.1.dbc81d8dd7a3dfd1daa07875aaf66b79)

## General Flynn Is Coming To Sheridan.Church
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2982.1.2fe7cb432cc69929c90986489ade4bbc)
---
America's General, [Michael Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2983.1.cdb91d35fab7efe1e0b5982d255d6118), will be coming to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2984.1.9f2c5726d9bf5ff6ded0c3c2edfa0e0e)Tulsa for the presumer of the [NEW Flynn Movie](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2985.1.9924c332d5031e2c12ef1be297128b89)! **Date** : Monday, May 20, 2024
**Meet & Greet**: 5:00pm
**Show Time** : 6:30pm
**Location** : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK **Ticket Link** : [https://www.flynnmovie.com/ref/Tulsa/](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2986.1.e9709cbac448e18ebeebe02f4335a178) Follow the [Link](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2987.1.1cb03c23a37e38ee598df0ad040f450d) above, click "Get Tickets" and select the Tulsa Show Time. There will be a **LIVE Q &A** with [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2988.1.b9a045d492bac0af69f443124767d4c6) after the movie. If you live outside the Tulsa area, there are many other cities that [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2989.1.6facd9acc31e74213686a21b4c3116ed) is visiting that you can view here: [www.flynnmovie.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2990.1.6c3f417c9384da2823533ec59b3b9c83)
---
| | [ Tickets: Flynn Movie ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2991.1.1e7b372ae31e323ccdc8f24b526c6d4a)
---

## Rudy Giuliani Is Coming To Sheridan.Church
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2992.1.19ed044ab7073457b50a19a14d2e73fd)
---
Recently, **Roger Stone** joined me in Tulsa, OK for a special event in which he discussed the facts behind **the assassination of JFK** and took LIVE questions from the audience.
_That event was a HIT!_
I want to invite you to join me for another special _ONE NIGHT_ event with **America's Mayor, Rudy Giuliani!**
Come here stories of how **Mayor Giuliani** _took down the Mafia_ , _cleaned up the streets of NYC_ , _handled 9/11 as Mayor_ and _served with President Trump_.
There will be a LIVE Q&A as well plus a VIP Meet & Greet.
**Date** : Thursday, April 11
**Time** : 6:30pm
**Location** : [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2993.1.fb7e9bf75347e309fbf6bee813aef6a2) 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK
**MUST RSVP** to attend: [https://www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2994.1.5602be46c986a9a68c0dd68458c7d12e)
| | [ April 11 w/Rudy Giuliani ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2995.1.234c158a8015b3c23fab51a4295e8f4e)

## Message From Rabbi Jonathan Cahn At Sheridan.Church
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2996.1.e9fbac0624d2e9aa031c7c62d78d4972)
---
## Jonathan Cahn Reveals Ancient Mystery About America's Future
---
Last week at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2997.1.981dd28bf46ed86b8ce8d2c1f06be83d), **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** revealed an _ancient mystery_ in the Bible about America's future. This is a **MUST** watch for every believer in America for the year 2024. Watch the message here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/UlLv66-b2ZY?si=2DiAB41YUCGUgB1i](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.2998.1.72b48bc7ddff48fae89d6f43e9164aba) Thank you,

## The Second Coming Of Christ
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.3007.1.69a3e8cc82032fb6dea11cf82aaee221)
---
The **Second Coming of Jesus** is getting closer every day.
Did you know there is a crown in heaven for believers that are eagerly awaiting the **Second Coming**?
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.3008.1.9216187164f2a233fbf7f6d1f942974a), I preached a sermon from **Revelation 19** about the **Second Coming of Jesus**.
It will bless you!
Watch it here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/u_NAkggodmU?si=mdcTWlMHWDflY_2a](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7833537.3009.1.677fb6f6ec81d9bf0c5939c202b59862)
