name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: my family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kristen for Michigan
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81578693/462883616/1532741920?refcode=email_032424_Family&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzhhY2YwMy0wYWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z8nnujxwM03A1lOyjkA02Z6wnlqxocLj5KxbD22Y-VM=) Can I tell you a little bit about my family? I grew up in Portland, Michigan, where my dad worked construction, often clocking in 70 to 80 hours a week and my mom stayed home. You can see by the photo, he was tired a lot. **He built the house I grew up in. If you climb up on the roof and take a close look at the chimney, you’d find three pennies from the years my sisters and I were born embedded in the cement. One for each of us.** He even built a secret compartment in my closet so I could hide my diary from my twin sister. When something needed fixing, Dad got it done. When the construction season slowed down and it got cold, he worked snow removal to make ends meet. Like many people in this district, he wasn’t afraid to get calluses on his hands through a tough day’s work. **Through grit and hard work, my family was able to achieve the Michigan Dream:** to own a home, pay the bills, put a little away for retirement, and, every once in a while, have the chance to drive to Disney World. Thanks to mom and dad, my sisters and I were the first in our family to go to college, and I have been working to uplift families ever since. I was elected to the Michigan State Senate, where I fight every day to support Michigan families and combat extremism. I led the charge to pass the largest tax cut for working families in Michigan’s history. I introduced a plan to address the growing childcare crisis in our state. I’ve fought to protect our abortion rights, and, in one of my first acts in the State Senate, passed a commonsense gun violence prevention bill. **The Michigan Dream – from my house my dad built with his own hands – allowed me to get to where I am today.** But that dream is falling out of reach for too many families, and we need Congress to pass solutions that will help level the playing field. I will make sure we invest in our workers and create good-paying jobs right here in Michigan, protect abortion rights, and work to keep our kids safe from the epidemic of gun violence. [_**But I can’t do it without you. This race is a “pure tossup” and the national GOP is already attacking me. So today I’m coming to you with a humble request: if you believe we need more common-sense leaders in Congress, will you chip in to help me win this race?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81578695/462883617/23043530?refcode=email_032424_Family&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzhhY2YwMy0wYWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z8nnujxwM03A1lOyjkA02Z6wnlqxocLj5KxbD22Y-VM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81578697/462883618/23043530?refcode=email_032424_Family&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzhhY2YwMy0wYWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z8nnujxwM03A1lOyjkA02Z6wnlqxocLj5KxbD22Y-VM=)

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Discharge Petition
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
In Congress, it’s a way to circumvent the leadership of the House and get a bill passed when it has bipartisan and widespread support.
#
Derek, we’re going to get a little wonky today.
Most of you probably haven’t heard of a Discharge Petition. In Congress, it’s a way to circumvent the leadership of the House and get legislation passed when it has bipartisan and widespread support.
Since Speaker Johnson has been dragging his feet for over six months on Ukraine, members of Congress who support their fight have begun moving a Discharge Petition to get that aid across the finish line.
We’re going to be working to target Republicans who might support that Discharge Petition over the next days and weeks, and convince them to come on side and get it done.
We’ll have more details on how we’re going to do it in a few days, but this is going to be a big push.
We’re going to need your help.
[**Please, if you have a few dollars to chip in today, it would go a long way towards our end-goal of getting aid for Ukraine across the finish line. Thank you in advance for chipping in.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-mar24.OaHNWk&refcode=em240324-1-30&t=1&akid=24996%2E3013755%2Ew1JiNp)**

name: Hudson, Paul
subject: Friend, State Senator Jon Bumstead has officially endorsed me for Congress.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PAUL HUDSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
That's right. Senator Bumstead is on Team Hudson. He knows MI03 needs a commonsense conservative during these crazy times, to represent West Michigan in D.C.
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qBU54HiwXlEf29ibiQJr_pMqXhVLyWR7MtppKdi37WtVedwES5FoBJ2jqG4shzYojnbzbi8gOPEueDmD-1Khw0Nh7oW5VaXXzUMvrlSHY-0PXyEguc8tEI1EDGMak6n9snqFYZwuKvmltjKRbnNuInd-Xl5ZOAIe&c=nAQwmt5_hSb7fG34hkUVnfYmHICs1Fdt9gn7JTeFx51tdxtqsTgfKw==&ch=Inrbxw7FQjo-us4FqMF-7FGUjss6xbK-BUDHAKYtyHYvzC2xvMM2hw==)
---
|
Friend
Did you hear the news? State Senator Jon Bumstead is on Team Hudson.
---
| Receiving Senator Bumstead's endorsement means a great deal to me personally, and to my campaign.
Jon Bumstead's work in both chambers of Michigan's state legislature is that of a dedicated public servant.
The Senator's leadership, especially in fiscal policy and natural resource protection, is truly impressive and instructive to all who seek to serve.
"I'm proud to endorse Paul Hudson for Congress in Michigan's Third because without trusted fiscal conservatives like him, I see no end to this out of control federal government spending.
As a small business owner in construction and a current representative of the people of the 32nd Senate District, I sit front row to the impacts inflation has on my constituents - from raw materials, gas, and the food they put on their tables."
---
| "I think we have in Paul Hudson a voice of reason in crazy times, and it is my sincere hope that West Michigan voters will conclude, as I have, that Paul is exactly the right representative to send to Washington."
\- State Senator Jon Bumstead
---
---
| | [Endorse Paul Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qBU54HiwXlEf29ibiQJr_pMqXhVLyWR7MtppKdi37WtVedwES5FoBMrR--_hX8UCYx3vkj5UnD7PHAzMQ03waNYMRQCs6G6jCDBt7dQZpBhfufeWlfwV_cw0prUn_dtjtgezobbYO6uDuvcIVmT43j4MhjX2owaYeIUDiCXmice41-9PtZF523kBnfNMbdGyVFTVNnuGh_RC8rNYBpsyAs6i60uXkTLMfJpoIDTsSxwYje8kUcV1k7d_7JhOyqooA27qGKQYBIPaWDrjDPshrtMFKssFHR8F3gafv7YJ14xuH_2luj7IM5K6f67RkmCtGz9TuKkzJA6BrZRINvSAqw==&c=nAQwmt5_hSb7fG34hkUVnfYmHICs1Fdt9gn7JTeFx51tdxtqsTgfKw==&ch=Inrbxw7FQjo-us4FqMF-7FGUjss6xbK-BUDHAKYtyHYvzC2xvMM2hw==)

|
"West Michigan deserves someone who wants to let taxpayers keep more of their hard earned money, and it excites me to see someone fresh like Paul step up to the plate.
Additionally, Paul appreciates how blessed we are to be the Great Lakes state, and he shares my concern that we remain steadfast in our efforts to preserve and protect Michigan's water quality, infrastructure, and vital natural resources."
---
| [Join Senator Bumstead and Endorse Paul](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qBU54HiwXlEf29ibiQJr_pMqXhVLyWR7MtppKdi37WtVedwES5FoBMrR--_hX8UCYx3vkj5UnD7PHAzMQ03waNYMRQCs6G6jCDBt7dQZpBhfufeWlfwV_cw0prUn_dtjtgezobbYO6uDuvcIVmT43j4MhjX2owaYeIUDiCXmice41-9PtZF523kBnfNMbdGyVFTVNnuGh_RC8rNYBpsyAs6i60uXkTLMfJpoIDTsSxwYje8kUcV1k7d_7JhOyqooA27qGKQYBIPaWDrjDPshrtMFKssFHR8F3gafv7YJ14xuH_2luj7IM5K6f67RkmCtGz9TuKkzJA6BrZRINvSAqw==&c=nAQwmt5_hSb7fG34hkUVnfYmHICs1Fdt9gn7JTeFx51tdxtqsTgfKw==&ch=Inrbxw7FQjo-us4FqMF-7FGUjss6xbK-BUDHAKYtyHYvzC2xvMM2hw==)

clean_body: That's right. Senator Bumstead is on Team Hudson. He knows MI03 needs a commonsense conservative during these crazy times, to represent West Michigan in D.C. | | | | == | Friend Did you hear the news? State Senator Jon Bumstead is on Team Hudson. | Receiving Senator Bumstead's endorsement means a great deal to me personally, and to my campaign. Jon Bumstead's work in both chambers of Michigan's state legislature is that of a dedicated public servant. The Senator's leadership, especially in fiscal policy and natural resource protection, is truly impressive and instructive to all who seek to serve. "I'm proud to endorse Paul Hudson for Congress in Michigan's Third because without trusted fiscal conservatives like him, I see no end to this out of control federal government spending. As a small business owner in construction and a current representative of the people of the 32nd Senate District, I sit front row to the impacts inflation has on my constituents - from raw materials, gas, and the food they put on their tables." | "I think we have in Paul Hudson a voice of reason in crazy times, and it is my sincere hope that West Michigan voters will conclude, as I have, that Paul is exactly the right representative to send to Washington." \- State Senator Jon Bumstead | | == | "West Michigan deserves someone who wants to let taxpayers keep more of their hard earned money, and it excites me to see someone fresh like Paul step up to the plate. Additionally, Paul appreciates how blessed we are to be the Great Lakes state, and he shares my concern that we remain steadfast in our efforts to preserve and protect Michigan's water quality, infrastructure, and vital natural resources." | == | "I think we have in Paul Hudson a voice of reason in crazy times, and it is my sincere hope that West Michigan voters will conclude, as I have, that Paul is exactly the right representative to send to Washington." I consider myself extremely fortunate to have Jon's support in this primary campaign, and I look forward to having the privilege of working with him on issues of mutual concern for West Michigan. Your endorsement, along with his, would mean the world to me. Add your name ==. As always, never hesitate to reach out. Humbly, Paul | == | == | == | mailto:TEAMHUDSON@PAULHUDSONFORCONGRESS.COM | == == == == | | == | == | == E-mail is one of the best ways to connect with voters, however I realize how off-putting they can sometimes be. While I hope you'll stay connected and continue to follow my campaign, I understand if you wish to disconnect and focus your energy on more important things like family or work. If you wish to unsubscribe, I won't be offended: ==. | | PAID FOR BY PAUL HUDSON FOR CONGRESS | | | | | | | Paul Hudson for Congress | 2153 Wealthy St. SE, Box 107, Grand Rapids, MI 49506 www.paulhudsonforcongress.com | | | Sent by mailto:paul@paulhudsonforcongress.ccsend.com powered by

We have just **seven days to raise $200,000.** That’s **seven days** to raise the funds that will help: 📣 Amplify our messaging
🗳️ Mobilize voters
📋 Train volunteers
💰 Invest in competitive races
..._and so much more._ With two majority-defining special elections in Michigan next month and state legislative elections across 44 states this November, we can’t afford to fall short of our quarterly goal – _not by a single dollar_. **The GOP is watching closely for any sign of weakness, and missing this deadline could give them the upper hand.** But we have some great news: A generous group of donors has stepped up, offering to quintuple-match _every_ donation to elect state Dems until midnight on the 31st. Your **$7, $25,** or even **$100** donation will have _five times_ the impact, giving Democrats the head start we need to win in upcoming special elections and this November. clean_body: With two majority-defining special elections in Michigan next month and state legislative elections across 44 states this November, we can’t afford to fall short. | | | | | ---|--- This is it – our first end-of-quarter deadline of 2024, and it couldn’t be more crucial. We have just seven days to raise $200,000. That’s seven days to raise the funds that will help: 📣 Amplify our messaging 🗳️ Mobilize voters 📋 Train volunteers 💰 Invest in competitive races ...and so much more. With two majority-defining special elections in Michigan next month and state legislative elections across 44 states this November, we can’t afford to fall short of our quarterly goal – not by a single dollar. The GOP is watching closely for any sign of weakness, and missing this deadline could give them the upper hand. But we have some great news: A generous group of donors has stepped up, offering to quintuple-match every donation to elect state Dems until midnight on the 31st. Your $7, $25, or even $100 donation will have five times the impact, giving Democrats the head start we need to win in upcoming special elections and this November. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Let’s do this, together. body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=wTPlS1yUKEJbF3AUvuV7xFQMLYZVjhf0QY6GLqKqokSNhsGZlW6FSiKhzLefXN4b9XFPjVlI5i6MxWUfq6IBxroEw8q0YsTM%2Fq%2B5xdNFtHt6vFDRHowdCwUVg9rejaxBwnmP2NQTWokurLyYCN%2FwbXkaKP8pQBXnBg2f59RVy0WhxYL7RWSKmhzT3STyuEgxAASadOA9POw9LFCWPr02tw39iIbedXGoEBPEdI4FO0MDsnbXAddybxNFrm091iVBZjDUu%2FSeffHgkF9nxeibDcxVeWKOGCRoPK3NVBpoNFFrQ6Ixa%2F%2F4L1ntNHZJLISWcGnh7GJioDhfUoZoXH7UZcbxGyJanVn%2BWgnpe4Q0Md7DBVBI5SiNbzlcQqaQYdwubbfgB%2BKwRe36OxIXDGJ7CAGHAD7rhYME6qL4FPBnb5c%3D]

# [#]
Hey Peter, ICYMI 👇

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-mar24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-mar24]Kate Cox, a 31-year-old Dallas woman who sued to terminate her nonviable pregnancy, was in attendance at this year’s State of the Union address, when President Biden called out her story to everyone watching.

Kate attended in solidarity with Texans and others across the country who are targets of the GOP’s extremist agenda against abortion and reproductive freedom.

What happened to Kate Cox shows in real time the danger of our state’s draconian reproductive healthcare restrictions — which disproportionately impact Black and Latina women.

Since Roe v. Wade was overturned in June of 2022, anti-abortion Republicans nationwide have dedicated themselves to slashing our reproductive freedoms.

Abortion access IS a racial justice issue, and here at TOP PAC, we refuse to stand idly by as the GOP chips away at healthcare access and our basic rights.

Every Texan — regardless of age, race, or place — deserves a government that respects their bodily autonomy and these rights, not one that abuses and seeks to eliminate them.

DONATE NOW to help TOP PAC continue our work with allies to fight against the far-right's attacks on our healthcare, abortion access, and reproductive freedoms. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-mar24?amount=]

— Texas Organizing Project PAC

clean_body: Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Hey Peter, ICYMI 👇 [ Cox, a 31-year-old Dallas woman who sued to terminate her nonviable pregnancy, was in attendance at this year’s State of the Union address, when President Biden called out her story to everyone watching. Kate attended in solidarity with Texans and others across the country who are targets of the GOP’s extremist agenda against abortion and reproductive freedom. What happened to Kate Cox shows in real time the danger of our state’s draconian reproductive healthcare restrictions — which disproportionately impact Black and Latina women. Since Roe v. Wade was overturned in June of 2022, anti-abortion Republicans nationwide have dedicated themselves to slashing our reproductive freedoms. Abortion access IS a racial justice issue, and here at TOP PAC, we refuse to stand idly by as the GOP chips away at healthcare access and our basic rights. Every Texan — regardless of age, race, or place — deserves a government that respects their bodily autonomy and these rights, not one that abuses and seeks to eliminate them. DONATE NOW to help TOP PAC continue our work with allies to fight against the far-right's attacks on our healthcare, abortion access, and reproductive freedoms. [=] — Texas Organizing Project PAC [] [] [] [] [] Texas Organizing Project PAC runs the largest, independent get-out-the-vote political field programs in Texas, focusing on expanding the electorate of color, with an emphasis on turning out Black and Latino voters. To date, TOP PAC has mobilized hundreds of thousands of voters across the state with the aim of transforming Texas and building a reflective democracy — one that looks like us and shares our values. For more information, visit toppac.org [] . There are the obvious reasons: defense of democracy, abortion access, protecting the Affordable Care Act, and not letting Trump back into the White House for four more years of division and destruction. The [Magnolia Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/932af473-62ae-4030-b51b-0986b8a68d48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has closely followed the Medicaid Expansion debate in the Mississippi legislature. Below is a list of articles published that will give you the full view of the debate and explain why the expansion of Obamacare also knows as medicaid expansion is bad for Mississippi.
* * *
**[MEDICAID](https://substack.com/redirect/a3e67f84-e01f-439c-aff5-0255c2a74718?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) | [RUSS LATINO](https://substack.com/redirect/e7fde334-cd63-4b1f-a016-7a849b0605a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) • **
**MARCH 21, 2024**
### **[Comparing the House and Senate Medicaid Expansion Plans](https://substack.com/redirect/51ca1089-0979-4dd1-b5d8-57bbc90df6d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[From a conservative perspective, the Senate Medicaid plan is better in almost every conceivable way. It's still welfare expansion for abled-bodied people that will increase the size of government and people's dependency on it.](https://substack.com/redirect/51ca1089-0979-4dd1-b5d8-57bbc90df6d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[OPINION](https://substack.com/redirect/722db5e3-0d1a-47f8-a8d9-ce0479dadfa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) | [ADAM ANDRZEJEWSKI](https://substack.com/redirect/845e3ac4-466f-4803-91cd-04cadd8c8adb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) • **
**MARCH 18, 2024**
### **[Medicaid and Medicare remain biggest culprits for improper payments](https://substack.com/redirect/6ae58282-d585-4564-921d-9aa4a20b4304?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[The two agencies were responsible for $101.5 billion, or 43% in improper payments in 2023.](https://substack.com/redirect/6ae58282-d585-4564-921d-9aa4a20b4304?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[MEDICAID](https://substack.com/redirect/a3e67f84-e01f-439c-aff5-0255c2a74718?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) | [RUSS LATINO](https://substack.com/redirect/e7fde334-cd63-4b1f-a016-7a849b0605a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) • **
**MARCH 17, 2024**
### **[Halftime in Medicaid Expansion fight: Where do things stand?](https://substack.com/redirect/cb2cab17-691d-40ac-b9f9-8ee29bb2a849?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[The battle over whether or not to expand Medicaid in Mississippi reaches halftime with the contest still very much in doubt.](https://substack.com/redirect/cb2cab17-691d-40ac-b9f9-8ee29bb2a849?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**[NEWS](https://substack.com/redirect/72fa72ae-292b-4a54-938b-00bcaf60ed84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) | [SARAH ULMER](https://substack.com/redirect/b6a47f73-10e3-483a-9b42-a0b28f3bdc25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) • **
**MARCH 14, 2024**
### **[House Medicaid expansion bill won't survive Senate markup](https://substack.com/redirect/718babe6-60a6-480e-a1fd-a98b5330d525?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[The Senate Medicaid Chairman says his committee will remove the House Medicaid expansion language and insert their own, with a hardline requirement of a work waiver approval from CMS.](https://substack.com/redirect/718babe6-60a6-480e-a1fd-a98b5330d525?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[NEWS](https://substack.com/redirect/72fa72ae-292b-4a54-938b-00bcaf60ed84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) | [SARAH ULMER](https://substack.com/redirect/b6a47f73-10e3-483a-9b42-a0b28f3bdc25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) • **
**MARCH 5, 2024**
### **[Senate Medicaid Chairman says without a work requirement waiver, Medicaid expansion"probably over"](https://substack.com/redirect/5c69de8f-ecb3-40d3-a87b-7776a0b72e97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[A Senate Medicaid bill, unlike the House version, will be fully contingent on a work requirement approved by CMS before expansion to any level. ](https://substack.com/redirect/5c69de8f-ecb3-40d3-a87b-7776a0b72e97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[NEWS](https://substack.com/redirect/72fa72ae-292b-4a54-938b-00bcaf60ed84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) | [FRANK CORDER](https://substack.com/redirect/a411e777-ee4b-4e39-8d21-18034247f595?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) • **
**MARCH 5, 2024**
### **[POLL: What Do Republican Voters Think About Medicaid Expansion?](https://substack.com/redirect/d3c36f04-3437-48ee-a0bb-e79ec8b90d33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[When framed as "Obamacare's Medicaid expansion," 81 percent of Republican primary voters oppose the policy. Opposition increases to over 90 percent when GOP voters are introduced to more substantive policy arguments against Medicaid expansion.](https://substack.com/redirect/d3c36f04-3437-48ee-a0bb-e79ec8b90d33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[NEWS](https://substack.com/redirect/72fa72ae-292b-4a54-938b-00bcaf60ed84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) | [FRANK CORDER](https://substack.com/redirect/a411e777-ee4b-4e39-8d21-18034247f595?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) • **
**FEBRUARY 28, 2024**
### **[Mississippi House Passes Speaker White's Medicaid Expansion Bill](https://substack.com/redirect/940756f7-16d2-41c0-8e7a-047146549411?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Only 20 Republicans voted against the legislation after the House has rejected calls to expand the welfare program for a decade](https://substack.com/redirect/940756f7-16d2-41c0-8e7a-047146549411?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[OPINION](https://substack.com/redirect/722db5e3-0d1a-47f8-a8d9-ce0479dadfa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) | [RUSS LATINO](https://substack.com/redirect/e7fde334-cd63-4b1f-a016-7a849b0605a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) • **
**FEBRUARY 28, 2024**
### **[No, a Work Requirement for Medicaid Expansion is Not Going to be Approved by September](https://substack.com/redirect/a46ded3d-54b2-4384-b01e-6e06330369b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Russ Latino says if legislative leaders were serious about work requirements and seriously confident it would be approved, they would make Medicaid expansion contingent upon approval.](https://substack.com/redirect/a46ded3d-54b2-4384-b01e-6e06330369b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Bernie Moreno
subject: It’s a badge of honor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate<-
body:
->

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3386143.1502.1.10f447d598a7566266b36f8580bb86a1 )

<-

Fellow Conservative,

\*\*I just secured the official GOP nomination for U.S. Senate in Ohio!\*\*

Without your support, we wouldn’t have been able to pull off this victory – but our work isn’t done yet. Now we must focus on November and defeating Sherrod Brown. Now is the time for Republicans to become united, \*\*and together, we will do precisely that.\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3386143.1503.1.69466f02b3c5517ebd08626dbfb6c9e7 )

Sherrod Brown is the single biggest enabler of Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda that has wrecked our country. He is:

1. For open borders – and even more illegal immigration.

2. Soft on crime – and more focused on protecting criminals than putting them in jail.

3. For runaway spending – he’s never met a dollar he couldn’t spend.

4. For nonstop taxes on hardworking Ohio families.

5. And a career politician who first ran for office when Richard Nixon was president.

\*\*Sherrod Brown votes with Joe Biden damn near 100% of the time.\*\* He’s sabotaged Ohio, and he’s sabotaged America, _and he’s lied to Ohio workers every step of the way._

But it’s not just me that Democrats and Washington insiders are coming after. They are also coming after President Trump. Chuck Schumer and the national Dems have spent millions tying me to President Trump.

I’ve got a message for them... \*\*I wear my support for President Trump like a badge of honor and am proud to have his support because under him, we were safe, prosperous, and at peace.\*\*

I wonder if Sherrod Brown would wear his blind support of Joe Biden and his policies like a badge of honor?

We know that DC Democrats will stop at nothing and spend whatever it takes to keep the chief enabler of their disastrous agenda in the Senate. \*\*That’s why I need your help, fellow conservative.\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3386143.1504.1.fa3b092420d2bf4b106a04a2ff691728 )

I had a target on my back before this victory, and now that I am officially the Republican nominee to take on DC insider Sherrod Brown, they are ready to spend over $100 million in this race.

We don’t need $100 million, but we do need you to put some skin in the game (and chip in again, too).

\*\*So, I am personally asking for your support. Even just $5 will go a long way to flip this seat, help Republicans win back the Senate majority, and finally retire career politician Sherrod Brown!\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3386143.1505.1.c6ca78429dc0d7c62adeb5cae10ce312 )

I hope I can count on you,

Bernie Moreno

Republican for U.S. Senate - Ohio

-> \*\* Join Team Bernie ➞ \*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3386143.1506.1.92ae09d11937ab2c150a0dcdd06bd7cc )<-

->

\*\*Meet Bernie Moreno:\*\*

Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

-> \*\* Join Bernie ➞ \*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3386143.1507.1.691359912b184af16511c3e90df2b0e0 )<-

<-

-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3386143.1498.1.7889a32ba0b39dcde21530d5fd8341c4 )<-

->

\*\*FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA\*\*

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3386143.1499.1.b17ed441b1708ee78e9d6e1847d16612 ) ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3386143.1500.1.d1543136900d2088a24f81be69954a39 ) ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3386143.1501.1.1da66b1bec608e2da254bbae6d533da9 )

<-

->

->

name: Team Kennedy
subject: This Week's Team Kennedy Newsletter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Get the latest event stops, campaign news, and best-selling merch listings.

|
---
| | | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_24_24_a4&n=1)
---
|
---
Upcoming Events: Join RFK Jr. for a Memorable Experience!
|
* * *
---
[**Online Event**](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-virtual-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_24_24_a4&n=2) \- Sunday, March 24th at 5:00 PM
Happening today! Join us for a virtual celebration of Women's History Month with RFK, Jr. and Amaryllis Kennedy. Hear inspiring stories and engaging discussions with special guests including actress Drea de Matteo.
[Oakland, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/vp-announcement?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_24_24_a4&n=3) \- Tuesday, March 26th at 10:00 AM
On Tuesday March 26th, in Oakland, California, Mr. Kennedy will announce the partner that he has chosen to help lead America into a brighter vision of peace, prosperity and unity. We would be honored for you to join us.
[Los Angeles, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/cesar-chavez-day?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_24_24_a4&n=4) \- Saturday, March 30th at 3:00 PM
Celebrate Cesar Chavez with RFK, Jr! Join us for a day of Mexican food, drinks, culture, voter registration assistance, and inspiring remarks from Mr. Kennedy and other special guests.
[West Des Moines, Iowa](https://www.kennedy24.com/west-des-moines-assembly?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_24_24_a4&n=5) \- Saturday, April 13th at 2:00 PM
Are you ready to make history? Join U.S. Presidential Candidate Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for an inspiring rally in West Des Moines, IA! We need 500 Iowans for an Assembly to automatically place Mr. Kennedy on the ballot.
[Dallas, Texas](https://www.kennedy24.com/dallas-texas-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_24_24_a4&n=6) \- Sunday, April 14th at 4:00 PM
Elevate your support for Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.'s presidential campaign at an intimate fundraising reception. Enjoy delectable hors d’oeuvres and cocktails while partaking in a fireside chat and an inspiring Q&A session.
[Palos Verdes, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/palos-verdes?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_24_24_a4&n=7) \- Thursday, April 18th at 6:00 PM
This private reception is an opportunity to see and hear RFK, Jr. up close and personal. It includes remarks by the candidate, an intimate Q&A, and photo opportunity for all.
[Detroit, Michigan](https://www.kennedy24.com/night-of-laughter-detroit?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_24_24_a4&n=8) \- Sunday, April 21st at 7:30 PM
We are thrilled to host our second “Night of Laughter with RFK, Jr.” featuring the comic genius of Rob Schneider, Dave Landau, Heather Jay, Fahim Anwar, Mike Binder, Tre Stewart and other surprise guests!
[Scottsdale, Arizona](https://www.kennedy24.com/scottsdale-april-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_24_24_a4&n=9) \- Tuesday, April 23rd at 6:00 PM
This exclusive event includes heavy hors d’ oeuvres and cocktails, a fireside chat with Robert F. Kennedy Jr., and a photo opportunity. Don’t miss this special event with a chance to engage RFK Jr. up close.
[Laguna Beach, California ](https://www.kennedy24.com/laguna-beach-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_24_24_a4&n=10) \- Thursday, April 25th at 6:00 PM
Join us for an elegant cocktail soirée in a museum-like atmosphere, an evening of intellectual discovery as Robert F. Kennedy Jr. shares his visionary outlook on the future, set against an inspiring backdrop.
|
* * *
---
RFK Jr.: We're Going to Shake Up the Establishment!
You’ve probably heard by now that I’m about to announce my running mate, the person who will stand by my side as Vice President.
Despite some misinformation circulating in the press, rest assured that I will set the record straight on March 26th in Oakland.
I am thrilled to introduce this remarkable individual who will serve as my partner in governance and embodies the qualities needed to lead our great nation.
While I cannot tell you who it is right now, I can confidently say that they are the perfect companion to navigate the challenges ahead. And I’ll give you another hint: this announcement is really going to shake up the political establishment.
[I’d love for you to join me in Oakland to welcome this dynamic person into our campaign.](https://www.kennedy24.com/vp-announcement?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_24_24_a4&n=11)

|

subject: 7 days
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| We’ll cut to the chase:
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2262%2E35263%2EJjshhp)
We’ll cut to the chase: **Our FIRST FEC public fundraising deadline of 2024 is just 7 days away, which means that we only have 7 days to make up our budget gap and post the strongest numbers possible.** **[Will you chip in $7 before the deadline to help reelect Tammy and defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3695?c0=tbe-em-mar24.ptRCiH&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240324_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2262%2E35263%2EJjshhp)** | [CHIP IN $7](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3695?c0=tbe-em-mar24.ptRCiH&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240324_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2262%2E35263%2EJjshhp)
---
Since jumping into this race, California megamillionaire Eric Hovde has already spent $3.1 million flooding the airwaves with campaign ads. That’s on top of the money dark money PACs are also spending on attack ads targeting Tammy.
**And with a new poll showing Wisconsin’s Senate race statistically tied, it’s clear their attacks are working.**
When our fundraising numbers are made public after our FEC deadline on March 31st, our Republican opponent and his right-wing allies will search for vulnerabilities in our campaign.
**We already took a risk by launching our first campaign ads of the year to make sure Hovde didn’t go unanswered, even though the money wasn’t in the budget.**
Supporters like you have helped us make up the gap, but this race is going to get even more expensive so we need a surge of donations before the deadline.
**[So, will you chip in $7 ahead of our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline? Anything you can give will help us close our budget gap and post the strongest fundraising numbers possible.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3695?c0=tbe-em-mar24.ptRCiH&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240324_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2262%2E35263%2EJjshhp)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $7 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3696?c0=tbe-em-mar24.m99N27&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240324_AM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=2262%2E35263%2EJjshhp)
---
[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=tbe-em-mar24.RDZ0FZ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240324_AM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=2262%2E35263%2EJjshhp)
---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3665?c0=tbe-em-mar24.Flbafb&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240324_AM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=2262%2E35263%2EJjshhp)
---
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3666?c0=tbe-em-mar24._-HoyZ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240324_AM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=2262%2E35263%2EJjshhp)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3667?c0=tbe-em-mar24.XGqY3W&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240324_AM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=2262%2E35263%2EJjshhp)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2591?c0=tbe-em-mar24.QeEeLz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240324_AM1_V1_S1&t=12&akid=2262%2E35263%2EJjshhp)
---
Unlike our opponent, Tammy doesn’t have $20 million to self-fund this campaign. That’s why she’s so grateful to have you on this team, pitching in what you can, when you can to help us fight back.
Thanks for being a part of this team.
— Team Baldwin

From: **Rick Larsen** <campaign@ricklarsen.org>
Date: Mon, Mar 11, 2024 at 1:55 PM
Subject: The future of IVF
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com As you might recall, I reached out last year to share that I have been working with fellow lawmakers to expand services for veterans. The proposed Veteran Families Health Services Act will cover treatments, such as in vitro fertilization (IVF) and fertility counseling — both while they are serving, and after they leave their military service. **Just as we began to make progress righting this wrong for the veterans seeking to grow their families — the extremists in the GOP launched their attack on another pillar of reproductive freedom: IVF treatments.** A recent legal decision from the Alabama Supreme Court in the issue of _LePage v. Center for Reproductive Medicine_ has raised grave concerns about the future of IVF, a cornerstone of fertility treatment. This ruling reclassifies embryos as children and poses a significant threat to the viability of IVF. [**Families across the country are counting on us: sign the petition today and help ensure that IVF remains a secure and accessible option.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81583345/462891892/1474745052?source=direct_link&referrer=group-larsen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-rick-larsen&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjM3NDNjOC0xM2VhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eY32WQvA4TVcxA3tV6T7wcJ-m68dH7Z37GG1vXCRPkE=&emci=ab2b383f-85e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=923743c8-13ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=9494239) Here are the facts. **Fertility treatments like IVF are on the rise, and have helped countless parents grow their families:**
* In 2023 42% of Americans say they have used fertility treatments or personally know someone who has — a 33% increase since 2018. (Source: [Pew Research](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81583347/462891894/-1171189597?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjM3NDNjOC0xM2VhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eY32WQvA4TVcxA3tV6T7wcJ-m68dH7Z37GG1vXCRPkE=&emci=ab2b383f-85e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=923743c8-13ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=9494239))
* 1 million babies have been born in the United States between 1987 and 2015 through the use of IVF. (Source: [Penn Medicine](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81583349/462891896/-227216847?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjM3NDNjOC0xM2VhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eY32WQvA4TVcxA3tV6T7wcJ-m68dH7Z37GG1vXCRPkE=&emci=ab2b383f-85e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=923743c8-13ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=9494239))
* Between 1-2% percent of all U.S. births annually are thanks to IVF. (Source: [Penn Medicine](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81583350/462891897/-227216847?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjM3NDNjOC0xM2VhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eY32WQvA4TVcxA3tV6T7wcJ-m68dH7Z37GG1vXCRPkE=&emci=ab2b383f-85e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=923743c8-13ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=9494239))

We cannot allow conservative extremists to continue undermining reproductive freedom. [**The time has come to demand decisive action. I implore my colleagues in Congress to enact legislation that unequivocally safeguards access to IVF treatments.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81583354/462891901/1474745052?source=direct_link&referrer=group-larsen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-rick-larsen&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjM3NDNjOC0xM2VhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eY32WQvA4TVcxA3tV6T7wcJ-m68dH7Z37GG1vXCRPkE=&emci=ab2b383f-85e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=923743c8-13ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=9494239) [Sign NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81583358/462891905/1474745052?source=direct_link&referrer=group-larsen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-rick-larsen&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjM3NDNjOC0xM2VhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eY32WQvA4TVcxA3tV6T7wcJ-m68dH7Z37GG1vXCRPkE=&emci=ab2b383f-85e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=923743c8-13ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=9494239) More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: This treatment is a beacon of hope for millions grappling with infertility. | | | | Friends — did you catch this message from Rick?IVF is still under attack by the chaos caucus and members of the U.S. Senate are now blocking legislation that would protect the services that a majority of Americans believe should be legal. Thank you for standing with us. More soon, Team Rick \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rick Larsen <campaign@ricklarsen.org> Date: Mon, Mar 11, 2024 at 1:55 PM Subject: The future of IVF To: dpwillis67@gmail.com As you might recall, I reached out last year to share that I have been working with fellow lawmakers to expand services for veterans. The proposed Veteran Families Health Services Act will cover treatments, such as in vitro fertilization (IVF) and fertility counseling — both while they are serving, and after they leave their military service. Just as we began to make progress righting this wrong for the veterans seeking to grow their families — the extremists in the GOP launched their attack on another pillar of reproductive freedom: IVF treatments. A recent legal decision from the Alabama Supreme Court in the issue of LePage v. Center for Reproductive Medicine has raised grave concerns about the future of IVF, a cornerstone of fertility treatment. This ruling reclassifies embryos as children and poses a significant threat to the viability of IVF. Here are the facts. Fertility treatments like IVF are on the rise, and have helped countless parents grow their families: In 2023 42% of Americans say they have used fertility treatments or personally know someone who has — a 33% increase since 2018. (Source: ) 1 million babies have been born in the United States between 1987 and 2015 through the use of IVF. (Source: ) Between 1-2% percent of all U.S. births annually are thanks to IVF. (Source: ) We cannot allow conservative extremists to continue undermining reproductive freedom. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by .** Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen PO Box 326 Everett, WA 98206 United States Email is an important way for Rick Larsen to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

name: Paul Begala
subject: Listen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter:
For decades, I have worked in politics electing Democrats in tough races across the country. I’ve been on both the winning and losing side, and here’s what I know for sure: **As PA goes, so goes the nation.**
Just look at the numbers: In 2016, 44,292 votes in PA propelled Donald Trump to his unexpected victory. Then, in 2020, Joe Biden clinched Pennsylvania’s 20 electoral votes by a narrow 1.17% margin, helping him secure the White House.
**Mark my words, 2024 will be no different, and Pennsylvania will once again be THE tipping point.**
So here’s a piece of expert advice for grassroots donors like you, Peter: **[If we’re going to protect our Democratic Senate majority, we must prioritize supporting Bob Casey in Pennsylvania.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240324-2?refcode=em20240324-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2435_552475_h15Wsr&akid=2435%2E552475%2Eh15Wsr)**
National Republicans know that if they flip this seat, they can flip the Senate, and they’re going to spend whatever it takes to do just that. Bob is already up against a mega-millionaire who can self-fund his campaign. So we need the resources to fight back.
**[That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting Bob Casey’s re-election campaign. Whatever you can pitch in will make a big difference in a race this competitive.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240324-2?refcode=em20240324-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2435_552475_h15Wsr&akid=2435%2E552475%2Eh15Wsr)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240324-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240324-2-el&refcode2=2435_552475_h15Wsr&akid=2435%2E552475%2Eh15Wsr) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240324-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240324-2-el&refcode2=2435_552475_h15Wsr&akid=2435%2E552475%2Eh15Wsr) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240324-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240324-2-el&refcode2=2435_552475_h15Wsr&akid=2435%2E552475%2Eh15Wsr) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240324-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240324-2-el&refcode2=2435_552475_h15Wsr&akid=2435%2E552475%2Eh15Wsr) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240324-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240324-2-el&refcode2=2435_552475_h15Wsr&akid=2435%2E552475%2Eh15Wsr) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240324-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240324-2&refcode2=2435_552475_h15Wsr&akid=2435%2E552475%2Eh15Wsr)
---
Support from grassroots donors like you really is going to make all the difference in this battleground race.
– Paul Begala
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240324-2?refcode=em20240324-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2435_552475_h15Wsr&akid=2435%2E552475%2Eh15Wsr)
Paul Begala is a longtime political strategist and former advisor to President Bill Clinton. He has decades of experience electing Democrats in tough races across the country, including President Barack Obama in 2012. **[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240324-2?refcode=em20240324-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2435_552475_h15Wsr&akid=2435%2E552475%2Eh15Wsr)**

body:
Check this out.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81583569/462892638/1328794144?refcode=ea.4d495610-15ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.4d495610-15ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkNDk1NjEwLTE1ZWEtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Aq3EVz2g2ECyBJJu3T3nijDeH_fkv9NWh3Kc2ggMDDg=&emci=1a6e220a-15ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=4d495610-15ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4823105)
---
Do you have a minute to celebrate a _huge_ win for anyone who enjoys a lungful of clean air — and a headache for those fossil fuel giants? **The Biden administration unveiled the __strongest-ever__ pollution standards for cars and light trucks in the United States.** This is huge! Despite the fossil fuel industry's outsized influence on our political leaders, when we show up and vote, when we unite and demand action, our leaders are compelled to listen. **[Now, more than ever, it's crucial that we raise our voices louder and show our support for this life-saving policy! Click here to add your name and support the Biden Administration's climate win>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81583570/462892639/450437404?refcode=ea.4d495610-15ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.4d495610-15ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkNDk1NjEwLTE1ZWEtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Aq3EVz2g2ECyBJJu3T3nijDeH_fkv9NWh3Kc2ggMDDg=&emci=1a6e220a-15ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=4d495610-15ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN ON**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81583571/462892640/450437404?refcode=ea.4d495610-15ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.4d495610-15ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkNDk1NjEwLTE1ZWEtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Aq3EVz2g2ECyBJJu3T3nijDeH_fkv9NWh3Kc2ggMDDg=&emci=1a6e220a-15ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=4d495610-15ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4823105)
---
Starting with the 2027 model year, car manufacturers will be required to significantly ramp up sales of EVs and slash carbon emissions from gasoline-powered vehicles.
**This initiative is poised to prevent over 7 billion tons of carbon pollution.** That's four times the total carbon pollution from all transportation in 2021 alone.
Why does this matter? **Transportation is the leading source of greenhouse gas emissions nationwide, making this new EPA standard a historic stride forward.**
Let’s be clear: There’s still a lot of work to be done. Republican-led states and fossil fuel companies are gearing up to challenge the new rule in court, while also spending millions on advertising campaigns to stoke fear and turn public opinion against this life-saving policy.
**The fossil fuel industry will stop at nothing to derail progress towards sustainability.**
We need to show our support for the new EPA standards AND continue to demand more from our leaders.
Here at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, our commitment doesn't stop with this victory. We're dedicated to supporting and electing leaders across the country who have the vision and courage to take bold, meaningful action on climate change.
**[And you’re a huge part of it. Join us, sign the petition to celebrate this climate win, and let's drive towards a cleaner, greener future.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81583572/462892641/450437404?refcode=ea.4d495610-15ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.4d495610-15ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkNDk1NjEwLTE1ZWEtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Aq3EVz2g2ECyBJJu3T3nijDeH_fkv9NWh3Kc2ggMDDg=&emci=1a6e220a-15ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=4d495610-15ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4823105)**

clean_body: Check this out. | Do you have a minute to celebrate a huge win for anyone who enjoys a lungful of clean air — and a headache for those fossil fuel giants? The Biden administration unveiled the strongest-ever pollution standards for cars and light trucks in the United States. This is huge! Despite the fossil fuel industry's outsized influence on our political leaders, when we show up and vote, when we unite and demand action, our leaders are compelled to listen. | Starting with the 2027 model year, car manufacturers will be required to significantly ramp up sales of EVs and slash carbon emissions from gasoline-powered vehicles. This initiative is poised to prevent over 7 billion tons of carbon pollution. That's four times the total carbon pollution from all transportation in 2021 alone. Why does this matter? Transportation is the leading source of greenhouse gas emissions nationwide, making this new EPA standard a historic stride forward. Let’s be clear: There’s still a lot of work to be done. Republican-led states and fossil fuel companies are gearing up to challenge the new rule in court, while also spending millions on advertising campaigns to stoke fear and turn public opinion against this life-saving policy. The fossil fuel industry will stop at nothing to derail progress towards sustainability. We need to show our support for the new EPA standards AND continue to demand more from our leaders. Here at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, our commitment doesn't stop with this victory. We're dedicated to supporting and electing leaders across the country who have the vision and courage to take bold, meaningful action on climate change. Thank you for taking action. Jane Fonda Climate PAC | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: Pummeled…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
With Sinema out, that means Republicans can focus their negative attack ads on just one candidate.
| One $10 donation.

That is the donation we are asking you to make to Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate now that Kyrsten Sinema has officially said she's not running.

[If that's all you need to hear, use this link »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64904?t=6&akid=13587%2E878179%2EBvugCF)

Otherwise, here's the deal:

With Sinema out, that means Republicans can focus their negative attack ads on just one candidate. They don't have to attack Sinema any more, they can just hammer Ruben.

That means we are likely to get pummeled on the airwaves, and it will likely happen soon.

So this request is important:

Arizona is going to be one of the most contested and expensive Senate races in the country.

What happens here will determine who controls the Senate, and probably the White House, too.

Republicans know this as well, so the attack ads are coming. And Ruben can't fight back without your help. So please:

[Can Ruben Gallego count on you to split $10, or whatever you can afford today, between his campaign and the Voter Protection Project? We will put your support right to work holding on to this Senate seat and winning Arizona.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64904?t=7&akid=13587%2E878179%2EBvugCF) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Ruben Gallego and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64905?t=8&akid=13587%2E878179%2EBvugCF)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13587%2E878179%2EBvugCF). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13587%2E878179%2EBvugCF).**

name: Andrew pr@votedrbob.com
subject: The truth about FEC deadlines
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
The truth about FEC deadlines.
This time of year, you're getting inundated with many fundraising requests from politicians, establishing urgency about giving before the quarter ends. Here's what that means.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
We have seven days to meet our goal before Q1 closes, and your grassroots support helps us accomplish that.
Your donation will be processed immediately if you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express.
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Friends, there are no pundits, politicos, or major media journalists whose opinions will be consequential in this race. That's not real. The truth is that quarterly earnings help a campaign show strength (for those watching the numbers). It also energizes volunteers and shows our viability.
But, we want more than to put up another healthy number this quarter; we want to make sure your funds are used to fuel a winning campaign : to get Bob Lorinser's Congressional campaign in front of more voters, to fund travel, literature, yard signs, and our incredible hardworking staff.
We need to continue the momentum.
Even when other campaigns are going through lulls, because we're funded by the people, our fundraising has kept up its pace. So grateful! But we can't let up. The energy taking shape in the district behind Bob is because he's out there every day talking to voters about the issues.
He's engaging with people , not PACs. To fund that outreach, we need to hit our goals, and our quarterly totals before April 1 will be made public. That's the "urgent" deadline you hear about.
Friends, our campaign has never been stronger. We've never been more energized and encouraged by the constituency to defeat MAGA extremist, Rep. Bergman this November.
So, we still need you with us. We need everyone in the district behind us again this year.
Together, we need to outwork, out-organize, and out-raise our opponents ahead of our primary in August. We're confident we've done that in the last four months, and now, going into the spring, we cannot take anything for granted.
This is serious. This is competitive. Bob is not in the race just for fun; Democracy is on the line.
We must fuel this fight, and, although there's no do-or-die situation in the next seven days, a boost in funds will help us get it done and save money to win in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
We greatly appreciate that you're in our corner. Let's continue to show the nation what we can do, together.
Onward!
Andrew
Andrew
Grassroots Communication
Bob Lorinser for Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01

clean_body: [] The truth about FEC deadlines. This time of year, you're getting inundated with many fundraising requests from politicians, establishing urgency about giving before the quarter ends. Here's what that means. [] We have seven days to meet our goal before Q1 closes, and your grassroots support helps us accomplish that. Your donation will be processed immediately if you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express. CONTRIBUTE $10 [] CONTRIBUTE $25 [] CONTRIBUTE $50 [] Friends, there are no pundits, politicos, or major media journalists whose opinions will be consequential in this race. That's not real. The truth is that quarterly earnings help a campaign show strength (for those watching the numbers). It also energizes volunteers and shows our viability. But, we want more than to put up another healthy number this quarter; we want to make sure your funds are used to fuel a winning campaign : to get Bob Lorinser's Congressional campaign in front of more voters, to fund travel, literature, yard signs, and our incredible hardworking staff. We need to continue the momentum. Even when other campaigns are going through lulls, because we're funded by the people, our fundraising has kept up its pace. So grateful! But we can't let up. The energy taking shape in the district behind Bob is because he's out there every day talking to voters about the issues. He's engaging with people , not PACs. To fund that outreach, we need to hit our goals, and our quarterly totals before April 1 will be made public. That's the "urgent" deadline you hear about. Friends, our campaign has never been stronger. We've never been more energized and encouraged by the constituency to defeat MAGA extremist, Rep. Bergman this November. So, we still need you with us. We need everyone in the district behind us again this year. Together, we need to outwork, out-organize, and out-raise our opponents ahead of our primary in August. We're confident we've done that in the last four months, and now, going into the spring, we cannot take anything for granted. This is serious. This is competitive. Bob is not in the race just for fun; Democracy is on the line. We must fuel this fight, and, although there's no do-or-die situation in the next seven days, a boost in funds will help us get it done and save money to win in November. [] We greatly appreciate that you're in our corner. Let's continue to show the nation what we can do, together. Onward! Andrew Andrew Grassroots Communication Bob Lorinser for Congress Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula Democrat, MI01 CONTRIBUTE [] [] Or, send a check to FRIENDS OF DR. BOB PO BOX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: Week 11: Legislative Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a3b86c6c75&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Dear Freedom Fighters,

On Monday, the House passed my [SCR 1021](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=c369100102&e=a7ab36849c). My general election opponent opted to hide in her office during this critical vote. It is worth noting this bill targets criminals who engage in child sex trafficking. Why would any elected official vote NO let alone hide in their office for any vote? The offenders of this law will be placed in prison for natural life with no ability for release. This is the Senate Concurrent Resolution to ensure child sex traffickers go to prison for natural life with no option of release. Since it passed both the Senate and the House it was transmitted to the Secretary of State where it will be assigned to the November ballot for the voters to vote yes or no. According to a recent poll, this measure already has 92% of the public’s support. If our Border wasn’t wide open, maybe Arizona wouldn’t have to show the rest of the nation what is needed to stem the flow of child sex trafficking.

On March 18th, I received word that [Senate Bill 1436](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e27fb7a847&e=a7ab36849c) was [signed into law](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=9cfc38bbb6&e=a7ab36849c). I sponsored this bill to hold criminals accountable who commit sex crimes. This is 2.0 of Kayleigh’s Law that was passed in 2022. This iteration allows victims of stalking, strangulation in domestic violence, and voyeurism to obtain lifetime injunctions against their offenders. In 2022, we passed [Kayleigh’s Law](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=62c08997ee&e=a7ab36849c) to allow victims of dangerous crimes to obtain lifetime injunctions against their abusers.

Later that day, the Senate held its last Senate Committee on Finance and Commerce. We had a packed [agenda](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=05305c33b0&e=a7ab36849c) and a lively discussion on 15 different House bills. Topic ranged from dealing with speculative online ticket sales to filtering sexually explicit material on cell phones and tablets. Later that night, I stopped by the Advisory Council on Education Reform’s retreat. They were in town this week to pow wow about I was asked to serve on this advisory council and of course, I said yes. I finally met [Kevin Roberts](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=11e6646960&e=a7ab36849c) the President of The Heritage Foundation. As many of you know, I worked at The Heritage Foundation in the 1990s. It is where my husband and I first met one another in February 1999 and the rest is history.

On Tuesday, Arizona held its Presidential Preference Election (PPE). The results of course indicate we are headed to a 2020-esque Trump versus Biden rematch. Let’s hope we have a different outcome this November! I thoroughly enjoy meeting new supporters. It was fun to meet with dozens of voters at the polls throughout the day. The top issues on voter’s minds include our open Border, inflation, homelessness, affordable housing, and sky-high food and gas prices. During one of the late afternoon rainstorms, I was also able to briefly tune into a lively discussion on empowering workers to promote economic growth sponsored by briefly the Club for Growth Foundation where I am a [2024 fellow](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=bee06097e0&e=a7ab36849c).

Right before noon, the Senate and House held a [joint press conference](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=15da5acf7e&e=a7ab36849c) to help kick-off [Arizona’s Children are Not for Sale](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e528702ec1&e=a7ab36849c) campaign. Please visit its website to see how you can best be involved in its victory.
It was great to help lead off this press conference on such an important issue impacting our children. As many of you know, anti-human trafficking efforts have been a passion of mine since I was first elected to the Arizona House of Representatives in 2018.

On Wednesday, I spent some time testifying in the morning over in the House on [Senate Bill 1372](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=05112ba27a&e=a7ab36849c) to [ban family reunification camps](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b40974ee3f&e=a7ab36849c). The testimony was as emotionally charging as it was in the Senate a few weeks ago. This coming week I have set up additional time for the advocates who came down to testify before the committee last week to answer additional questions from representatives who serve on the House Committee on Judiciary so they can best educate their fellow members as the vote comes to the floor for a vote.

Later in the day was the Senate Committee on Education held its last hearing of this legislative term. Sadly, the Democrats deemed a press conference outside was more important than attending our last committee meeting, so I motioned to have a revote on the agenda’s first bill near the close of the meeting to include the Democrats who were MIA.

Over in the House Committee on Municipal Oversight and Elections held a hearing on [Senate Bill 1375](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=01bd5078b7&e=a7ab36849c) to allow the numbering of our ballots and accountability of how many mail-in ballots are ordered, printed, etc. Senate Bill 1375 passed out of committee along a party line vote. Texas has been numbering their ballots for quite some time, bringing an added level of accountability to the state’s election integrity. Sadly, the chair of this committee never granted a hearing for [Senate Bill 1374](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=199e348ed0&e=a7ab36849c) banning foreign donations in our state’s election administration. [Louisiana voters](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=92f9d51db5&e=a7ab36849c) overwhelmingly voted to ban American billionaires and foreign donors from meddling in their elections. It is sad Arizona’s House leadership didn’t encourage the chair to help pave the way to do the same leading up to the November election.

On Thursday I filled in for Senator Rogers who was unable to serve on the Senate Committee on Judiciary that day. This was my second time this session serving on this committee. The committee [agenda](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=5e493bc4e0&e=a7ab36849c) included a bill pertaining to grooming to child sex trafficking. Unfortunately, one of the school districts I represent has had past problems where a teacher was grooming underage students. During my vote explanation for this bill, I referenced [Deer Valley Unified School District](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=60ac5844b5&e=a7ab36849c). You can watch or listen to my explanation here at [1:06:47](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=bd7e9fd7c3&e=a7ab36849c). Over in the House, two of my bills passed overwhelmingly: [Senate Bill 1371](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f2e981e37e&e=a7ab36849c) passed 57-1 and [Senate Bill 1629](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=3236acb1ea&e=a7ab36849c) passed 58-0.

Senate Bill 1371 helps domestic violence and sexual violence victims become a priority who often have had to wait months to obtain police reports. This bill will give these victims the ability to obtain police reports needed to break leases and obtain orders of protection. This bill will also give victims the opportunity to have meaningful conversations with prosecutors before their cases are pled out.

Senate Bill 1629 was backed by the American Conservative Union/CPAC that will establish independent oversight of the state’s Department of Corrections, Rehabilitation and Reentry. Currently, the legislature appropriates over a $1.5 billion for our state’s prison system. Now, the legislature will receive more data about the effectiveness of this large expenditure to make better decisions about this agency’s future. After all, government exists for public safety. I look forward to seeing how to be good stewards of taxpayer dollars for this agency.

On Friday, the Senate Republicans’ [weekly newsletter](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=fb781955ca&e=a7ab36849c) was distributed. You can [sign up](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=eeb63c7338&e=a7ab36849c) if you are so inclined. One of my bills [Senate Bill 1376](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=de6c4d4ea5&e=a7ab36849c) received a hearing in the House Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure during a special meeting. This bill was brought to me by ABATE. Wouldn’t it be great if we didn’t worry about other drivers dropping their load on our roadways who opted not to secure it in the first place? We have all seen lawn chairs, ladders, paint cans, and the like scattered along our roadways and highways to many of our own detriment. Last year, our son was driving his RAV-4 when a 4Runner plowed into him on the 202 after spinning around and side swiping a pallet of flooring tile after rush hour and the sun had set. Senate Bill 1376 unanimously passed out of committee. Next, it will go to the entire House for a vote.

Now that committee works is all but complete, we will finish voting on bills. I hear the governor doesn’t want to start budget negotiations until after the next financial report is released in April. Expect the legislature to take a pause in the next few weeks as our state’s budget is hammered out.

**Signatures are due by April 1 st to qualify for the July 30th GOP primary ballot. If you live in my legislative district, please be sure to sign my online nomination petition. **

Do you have an interest in helping on our campaign? We are going to need boots on the ground and reserves in our brigade. From making phone calls, sending text messages, writing post cards, delivering yard signs, installing 4x4 signs, and hosting events, we are going to need all hands on the deck to keep the legislative majority.

If you would like to help, just reply to this email, and tell us how you can best help. Thank you so much for your continued support!

Take care,
Shawnna

---
| P.S. Please consider making a donation to our campaign to save the State Senate today.

---
| |

**ICYMI**

_It Goes Too Far Campaign_

I am sure you have seen the paid circulators near retail outlets and public libraries over the past few months collecting signatures for the abortion initiative. Sadly, when asked most of them cannot explain what is included in the language. There are countless individuals circulating the “Arizona Abortion Access Act” to place on the November 5, 2024, Arizona ballot to allow unrestricted, unregulated abortion on demand. You can read it for yourself [**HERE**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=810ff59265&e=a7ab36849c).

To counter this extreme effort, a campaign called [**“It Goes Too Far”**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=5bf81743e1&e=a7ab36849c) has been established. I recently attended a brainstorming meeting on their efforts, and here are some of my takeaways:
* This constitutional amendment if passed would amend the Arizona Constitution **and** cannot be adjusted by lawmakers to address any future concerns.
* The current safeguards and protections in place right now to protect girls and women seeking an abortion from an abortion clinic would be removed.
* If passed, it would remove the required medical doctor who is trained to handle and detect any complications.
* It prohibits punishment for people who take girls to get an abortion, so if a child is sex trafficked, her trafficker could take the victim to get an abortion to cover their crime, and her parents would never be notified, and they could not be prosecuted.

In 2022, the Arizona Legislature passed a 15-week (that’s almost four months) limit bill that was signed into law. If this initiative passes, it overturns the current 15-week abortion limit, while overturning the current common-sense regulations by allowing unregulated abortion on demand up until the moment of birth for the mother’s mental health, an undefined term that has included all factors related to the woman’s well-being, including stress or anxiety.

I agree with the counter campaign, this initiative **goes too far**. The way this initiative is drafted it no longer would require a medical doctor to perform or provide the abortion. The language would allow unqualified health care professionals to perform abortions, including chiropractors, podiatrists, and massage therapists, and so on.

If this initiative passes, it overturns the current 15-week abortion limit, while overturning the current common-sense regulations by allowing unregulated abortion on demand up until the moment of birth for the mother’s mental health, an undefined term that has included all factors related to the woman’s well-being, including stress or anxiety. I agree with the counter campaign, this initiative goes too far. The way this initiative is drafted it no longer would require a medical doctor to perform or provide the abortion. The language would allow unqualified health care professionals to perform abortions, including chiropractors, podiatrists, and massage therapists, and so on. | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK. Fellow American,

body:
I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I can't explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it - there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

Unfortunately, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with conservatives like you.

**With that being said, could you do me the simple favor of just reading this all the way through to the end?** If you get to the end and still don't think you have the power to make a difference, then I just want to thank you for your time.

While roughly 35% of supporters open these messages, only an average of 1% of supporters will step up to donate, which makes it difficult since I rely on Americans like you receiving this message to hit my fundraising goals.

I refuse to rely on billionaires and Wall Street executives for money. I want our conservative values fueled by the people who believe in them most - you and me.

**And you know what?** If everyone who opened this email gave just $1 - __one single dollar__ - we'd be able to hit all of our goals.

Growing up, my mom worked at a factory that made aluminum chairs and my father was a bartender. Their wages combined with their hard work allowed for them to buy a home and live in a good community.

**I 'm trying to restore America to the time when it wasn't unusual that a factory worker and a bartender could afford a home. I'd appreciate it if you could go above and beyond and donate the price of a roll of aluminum foil! [Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time.
