_Democrats hope I give up on you and stop sending these emails.

They also hope you stop reading these emails.

They'd love it if we both give up on our conservative values altogether._

_**I won 't give up on you, and I hope you won't quit on me or our shared values either.**_ I know a lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake. If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.

But if you think we need to get this country back on track and restore the American Dream, please donate whatever you can before midnight.

clean_body: I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days. | | | | | Friend, I can't explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it - there are a lot of political emails being sent these days. Unfortunately, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with conservatives like you. With that being said, could you do me the simple favor of just reading this all the way through to the end? If you get to the end and still don't think you have the power to make a difference, then I just want to thank you for your time. While roughly 35% of supporters open these messages, only an average of 1% of supporters will step up to donate, which makes it difficult since I rely on Americans like you receiving this message to hit my fundraising goals. I refuse to rely on billionaires and Wall Street executives for money. I want our conservative values fueled by the people who believe in them most - you and me. And you know what? If everyone who opened this email gave just $1 - one single dollar - we'd be able to hit all of our goals. | | "DONATE $1 >>" | | "DONATE WHATEVER YOU CAN >>" Growing up, my mom worked at a factory that made aluminum chairs and my father was a bartender. Their wages combined with their hard work allowed for them to buy a home and live in a good community. I 'm trying to restore America to the time when it wasn't unusual that a factory worker and a bartender could afford a home. I'd appreciate it if you could go above and beyond and donate the price of a roll of aluminum foil! "Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time. I rely on folks like you, who can give $3, $9, or even $18.25 to reach my goals." | | "CHIP IN THE PRICE OF ALUMINUM FOIL >>" Democrats hope I give up on you and stop sending these emails. They also hope you stop reading these emails. They'd love it if we both give up on our conservative values altogether. I won 't give up on you, and I hope you won't quit on me or our shared values either. I know a lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake. If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today. But if you think we need to get this country back on track and restore the American Dream, please donate whatever you can before midnight. | | "DONATE TODAY" | Marco Rubio | | | * "Marco Rubio Endorses Young Kim" | "JOIN MARCO!" | Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee 1101 30th St. NW #125 Washington, DC 20007 The appearance of U.S. Department of Defense (DoD) visual information does not imply or constitute DoD endorsement.

body:
He’s at it again...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21057%2E4449941%2EZfJyR2)
---
**The U.S.P.S. is under fire from Trump again:** [ ]() _Republicans are working to SMEAR the Postal Service in a transparent attempt to discredit vote-by-mail options and influence the 2024 Election:_

**So we’re conducting an urgent public opinion poll to combat the GOP’s lies:** | [WE NEED YOUR INPUT, TEAM: Take our Emergency Postal Worker Approval Poll so we can fight back these allegations the MAGA crooks are trying to push and save our postal workers »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20240324_EMPOLL_E3_T0_GM-14D-AC&t=7&akid=21057%2E4449941%2EZfJyR2)
---
With Trump appointee Louis DeJoy at the helm of the U.S.P.S., he’s liable to run it into the ground! **We must do ALL we can to protect the Postal Service!**

_Which is why we need 500 Democrats (including you) to take our emergency poll so we can stand by our diligent postal workers:_
**[_DO YOU SUPPORT YOUR LOCAL U.S.P.S. WORKERS? »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20240324_EMPOLL_E3_T0_GM-14D-AC&t=8&akid=21057%2E4449941%2EZfJyR2)** | [YES, I DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20240324_EMPOLL_E3_T0_GM-14D-AC&t=9&akid=21057%2E4449941%2EZfJyR2)
---

**_*WE NEED 500 RESPONSES FROM YOUR STATE FOR AN ACCURATE CONSENSUS*_**
Thank you for your help!

-FFR

name: American Update
subject: New EPA Auto Emission Rules Reflect The Madness Of King Biden
body:
And ‘Not Likely To Happen’: Jonathan Turley Pours Cold Water On Letitia James’ Plans To Seize Trump’s Assets

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c697454%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NkIvYMK5XOgu4ZcUkFzjlA&sysid=1 New EPA Auto Emission Rules Reflect The Madness Of King Biden

In a move that is certain to be challenged in the courts, the Biden Environmental Protection Agency enacted a de facto ban on many gas-powered cars this week in the form of a final regulation on allowable tailpipe emissions.

George Washington University law professor Jonathan Turley said Friday that former President Donald Trump was “not likely” to see his properties seized by Democratic Attorney General Letitia James of New York.

The U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) announced on Saturday the creation of a new entity to train state and local officials on procedures to apply “red flag” laws that temporarily prevent certain individuals from owning a firearm.

name: Colin
subject: I'm humbled and honored to be the official Democratic nominee in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
It's time to fire Ted Cruz.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81586070/462900345/789451736?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-03-24_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkY2ExMWJhLTIxZWEtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cyU4v08EZB_GK6AOriNyfXsRYllZnvg3ddV91y7bP7o=)
---
We did it, Peter: I officially became the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in Texas!

I am so grateful to my fellow Texas voters and grassroots supporters like you for entrusting me with this honor – I will not let you down.

I'm ready to outwork Ted Cruz to win this thing because the stakes of this election are too high not to. From voting rights to abortion, our freedoms are under attack. Everyday costs are still too high. **Simply put: Texans cannot afford six more years of Ted Cruz.**

**That’s why this campaign is so important. Two recent polls showed us tied with Cruz, and I know we can win this race – but I need you with me to do it. So I have to ask, Peter: [_Will you donate $5 or $10 right now to help me and Fight for Progress keep up tonight's momentum all the way through Election Day? Every dollar helps as we work to build the massive grassroots movement it'll take to fire Ted Cruz. →_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81586071/462900346/789451736?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-03-24_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkY2ExMWJhLTIxZWEtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cyU4v08EZB_GK6AOriNyfXsRYllZnvg3ddV91y7bP7o=)**

The real race begins right now, Peter, and it's going to be a tough fight. But don't worry – I've been an underdog my whole life. I know what it takes to beat the odds and win a tough fight.

I'm a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom who sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. I never knew my dad but thanks to my community of teachers, coaches and counselors at the YMCA, who helped my mom, aunt and uncle raise me, I had the opportunity to chase my version of the American Dream.

Without them, I never would've made it to the NFL, gone to law school, become a civil rights lawyer, served in the Obama Administration, or run against a 22-year GOP incumbent and won, becoming the first Democrat to ever represent TX-32 in Congress.

**And thanks to them, I am where I am today: the official Democratic nominee who has the chance to become Texas’ first Black Senator.** The chance to finally defeat Ted Cruz and give Texans the committed leadership we deserve.

With experts calling Ted Cruz the most vulnerable GOP senator in the country and two polls showing us TIED, the only thing that could hold us back is resources.

It’s true that everything is bigger in Texas, and this campaign is no exception. It’s going to take the biggest grassroots movement Texas has ever seen to beat Ted Cruz. **Ted Cruz already has more than $6.5 million in the bank to attack me with, so please:**

[_**Will you chip in $5, $10, or any amount to me and Fight for Progress before midnight tonight to make sure I have the resources to fight back against Ted Cruz's attacks, reach voters across Texas, and win? name: Qasim Rashid
subject: Thank you for everything
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY QASIM FOR CONGRESS]
body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=35957%2E120265%2EAFNJ9B ]Qasim for Congress

Friend,

Thank you for everything.

When I announced that I was running for Congress back in July, we
committed to running a people funded campaign on the issues that mattered.
And with your support, we had tens of thousands of conversations with
voters about economic justice, guaranteed universal healthcare, social and
racial justice, climate action, disability rights, getting money out of
politics, standing up for organized labor, and so much more. We also got
to invest in local staff who I have no doubt will be tomorrow's leaders.

This race didn't turn out the way we wanted it to, but thanks to your
support, we were able to show that our values are popular, and change is
necessary. As my team and I all decide what our next chapter looks like, I
assure you that we will continue to lead with justice in every pursuit,
because Justice Can't Wait. [ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/7502?t=1002&akid=35957%2E120265%2EAFNJ9B ]Until then, I hope you will stay in touch.

In gratitude,

— Qasim Rashid

Donate to our campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/qr-em-footer?t=1003&refcode2=35957_120265_AFNJ9B&akid=35957%2E120265%2EAFNJ9B

body:
You'll be able to look back at your pin and remember how we fought to keep abortion legal, and we won.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1970%2E4032634%2Etl8lFo)
---
ICYMI: [**For a limited time, when you donate $25 or more to support Elizabeth’s campaign that’s fighting to keep abortion legal and pass federal protections, we’ll send you a free “Keep Abortion Legal” pin to share our gratitude!**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1929?t=8&akid=1970%2E4032634%2Etl8lFo) | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1929?t=9&akid=1970%2E4032634%2Etl8lFo)
---

Every donation helps strengthen our movement that’s relentlessly fighting to protect abortion rights and keep MAGA extremists from passing a national ban after the 2024 election.
Anti-abortion political groups have drafted a plan to rescind abortion rights in every possible way — and they’ll hand that plan to President Trump on Day 1 of his presidency. But Elizabeth has a plan, too:
* Fight like hell to keep Trump out of the White House.
* Work to re-elect President Biden, flip the House, and expand the Senate with more pro-choice Democrats so we have the votes we need to codify abortion rights into federal law.
* Continue supporting organizing initiatives at the state level to pass abortion protections — like the ones who won in Kansas, Michigan, and Ohio.
* Fight back against the baseless attempts to ban medication abortion and birth control.

**Your support ensures we can do this work. And every time you wear your pin, you'll help remind everyone what you’re fighting for in the 2024 elections. And if you hold onto your pin, years into the future, you'll be able to look back at it and remember how — together — we fought to keep abortion legal, and we won.**
[**So please, pitch in $25 or more today to receive your “Keep Abortion Legal” pin, and let’s keep fighting like hell to pass federal abortion protections.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1929?t=10&akid=1970%2E4032634%2Etl8lFo)
Thanks,
Team Warren

**_****_**
This is one of the most important moments for Mazie’s re-election campaign.
End-of-quarter fundraising deadlines are public deadlines, which means that everyone will be able to see both how much we’ve raised and how many donations we’ve received so far this year. As proud as we are of what we’ve done with this grassroots team, all of our public reports are out there for the world to see.
These reports are an important part of our fair and transparent election system. They leave nothing to hide. **And that’s why right-wing billionaires and dark money interests will be waiting to look at ours.**
If they see our grassroots momentum slow down, they’ll catch on right away, and they won’t be afraid to take it as a green light to fund attack ads and mailers designed to muddy the waters for Hawaii voters and put a stop to Mazie’s progressive agenda.
**How do we know? Because they contributed to a record-breaking _$1.2 million_ in outside spending in Hawaii in 2022.** So with all that’s on the line this November — from our Senate majority to who controls the White House — we have to be extra vigilant. And we need to show that our grassroots team is stronger than ever.
[**So Peter, will you pitch in $7 to show right-wing billionaires and GOP Super PACs that we have what it takes to power Mazie across the finish line?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81586485/462901920/1349703860?amount=7&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240324_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjUxM2RhYy0yNWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WKOUptlgSANJX12GnkZHtc0jOVAf7A5bilwPCDxNSv4=)
Thank you,
Hirono HQ
Friends of Mazie Hirono
---
Friends of Mazie Hirono
335 Merchant Street
#677
Honolulu, HI 96809
United States

name: Candace Owens
subject: Addressing the rumors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GeorgeTom Inc
body:
I want you to hear this directly from me.
I want you to hear this directly from me.

---
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM1O9CAUhq8GdtOUAy1lwWK-b1IXJqYudYf8WCYgLbTWuXvTOro95_158qo4Be9uEvF_CGD0piAARM8IYH7ZYl6v8fHhROb0eprbp9jsX_iPAJbbZP-k95TKRuXDfuUXbCR1pmbYSsIJoaQRROBRUkJqEAY06dqu44YJ6oTmnbMULDQWewk1sJoCg93FKq2cZVY40TacW84Rq4-eSkWbvVakLJvKOaVY6RRxkOOyTOUA6xH0W07Vx6qDXcuPTaeIoL8jI-g_d5Er-vr1PAxviPbHCvRy5mpbBj4ZnKWZNh-CL-3e_v4b8x0AAP__XORgmQ)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8FugzAQRL_G3ILwGuxw4NAWpYdKvbcXZOwlccVispig_H1FlPb6dmZnxtI8huHeCPMqAC7BLwJAqBcBcP3aiNcf-ng_yGv8Plz1J1X7Fd4EQLrP-C99fsmRbBh3atrMN2rwRZlhI42USla1rLNL44yvdH8cnOt1r7AcUFYoB33UoKQCmYUGCigLBSXsrjJ3dsAS66HWlTFojCiLR05uCTk4K5e0WeYYKXeRsrG5pDQvj2InASdnJ28dxg2nJWe83XIXdxw7H6cuUrdx5-JhnKDrufvL3r3qZCmuUxKqrQoBmtGtzGE6C9UmXlGAXhN1hD6sJFTb85MscWWHQrWTG58oIe-SjWXGjZ-3MI5h0fuW82OLi_QbAAD__1TJezg)
---
| Friend,
Throughout my life, I’ve faced a lot of attacks, smears, and threats.
Most recently, I was subjected to one of the worst smear jobs I’ve ever experienced at the hands of the Anti-Defamation League all for daring to speak my mind as a Christian woman.
But I want to make one thing perfectly clear to you: **_I am not a victim._**
I _made the decision_ to speak freely, ask legitimate questions, and pursue the truth. Surrendering my principles even in the face of extreme opposition never even crossed my mind.
**I chose freedom over fear.**
_And there is NOTHING more empowering than that._
Today, I’ve taken a significant step forward in my journey to fight for truth and freedom. I am independent and ready to take my fight for truth directly to Americans like **_YOU_**. _And I pray that you’ll join me on this journey._ | | | | [JOIN ME](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8FugzAQRL_G3ILwGuxw4NAWpYdKvbcXZOwlccVispig_H1FlPb6dmZnxtI8huHeCPMqAC7BLwJAqBcBcP3aiNcf-ng_yGv8Plz1J1X7Fd4EQLrP-C99fsmRbBh3atrMN2rwRZlhI42USla1rLNL44yvdH8cnOt1r7AcUFYoB33UoKQCmYUGCigLBSXsrjJ3dsAS66HWlTFojCiLR05uCTk4K5e0WeYYKXeRsrG5pDQvj2InASdnJ28dxg2nJWe83XIXdxw7H6cuUrdx5-JhnKDrufvL3r3qZCmuUxKqrQoBmtGtzGE6C9UmXlGAXhN1hD6sJFTb85MscWWHQrWTG58oIe-SjWXGjZ-3MI5h0fuW82OLi_QbAAD__1TJezg)
---
Despite being attacked by rich and powerful forces at anti-American organizations like the Anti-Defamation League, this wasn’t a difficult decision for me to make. Their fear tactics simply did not work on me.

_Because the**only** thing I fear is God._

**So long as I stand by what is true, I have nothing to fear at all.**

The smears, the hit jobs, the lies, and the attacks are all powerless against God and the unrelenting courage He grants me.

_Truth and freedom will always prevail._

**[Now, please join me as we rise above adversity and forge a path towards a future where honesty, integrity, and freedom reign supreme in America.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8FugzAQRL_G3ILwGuxw4NAWpYdKvbcXZOwlccVispig_H1FlPb6dmZnxtI8huHeCPMqAC7BLwJAqBcBcP3aiNcf-ng_yGv8Plz1J1X7Fd4EQLrP-C99fsmRbBh3atrMN2rwRZlhI42USla1rLNL44yvdH8cnOt1r7AcUFYoB33UoKQCmYUGCigLBSXsrjJ3dsAS66HWlTFojCiLR05uCTk4K5e0WeYYKXeRsrG5pDQvj2InASdnJ28dxg2nJWe83XIXdxw7H6cuUrdx5-JhnKDrufvL3r3qZCmuUxKqrQoBmtGtzGE6C9UmXlGAXhN1hD6sJFTb85MscWWHQrWTG58oIe-SjWXGjZ-3MI5h0fuW82OLi_QbAAD__1TJezg)**

clean_body: I want you to hear this directly from me. I want you to hear this directly from me. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Friend, Throughout my life, I’ve faced a lot of attacks, smears, and threats. Most recently, I was subjected to one of the worst smear jobs I’ve ever experienced at the hands of the Anti-Defamation League all for daring to speak my mind as a Christian woman. But I want to make one thing perfectly clear to you: I am not a victim. I made the decision to speak freely, ask legitimate questions, and pursue the truth. Surrendering my principles even in the face of extreme opposition never even crossed my mind. I chose freedom over fear. And there is NOTHING more empowering than that. Today, I’ve taken a significant step forward in my journey to fight for truth and freedom. I am independent and ready to take my fight for truth directly to Americans like YOU. And I pray that you’ll join me on this journey. | | | | Despite being attacked by rich and powerful forces at anti-American organizations like the Anti-Defamation League, this wasn’t a difficult decision for me to make. Their fear tactics simply did not work on me. Because theonly thing I fear is God. So long as I stand by what is true, I have nothing to fear at all. The smears, the hit jobs, the lies, and the attacks are all powerless against God and the unrelenting courage He grants me. Truth and freedom will always prevail. Thank you for all of your support. God bless you, Candace Owens | | | Paid for by GeorgeTom Inc.

name: Breaking News VA
subject: Donald Trump wants to defund Virginia schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
Folks, when Donald Trump campaigned in Richmond last weekend, we heard a lot of nonsense from the former president.
Some of it — like his promise to flip VA red in November — we’re already pushing back on with the full force of this grassroots movement (thanks to your support!).
But that’s not all he said.
Trump also stood on stage and said that if he wins the presidency, he will rip away federal funding from Virginia schools (seriously).
Don’t just take our word for it — here’s former GOP Congresswoman Barbara Comstock’s reaction:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
This is just ridiculous!
We can’t let Donald Trump and his reckless policies anywhere near the Oval Office.
But Trump is determined to win in Virginia and all across the country, so we’re going to need all hands on deck to stop him.
Please, chip in any amount to Tim Kaine’s reelection campaign today to keep VA blue and hold our Democratic Senate majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]

clean_body: [] Folks, when Donald Trump campaigned in Richmond last weekend, we heard a lot of nonsense from the former president. Some of it — like his promise to flip VA red in November — we’re already pushing back on with the full force of this grassroots movement (thanks to your support!). But that’s not all he said. Trump also stood on stage and said that if he wins the presidency, he will rip away federal funding from Virginia schools (seriously). Don’t just take our word for it — here’s former GOP Congresswoman Barbara Comstock’s reaction: [] This is just ridiculous! We can’t let Donald Trump and his reckless policies anywhere near the Oval Office. But Trump is determined to win in Virginia and all across the country, so we’re going to need all hands on deck to stop him. Please, chip in any amount to Tim Kaine’s reelection campaign today to keep VA blue and hold our Democratic Senate majority. [] If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] DONATE $500 [] OTHER [] Thank you for your support! -Team Kaine for Virginia CONTRIBUTE [] Paid for by Kaine for Virginia 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272 Williamsburg, VA 23185 Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. **It’s true:** Just last year we won over 30 special elections, defying odds and breaking barriers for communities. And if we continue to build our grassroots power, there is no stopping what we can do.
**The contrast is clear – Democrats are focused on protecting our rights, while Republicans are doing everything they can to take them away.**

name: Team Schiff
subject: Trump v. Biden Poll
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=6039%2E5257348%2Eo2efjc)
Derek — we are only a couple of months out from the elections for president and the United States Senate, and it looks like it’s going to be neck and neck.
It’s official that President Biden will run against Donald Trump, and Adam Schiff will run against celebrity Republican Steve Garvey in this upcoming November election.
[**Derek, we have a simple question for you, and it is the same question we have asked our Republican opponent. If you had to choose now, who would you elect as president?**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20230320-Trump-Biden-Poll.04PZCK&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20240324_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=6039%2E5257348%2Eo2efjc)
| [BIDEN](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20230320-Trump-Biden-Poll.04PZCK&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20240324_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=6039%2E5257348%2Eo2efjc)
---
[TRUMP](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20230320-Trump-Biden-Poll.04PZCK&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20240324_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=6039%2E5257348%2Eo2efjc)
---
Believe it or not, after _two_ elections, _one_ insurrection, and _four_ criminal indictments for the former president, Adam’s opponent Steve Garvey _still_ won’t say who he’s voting for in November. He has already voted for Trump _twice_ and although he won’t admit it, his voting record shows he _will_ vote for Trump come November. And more than that, he would be another Trump enabler if he ever got to the Senate. We must make sure that he doesn’t get the chance.

body:
Trump was right!

| [ ](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d97f0133475d460c8bea5b37a9ac8e38&_e=3-fuQawHt-2bzlOKTyB5valKnJoh85GPYGzJv77PdrKw_KkBYCg9Jf-8IIhNyTrTZjGIxfeFC5rhCLb3gHK-uzVV40uzSjR99DV6qXNbBDvjmtPGeU5dGwgmIeRFXIq4JxOk2AA_Hn6M3uat3kyeg_DNrvRz8-o1qqWLq9gLti3aI4F_sJYsScZ4ZHsKqDu4ABJmAhdPEXoaMn9dKwAqDroTnysK0g_ql11sN4Ic4T2A-CJnaOAOLaFF7cdskn-E0yplRsX9_sYCtGF0vbwsKDFgjnp7hHaCeKGEXmWuKprAxPpBZM88m01ot5vvbP362rZMrJAXriRJGWBXVEttbYfhZ88Xq2dT0uFwuHyrAAU%3D)

Major news for you today, Patriot!

**A years-long investigation finally revealed that President Trump was right:** Obama illegally set the CIA and other agencies to recruit foreign governments to spy on Donald Trump and his campaign.

I had to share this news with my most diligent supporters because we need to **expose the corruption ASAP!**

Essentially, Obama said "sic em" and set the CIA on Trump, but there are **top-secret documents** with proof that the spying and election interference goes beyond what we initially thought.

I can't rest easy knowing how far the Radical Left will go to stop ALL Republicans. From the President of the United States to hardworking everyday patriots like you, the radicals will not cease until they strip us of all of our God-given rights.

We have to expose their illegal and unconstitutional corruption before it's too late. **We 're only just now learning how deep their schemes run, but I know for a fact that this is only the beginning...**

If they can do this to a duly elected President, they'll infringe on the rights of anyone, so we have to fight back today to save our country tomorrow. Our rights, our future, everything depends on the actions we take right now.

[**I cannot emphasize enough that this cannot wait, Patriot, I need you in this fight right now.**](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d97f0133475d460c8bea5b37a9ac8e38&_e=3-fuQawHt-2bzlOKTyB5valKnJoh85GPYGzJv77PdrKw_KkBYCg9Jf-8IIhNyTrTZjGIxfeFC5rhCLb3gHK-uzVV40uzSjR99DV6qXNbBDvjmtPGeU5dGwgmIeRFXIq4JxOk2AA_Hn6M3uat3kyeg_DNrvRz8-o1qqWLq9gLti3jkSA1tux-2_Mmys3avnPY-lAbrm3uJgSwV9otdsHyLnPAFwCnkuJpE5E7zLI7Lx5MP5-BdC97wQc06Ir7jjt45Zq_t_nE9CScWj0GXkr6uyEMo_1xN-phgqloRbwhqc2W4mFfDFD8NMd4H_8Lo4vlhSjF5QVZK6pvB5Xrp2WsTXsqGFenO8vqQUrqWKLhhUxi6QqoygHNgSIw9eG0W5PO)
[ **JOIN ME IN THE FIGHT** ](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d97f0133475d460c8bea5b37a9ac8e38&_e=3-fuQawHt-2bzlOKTyB5valKnJoh85GPYGzJv77PdrKw_KkBYCg9Jf-8IIhNyTrTZjGIxfeFC5rhCLb3gHK-uzVV40uzSjR99DV6qXNbBDvjmtPGeU5dGwgmIeRFXIq4JxOk2AA_Hn6M3uat3kyeg_DNrvRz8-o1qqWLq9gLti3jkSA1tux-2_Mmys3avnPY-lAbrm3uJgSwV9otdsHyLhjeKxg9q-lqjH0zJD-LcFpKn-yWrqqDeE2N8uCLCdDTNIM0S467EZFYtLMmTeRZpa8h5fp3n3K5fUBwiq2O9fYYDJQDRWwYck_p_vZUoTm9pIzD-Kns-Dw4A5x4cGk4jf6j2utxf0AxbPxUE_RwtQTVs08Mj-4Mj19xhm1ylSaX)

body:
Our first end-of-quarter deadline is just 7 days away. |
#
---
Team — Our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the general election is just **7 days away.** We’re going to give you 7 reasons why you should pitch in to Fight Like Hell PAC in just a second — but before we do, [**can we count on you to chip in $7 or any amount you can today to help us close out this quarter strong?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81587560/462905504/-1832949506?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=7&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20240324_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODJiMTFiNmYtMzJlYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i0gOd5yABP5GDyjYyniRnaagSl2Q5qiiwSC39AMcCEU=) | [DONATE $7](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81587561/462905509/1253923692?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=7&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20240324_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODJiMTFiNmYtMzJlYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i0gOd5yABP5GDyjYyniRnaagSl2Q5qiiwSC39AMcCEU=)
---
1. Whoever wins Michigan will most likely win the White House.

2. Michigan was one of the country’s most competitive swing states in 2020, and polls are showing it could be _even closer_ in 2024.

3. In fact, some pundits are even predicting that Michigan will be _the_ state that delivers the winning candidate their 270th electoral vote and sends them to the White House.

4. Donald Trump knows this, which is why he and his extremist allies are planning to invest heavily in our state to flip Michigan from blue to red.

5. And he could pass his far-right agenda of a national abortion ban, cuts to Social Security and Medicare, and more if he wins.

6. President Biden and Vice President Harris are counting on us to deliver Michigan for them.

7. And the best way to ensure that we’re on track to do that is by reaching fundraising goals like this so we can continue to execute our campaign plans.

Dear Peter,
Shocking, the Centers for Disease Control (CDC) released a paper about myocarditis from COVID-19 vaccinations.
There's just one problem: The entire 148-page report is redacted!
What good is a report if an entire study is unreadable?
The level of arrogance and contempt for the public in releasing an entirely redacted document is extraordinary. The CDC is thumbing their nose at the Freedom of Information Act–and they’re thumbing their nose at accountability, honesty and they are telling you they don’t care about your health.
RFK Jr. is going to change this when he moves into 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue.
You see, without transparency, there is no such thing as a Republic.
That's why when Robert F. Kennedy Jr. becomes president, the CDC won't get to decide what the public sees, and they won’t be able to hide their mistakes.
Under an RFK Jr. Administration, everything, __and we mean everything__ , will be out in the open.
You and I will no longer need attorneys, courts, or judges, or FOIA’s, to discover the truth.
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will require 100% transparency and accountability from every single one of the 438 Federal Agencies and every single penny of the $6.2 trillion budget.
Please support Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s campaign today. We need to spend more than $15 million to obtain ballot access in all 50 states and the District of Columbia.
By contributing, you're supporting medical liberty and science. [Please donate now before it's too late! ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=covid_cover_up_3_24_24_nd3&n=3)

P.S. — From Day 1 of the manufactured COVID-19 hysteria, Kennedy has been sounding the alarm about the origins of the pandemic and the harm caused by the extraordinary overreach of vaccine mandates and lockdowns. subject: We know why the border’s open.

body:
Cheating

| [ ](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6596e3abeaa748f9926fda792005db55&_e=Fq_5Rvvtj9jEfR3a8KaXLOpbri8sHX994m_iw5eHYKHHT61ZeNr3cH_edFZFVoNyLAZhhSoQ8FRx3KrTU6ImFj4mzjy8zRJBzDVoKXihW2CV3r_a40f9pvqcXzJwJX_ik3eYS9Wc2B47ttbuJzN0I6XfnLO2ZZHHBy_B7WZ1115cTO5Zdvwonyc-ljrsRDQ4VBPvtJ6evCyEyE1nuDM6_LaNBGLjEk5_kefK6EScvB1lxqaffcXHN7Ip0DBwnNGOnar-flbgBZ5OPWvQ94zHbEcFEN-pJ4OZTqmEsam4B5p7QbtHygqYb4SpU6Lvq1LV9tJbFQKET2on0Wb6lmD-7ooCkNosayTgL4ucMf-wkamz4CaNQPbF72j2BdiVgaxfHPMcBd2BuzdmZgy2repKlkhys7RY4a-8G2k5vLreyjM%3D)
---
Friend,

We all know why President Biden is keeping the border open. ****THEY ARE CHEATING****
They're counting illegals in their census so they can ship them around the country to get more Democratic votes so they can control Congress.

This is purely political - President Biden would sell out this ENTIRE NATION (AND HE HAS) if it meant he could get more votes.

The bad news is that this could seriously hurt our chances of electing President Trump and others who will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN...

President Trump is counting on us to be the tip of the spear against the Biden Administration and to ensure that Texas is ready for a HUGE victory in November.

We KNOW the Biden Administration is cheating, whether it's terrorism, drugs, or other crimes. Joe Biden's willing to trade ALL this if it means four more years in office.

**[IT'S TIME TO GET TO WORK, IT'S TIME TO STOP THE BIDEN ADMINISTRATION.](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6596e3abeaa748f9926fda792005db55&_e=Fq_5Rvvtj9jEfR3a8KaXLOpbri8sHX994m_iw5eHYKHHT61ZeNr3cH_edFZFVoNyLAZhhSoQ8FRx3KrTU6ImFj4mzjy8zRJBzDVoKXihW2CV3r_a40f9pvqcXzJwJX_ik3eYS9Wc2B47ttbuJzN0I6XfnLO2ZZHHBy_B7WZ1115cTO5Zdvwonyc-ljrsRDQ4VBPvtJ6evCyEyE1nuDM6_LaNBGLjEk5_kefK6EScvB1lxqaffcXHN7Ip0DBwnNGOnar-flbgBZ5OPWvQ94zHbNIxVPb6nM2OOR0pqQNCGp-3tdD02Ff0l9i4k6KCxyh-XUYlUJ9ru3YEN2YeCC4MxBpnBPdJD-GO84epXIA2-z1TW7SrUUwLLLYwXa56qmiuQ_k73uvJpxy10Og6G6ToctvqJIcr0lGZQ4z3htI5E5I%3D)**

I won't stop fighting. I CAN'T stop fighting.

The fate of the nation hangs in the balance in 2024. Our lives, our families, and all the things we love could be SHATTERED if we're stuck with four more years of President Biden and his establishment lapdogs in Congress.

I'm fighting to put TEXAS FIRST AND MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. Together, we'll make sure the Lone Star State is ready for a WAVE of America First support by clearing out the RINOs and doing what is RIGHT and JUST for the people of our great state.

I will NEVER stop fighting for YOU.

clean_body: Cheating | Friend, We all know why President Biden is keeping the border open. **THEY ARE CHEATING They're counting illegals in their census so they can ship them around the country to get more Democratic votes so they can control Congress. This is purely political - President Biden would sell out this ENTIRE NATION (AND HE HAS) if it meant he could get more votes. The bad news is that this could seriously hurt our chances of electing President Trump and others who will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN... President Trump is counting on us to be the tip of the spear against the Biden Administration and to ensure that Texas is ready for a HUGE victory in November. We KNOW the Biden Administration is cheating, whether it's terrorism, drugs, or other crimes. Joe Biden's willing to trade ALL this if it means four more years in office. I won't stop fighting. I CAN'T stop fighting. The fate of the nation hangs in the balance in 2024. Our lives, our families, and all the things we love could be SHATTERED if we're stuck with four more years of President Biden and his establishment lapdogs in Congress. I'm fighting to put TEXAS FIRST AND MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. Together, we'll make sure the Lone Star State is ready for a WAVE of America First support by clearing out the RINOs and doing what is RIGHT and JUST for the people of our great state. I will NEVER stop fighting for YOU. **Now, I 'm asking if you can give $5, $10, or ANYTHING you can spare to help me put America First. **THANK YOU - DONATE BELOW | Thank you for joining the fight! | Ken Paxton Texas Attorney General ---|--- Pol. name: Tony Evers
subject: Time is running out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek,

We have a crucial fundraising deadline
tonight, so I’ll keep this short. We still need $941 to close our
fundraising gap, and with our democracy on the line, we can’t afford to
fall short.

This month, the Republicans in the Senate have shown they will stop at
nothing to push their petty, partisan agendas, even if that means
affecting the lives of hard working Wisconsinites.

They just fired 8 more public servants that I carefully appointed due to
their strong abilities and high qualifications without any reason, and we
know they won’t stop there.

In order to have the strength to fight back, I need your support in
closing our fundraising gap for the month. We need to keep investing in
Wisconsin now more than ever, and I can’t do it without you.

Dear Friend,

March Madness is upon us, and just like the whirlwind of the tournament, our campaign for a better, brighter city is heating up! As we march toward the future, we need your support and enthusiasm now more than ever.

John’s vision for our city is one of progress, inclusivity, and community empowerment. With your help, we can turn this vision into a reality. Whether you're a basketball fanatic or just someone who loves seeing positive change in our community, there's a place for you on our team.

Here's how you can get involved and make a difference:

Sign up to join Team Carney [https://secure.ngpvan.com/vFV54C2aVEK9WVGszQGa1A2]

Contribute [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OoMlZ6mwLUW28FIdhd9_yA2]

Together, we can make this March Madness one to remember by rallying behind John Carney's campaign for mayor. Let's shoot for the stars and show everyone what our community is truly capable of.

Thank you for your support, and let's keep the momentum going!

Sincerely,

Team Carney

Carney for Wilmington
P.O. Box 2162
Wilmington, DE 19899
United States

name: Jon Tester
subject: what?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I know we can do it together [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] [https://lh7-us.googleusercontent.com/c1N3ztfhZKHMGQjkK8CIDswB2xOpERyBlV01S-76xTTu8HIvtXyHSb78Y-6IvCMKZT8ymblvt_91m34J52CrXVFP__Ny8akgPNfWXJtqXXLD0yE1nOXD8lGa6II7VQatCojNPbEqZ3pRL5MRQo9Qcik] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
I won't lie, folks— I'm stressed out.
My finance director just told me that, not only have donations slowed down, but we’re still way behind on our mid-month goal. My first thought was what!? My second thought was that I should send you a message.
Before I get into the nitty-gritty of it, will you chip in a split donation ahead of our deadline? Your donation will fuel my grassroots campaign and help ensure we have the resources to win in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
Even if it’s just the spare change from your dresser, donations of any amount go a long way in a campaign like ours.
I don’t take orders from super PACs or special interests, and I’m damn proud of it. I take my cues from the hardworking folks of Montana, and that’ll never change.
But since we rely entirely on your support, fundraising can be a big undertaking.
I need your help to stop Mitch McConnell and his wealthy friends from buying this election wholesale, so please:
Rush a split donation of any amount between our campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand so we can meet our mid-month goal and compete with the GOP money machine: [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
Thanks for stepping up.
Jon
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
A note from Kirsten:
Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever.
While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority.
As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer] And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, text JOIN to 60708. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer]
Thank you,
Kirsten Gillibrand

subject: He’s working against his own constituents

body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=SMRLuRniNUG3p%2B2H2oiywr7vYWNZpOlRnoMFulKkmQJP3sQC0mwP0uuWPupWojeljD%2BZj8fdcl4VjEjOxl6MSD8U%2F16J%2Bw9%2FZUHNLY%2BKdeUn%2BuvC9ET8buElMYGM%2FddPuslRgIbXk%2B399MitcmmPH8oyMeM3Uno9FPkPh0yW92EmLfctQ9BansXA0JqfA6hg%2FGiqBH0Ae8D%2B4LFbeBC%2FEyQEPsKYSqhALlIoMnzsa%2BnASTOIjIxCUUtFbHIq%2BMDH3S%2BdCS8aSnVcPd0Y4PK8PoR%2FayHumkcEVZfqHJ981vo6pKqTJVi1vZWLpoVoEN6aJUMkGiDZ2dIN%2F%2F%2FLvQE0rAmGY0GM2q1EO%2BBLtNtY8Sp1GsaO%2BIWWs9VXHzqyeKqseVBpNirZbtOaAGXTLyGtZS57NbNPsr2nzPCIg3NfICk%3D]

# [#]
Peter, Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton’s reign of terror just never ends.

Before we call out Paxton’s extremism, can you rush a contribution of $ right now to help us elect progressive leaders in Texas and win big in 2024? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-mar24?amount=]

RUSH $ → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-mar24?amount=]

After escaping removal from office last year, Paxton’s been dead set on attacking and targeting Texans. Not only has he been focused on his extremist agenda against our democracy and reproductive freedom, but his reign of terror includes:

1️⃣ Urging his loyalists to go against the Court of Criminal Appeals incumbents who blocked him from expanding his authority.

2️⃣ Taking a school district to court for “politicking” after it simply encouraged the community to vote.

3️⃣ Attempting to shut down Annunciation House, a shelter for asylum-seekers in El Paso, which caused a state judge to block him and question his true intentions for the target.

Paxton is more interested in attacking and targeting everyday Texans than actually serving them. And at Texas Organizing Project PAC, we’ve had enough.

In 2024, we’re fighting back against Paxton and the extremist Republicans who care more about advancing their anti-democracy agendas than addressing the real needs of Texans.

Here at TOP PAC, we’re dedicated to electing progressive leaders who can effectively represent ALL communities — no matter race, age, or income — and voting out far-right extremists. If you’re all in to join us, can you make a contribution of $ right now to help us get conservative extremists like Paxton out of office? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-mar24?amount=]

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Justice Clarence Thomas has recently been exposed for not disclosing millions of dollars worth of gifts from GOP megadonors – which leads most to believe his impartiality has been compromised.

And it’s easy to see how – as he has been ruling in conservatives’ favor in landmark cases, as recently as the overturning of _Roe v. Wade._

John Oliver has spotlighted this troubling scenario and has offered $1 million a year and a motorcoach to get Clarence Thomas as far away from the bench as possible.

[We think he should take the deal and skip out of town, for the sake of our country. If you agree, sign on now and urge for the resignation of SCOTUS Justice Clarence Thomas »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81588296/462908135/-617558438?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240324_3_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3YjRlMDA4LTM3ZWEtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4NhyK7xHMrXShtKU5W9g62QgulqRi-NgjvXUTbQSzSg=)

Talk show host and comedian John Oliver is legitimately offering this to right-wing Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas. = | = Justice Clarence Thomas has recently been exposed for not disclosing millions of dollars worth of gifts from GOP megadonors – which leads most to believe his impartiality has been compromised. name: Team AOC
subject: Palestine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Did you see Alexandria's speech?
#
Since the beginning of the Israel-Hamas War, Alexandria has called for a permanent ceasefire — and as one of the original cosponsors of the Ceasefire Now Resolution, she has helped grow the number of representatives calling for one to 66 members strong.
And on Friday, Alexandria spoke on the House floor about the unfolding genocide in Palestine for the first time.
This morning, Alexandria went on CNN to continue to speak out about the atrocities taking place in Gaza.
**Take a few minutes to watch her interview on[X (formerly known as Twitter)](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/23409?utm_source=em20240324-6067&t=1&akid=6067%2E2526796%2E2dn1j5) or [Instagram](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/23410?utm_source=em20240324-6067&t=2&akid=6067%2E2526796%2E2dn1j5).**
The actions of Hamas should not be tied to whether a 3-year-old can eat.
The actions of Hamas do not justify forcing hundreds of thousands of people to eat grass as their bodies consume themselves.
Thank you for reading,
Team AOC

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=3&akid=6067%2E2526796%2E2dn1j5) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=4&akid=6067%2E2526796%2E2dn1j5) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=5&akid=6067%2E2526796%2E2dn1j5)

name: Josh Stein for North Carolina
subject: Mark Robinson or Josh Stein?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2403-wn-q1-stein?refcode=240324-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2403-wn-q1-stein?refcode=240324-email]
This is Mark Robinson 👇
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2403-wn-q1-stein?refcode=240324-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2403-wn-q1-stein?refcode=240324-email]
He’s the GOP nominee for Governor of North Carolina.
He has questioned the Holocaust and disputed the results of the 2020 election. He’s mocked school shooting survivors. He’s called LGBTQ+ people “filth.” And he supports a total abortion ban — with no exceptions for rape or incest.
Mark Robinson is determined to drag us backward.
Robinson has been endorsed by Donald Trump and has the backing of national big-money Republican groups. The GOP is targeting North Carolina as their top gubernatorial pick-up opportunity, so EVERYONE is lining up to put money behind Robinson’s backward campaign.
But we have another choice.
Because this is Josh Stein 👇
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2403-wn-q1-stein?refcode=240324-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2403-wn-q1-stein?refcode=240324-email]
He’s served North Carolina for 25 years as a consumer protection advocate, state senator, and current attorney general.
He has a record of fighting for reproductive rights, access to the ballot box, and public safety.
As our next Governor, Josh will work to fully fund our public schools, restore protections for reproductive health care, expand voting access, and pave a path to a brighter future for EVERY North Carolinian.
But he’s in a neck-and-neck race with Robinson, and we know that this will be a long, hard fight to victory. Josh needs ALL of us to stand with him and build the momentum to win. Split $30 or more between our campaign and Wiley Nickel NOW to help defeat Mark Robinson once and for all >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2403-wn-q1-stein?refcode=240324-email]

name: Sen. Jacky Rosen
subject: My analysis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
We’re currently tracking behind what we need to reach next week's FEC end-of-quarter goal
| | |
---
Hey, friend – I hope you had a great weekend.

You might not know this, but long before I ran for office, I worked as a computer programmer! 👩💻

Although it's been a while since my software development days, I still use my analytical skills to dig into my campaign’s fundraising projections every once in a while. And I have to tell you – right now, it’s not looking good.
We can definitely still win this race here in Nevada, but it’s going to take a surge of grassroots support to overcome recent spending from dark-money groups like the Koch network.
We’re currently tracking behind what we need to reach next week's FEC end-of-quarter goal. **But by my calculations, it would only take a 12% increase in the number of supporters giving at least $5 to make up that gap before our deadline.**
[**Will you be one of the supporters I need to pitch in $5 or more to my campaign now to help make up our fundraising shortfall?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81588378/462908478/1553268835?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3597-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTg0MmI2MC0zOWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T9UO8_1u_wmhVpH-SLrzlhgdQB4hjLjxPwRNbBzUZeA=)

Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat. That’s why I’m counting on your critical grassroots support to fight back and win. Senate control will all come down to Nevada – and I need to know you’re with me. [**Will you chip in now to win in Nevada and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81588385/462908485/1598999503?refcode=footer&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTg0MmI2MC0zOWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T9UO8_1u_wmhVpH-SLrzlhgdQB4hjLjxPwRNbBzUZeA=) You can also [**text JACKY to 30508**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81588386/462908486/1077135989?refcode=footer&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTg0MmI2MC0zOWVhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T9UO8_1u_wmhVpH-SLrzlhgdQB4hjLjxPwRNbBzUZeA=&emci=73917ec8-9ae7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=5a842b60-39ea-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=3800590) to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky

name: Chairman Michael Whatley
subject: I’ve set an ambitious first goal as Party Chair.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
And I need your help to get there.
[](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=35e3dbff37e149b7b47558f78708e237&_e=5nruX0zMUHwxkvuk_3QK3cmtKbzyWwpQE5SiyF5q8JA4iqWsyQVV19g3a7pWrnKsZi9tK2j1_skPatb771Spwz0AxqjLY-hwNvSR_3np22ZA7OluhjGlxNrCw5X4b9Icmt8_3_GNiiMoS-J7B2OU6rP-oTGBQwhxXetmU8quvFJqcSWB0xIRRYTSB0a_68UkZRMORK6LtrePumbLrhzzJ67vD83UY7Lp-k1DaPVEen9ITQJsTVULkDUEVnfJsWEOALV-QIpUg632iat1EtVPcr_gcfTrVNIqRehpADkaXGiLtK3NRftK9A2wlakC-PLoc18KsO7iM7SHogM-lr7W_O2_fEYqojC0hx-PauKKwxIqvRs-G2n2-Y_2JmzOCLJ96XdmJwjlpMi4YnB94o7meE0MUbxqqqam_7UA_SxXxmMwsRuia3JgaHJEkq0G-rjQNFv43NC7sVd7Tp5YskIsuCxm8p9dtq6lPXxO_bRjnXc%3D)

Fellow American,

Our Party's presumptive nominee President Trump chose me to lead Republicans to victory in key races across the country, and with the November elections on the horizon, there's no time to waste.

clean_body: And I need your help to get there. Fellow American, Our Party's presumptive nominee President Trump chose me to lead Republicans to victory in key races across the country, and with the November elections on the horizon, there's no time to waste. Democrats are mobilizing, harnessing their resources to challenge our candidates and our ideals at every turn. They are strategic and well-funded, but we have something they lack: a powerful community of principled Conservatives like YOU. As Chairman of the Republican Party, I've authorized a critically important Fundraising Goal to help register new voters, push voters to the polls, and take advantage of every opportunity to run up our margin in key states. I'm committed to ensuring that our party's future aligns with your values and vision, but the Radical Left threatens to destroy the freedoms and principles that have made this nation great. That's why I put together the Goal to give Patriots like YOU an opportunity to make a real-time impact. Can I count on you to step up, Fellow American? Thank you, Michael Whatley Chairman, Republican National Committee Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
